description:

_පෙම්හීන මල් පිපිණු මාවතේ අපි ආදරෙන් උන්නු කාලයේ මතකේ පෙම්කතා ඇසුනා මතකයි නේද පෙම්වන්තයෝ!_

title: I LOVE YOU,STUPID!
description:
මන් උබට ආදරෙයි බන් !!!
මටත් පුලුවන් වුනානම් කට ඇරලා බය නැතුව කියන්න.
මම හරි බයයි බන්
මගේ ඒ වචනෙන් මට උඹව නැති වෙලා යයි කියලා..

මට්ටු කරන්න බෑ බන් මගේ හැගීම්
උබ මාව තව තව අවුස්සනවා..

දවසක් ආවොත් තීරනයක් ගන්න වෙන
එදාට මම උබව අතාරිනවා දෙපාරක් නොහිතා

- උබටත් හොරෙන් උබට පිස්සුවෙන් ආදරේ කරන කෙනෙක්

එදා හම්බවුනු  උඹව හිතුවෙ නැ ආයෙ දකින්න වෙයි කියලා..

උඹේ මූන එ විදිහටම කිසි වෙනසක් නැ.....ඔව් අවුරුදු දෙකක් කියන්නෙ වෙනසක් වෙන්න තරම් ලොකු කාලයක් නෙවේනේ..

title: Loving him was Orange (is the definition of love is to risk.... again?)
description:
Kahit hindi parin matanggap ang nangyari ay sinubukan ko parin silang tingnan sa jail booth, my heart starts to feel hurt, Ang sakit sakit ang saya nilang dalawa. 

Para hindi na ako masaktan pa ay pumunta nalang ako ng wedding booth pinapanood ang mga couples na kinakasal, nakakainggit hanggang sa pagharap ko ay nakita ko ang Isang lalaki, ang lalaking pupukaw ng atensyon ko ang awkward nung una pero ang pogi nya talaga, sinubukang itanong ang pangalan nya at ito ay "Steven" ang pogi ng name nya kasing pogi nya,

 Pero....... Makakaamin kaya ako sa kanya? Papano? Kailan? Saan?, Nalaman ko na kaklase ko sya this S.Y 2024-2025 at kinilig ako kinilig ang buong kaluluwa ko pero....... Pagkalipas ng 5 buwan nalaman ko na hindi pala talaga ko ang gusto at nalaman ko na sila pala ng kaklase ko. Sobrang sakit para saakin ng lahat ng iyon

"Talaga bang ayaw saakin ng mga taong mahal ko oh talaga lang may nakalaan na para sakin hindi ko lang alam?"

Pagkalipas ng ilang buwan ay nakausad na din ako at meron na din akong girlfriend, yes girlfriend andyan sya palagi para sakin at nililigawan nya din ako kaya sinagot ko ito.

Pero lahat ng masasayang sandali ay matatapos din nang malaman kong...........

Abangan ang mga plot twist ng kwentong ito, happy reading everyone!!

Lovelots!!!

title: Gangte Tribe
description:
The fascinating and intresting world of the Gangte tribe of NE india, which are mostly ignored upon by the main land indians, because the Gangte tribe have mongoloid facial structures and also have a unique and very different cultures from the main land india and also it's neighbouring tribe. It's one of the majority in the Chin-kuki-mizo tribe groups (also known as Chikim)
Gangte have a unique traditional stories, folktales, folksongs and dances as well
They are animalistic, they used to worship the rivers, wind and much more
Now due to modernization they dont follow that anymore but still some do in remote areas of hills and mountains in which they are situated in
They are forest dwellers and also like making their houses on top of a mountain
Also their fascinating history, they're also known for their head hunting 
Lets dive into it, shall we?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: සුදු අරලිය...
description:
" ඇයි අයියෙ ඔයා කොයි වෙලෙත් මාව සුදු අරලිය මලකට සමාන කරන්නෙ.."




මං අයියගෙ මූන දිහා බලන් අහනකොට එයා මගෙ ඇස් දෙක දිහා බැලුවා.. මගෙ අයියගෙ මූනෙ ඇඳිලා තිබ්බෙ හරි ලස්සන නිවිච්ච හිනාවක්..




" ම්ම්ම් මොකද මගෙ චූටි මහත්තයා මට සුදු අරලිය මලක් නිසා.."




" අනේ.. හේතුව කියන්නකො අයියේ.."




මං කියනකොට අයියා අරලිය ගහට හේත්තු වෙන ගමන් ඇස් පියාගෙන හොඳ හුස්මක් ගත්තා.. මේ අරලිය මල් සුවඳ මගෙ හිත නිවනවා වගේම එයාගෙ හිතත් නිවනවා ඇති..

මමත් ඇස් පියාගෙන අයියගෙ පපුවට හේත්තු වුනේ හීතල හුලඟත් එක්ක එන මගෙ ආසම අරලිය මල් සුවඳ විඳින ගමන්..




" සයාෂ් දන්නවද.."
" අරලිය මලට තියෙන්නෙ වෙන කිසිම මලකට නැති හරි අමුතුම සුවඳක්.."
" ඒ සුවඳ මගෙ හිත නිවනවා.." 
" හරියට ඔයා මගේ හිත නිවනවා වගේ.."




ඒකද මම තේව් අයියගෙ සුදු අරලිය මල වුනේ..

අයියගෙ පපුව ගැහෙන රිද්මයට කන් දෙන ගමන්ම මම එයාගෙ ඇස් දිහා බැලුවා..

title: í† íѕ †hє TᖇᑌTᕼ ¦ Ongoing
description:
"...භාතිය අයියෙ, ඔයා ඔය කරන විකාර දැන්වත් නවත්තගන්න... මොකද අම්මයි, තාත්තයි නෑ කියලා විනාස නොවෙන්න ඕන කෙනෙක් විනාස වෙන්න යන්නේ ඇයි??? මට කියනව!!! තමුසේ තනියෙන් කියලා හිතාගෙන හිටියට එහෙම නෑ කියලා දැන්වත් දැනගන්නව!!!"
      
      "ඉතින්??? විනාස වෙන්නෙ මං නේ... ඔයාට මොකද???"
      
      "අද වෙනකන් ම මම තමුසෙ එක්ක හිටියේ තමුසෙ මැරෙනව බලන්න නෙවෙයි!!! මැරියන්!!! මුලින් ම මාව මරල ඕන මගුලක් කරගනින්!!!"
      
      "අත අරිනවද???"
      
      "තමුසේ වගේ එකෙක් නම්... "
      
      "ශාකි, තරහ නෑනේ???"

description:

title: The Untangled Fate •》 Jeongcheol
description:
It wasn't suppose to happen like this. Never in his life he had experienced this nor he want to know more. Because he knows it will never be the same to him and to the one he loves and have known for years...


Destiny wasn't just fate and fate wasn't just destiny. 


It was true in the universe there are people who are destined or fated to be soul mates or life long partners for their whole life ahead in their long run. 


Sometimes the main thing is that it is not easy to accept but the magical thread may stretch or gets tangled, but never breaks. 



Until and unless Jeonghan tells the truth to Seungcheol nothing is gonna change. 


Will he die because of this?

title: Enemies With Benefits
description:
What would you think if you shared a birthday? Okay...what if it was with a jerk? What if he make your birthday a living hell every year? But worst of all...What happens when you both are secretly like each other?
Selena Brians is falling head over heals for  Kevin Brooks. Kevin apparently likes her but she's not convinced enough.
 I'm scared to experience heart-break and love. I'm scared to find out the truth. And most of all, I'm scared that I could be in love with him.
Why am I talking like this you may ask? Because I'm Selena.  And that's what scares me....

title: 101 Writing Tips from an Exhausted Reviewer
description:
I've been reviewing stories on Wattpad for a while now and, boy, has that been a journey. Your stories have made me gasp and squeal. Your stories have made me laugh and cry. 

But, from time to time, your stories have made me cringe. 

In commemoration of my review store hitting 100 reviews, I thought it was about time to break down my reviewing journey, with the help of a fellow reviewer, @awesomeSTG. This book will contain chapters regarding the common errors I see in stories, it will offer tips on how to make your story professional, and there will also be some sneaky rants about what people expect from a reviewer. 

Welcome to 101 Writing Tips from an Exhausted Reviewer, featuring two very exhausted reviewers: @ray_of_sunshine9 and @awesomeSTG.

Or, as perfectly said by @awesomeSTG: 

Ladies and gentlemen, folks far and wide! Sharpen your quills, prepare your scrolls, and polish your fire-resistant armours, for we shall finally cool off your burning queries - or scorch you even more - with our word of wisdom (namely rants) and advice! Hear ye, hear ye!

And the incredible cover is done by the very talented @g_beckford - thank you so much!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey there!

I'm a girl who loves reading and writing almost as much as she loves puppies. Feel free to contact me whenever!

I don't bite. Or, at least, I try not to.

I'm more well known for my reviews than my biting people habits! I have a review store on my profile, so if you'd like a review, feel free to check it out! Be aware: waiting times are usually long, because the waiting list is already a bit packed. However, I have a story on this profile, titled 101 Writing Tips from an Exhausted Reviewer, that may also help you with certain aspects of writing!

On that note, if you have a contest that needs a last-minute judge to step in, please let me know. I'll be more than happy to try organising my time to help judge your awards -- I totally understand how stressful awards are to host.

Also, if you would like copy-editing, please shoot me a message! I have previously copy-edited for published works.

Now, let's talk about my stories!

I'm very excited to say that my collection of short stories, Crystals and Crows, can be found on the 'Boxed Sets' reading list on the @WattpadShortStory page! One of these stories was also a winner of a @WattpadDisney contest. Woohoo!

Thank you to all my readers who have helped my stories shine. :)

Any questions, concerns or requests? Feel free to PM me. Or, if you'd prefer email, please email me at: rheasunshine935@gmail.com

authorBio:
Welcome to my profile!
For my curious visitors I will write a little something about myself.

Well, my name is Zoe. (I'm not giving you my last name because I have no idea who you are and what you would do with it.)  I'm twenty-one years old.

My life took a turn for the dramatic when a fat balt guy kidnapped me and locked me in a dungeon (no just kidding, it was a basement lol). My only companion was a very albino like chick named britt... CREEPY I KNOW! (She's as awesome as she is crazy). Oh and the fat balt guy turned out to be a perfect muse.

My hobbies are reading (DUH), writing (of course), singing, playing random musical instruments, drinking tea, annoying my little sister, doing things with friends, eating chocolat, and eating in general :)

Things I dislike are agressive or disrespectful people, cleaning my room, not being taken seriously, and having nothing to do.

My favourite book is Pride and Prejudice.
My favourite film is Pride and Prejudice
My favourite artist is Jason Mraz.
My favourite tv-shows is Black Mirror (so creepy!)
My favourite musical (besides the Phantom of course) is Miss Saigon.

Now I don't have any inspiration left, I'm not that interesting anyway. My stories are probably more interesting than I am, I would advice you to read those instead of wasting your time reading things about someone you've never met.

If you have read all this information about me and are still not bored we might become friends!

title: The Other Side of Silence
description:
Just so we're clear, this is the sequel to The Maya Diaries. I'd recommend you read it first before this because you may not understand what's going on clearly.

Ava's world shattered when her best friend, Maya, walked away, leaving behind a trail of broken trust and unanswered questions. Two months later, Ava's still reeling from the aftermath. Haunted by the secrets she kept and the lies she told, Ava must navigate the treacherous landscape of her own guilt and regret.

__________

As she struggles to come to terms with her past, Ava begins to uncover the truth about herself, her family, and the forces that drove her to betray Maya's trust. With each step, Ava edges closer to redemption, but the path ahead is fraught with danger and uncertainty.


Will Ava find the courage to confront her demons and reclaim her voice? Or will the silence that once protected her now destroy everything she holds dear?


*The Other Side of Silence* is a gripping, emotional journey of self-discovery, forgiveness, and the unbreakable bonds of friendship.

title: Unspoken Scars
description:
Some scars are visible; others run deeper, hidden beneath silence and fear.

This is the story of a young woman navigating a world of fractured relationships, unspoken rules, and the weight of expectations. With nothing but her will to survive, she leaves behind the only life she's ever known in search of freedom and self-discovery.

As the past threatens to pull her back, she must confront painful truths, redefine love and trust, and decide what it truly means to move forward.

Unspoken Scars is a raw and reflective journey of resilience, survival, and finding light in the darkest of places
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome to my corner of Wattpad.

This isn't just a story... it's my personal journal, a way to put my life into words and process everything I've been through. Unspoken Scars is a raw and honest reflection of the moments that shaped me. The pain, the growth, and the resilience it took to keep going.

I'm sharing this not just for me, but for anyone who has ever felt lost, silenced, or misunderstood. If you're here, maybe you'll find a piece of yourself in these pages too.

Feel free to follow along, leave a comment, or add my story to your reading list. Every reader means more than I can put into words.

Thank you for stopping by and giving my story a chance.

I'll be adding New Parts Weekly ❤️

title: Beneath the Clouds
description:
Title: "Beneath the Clouds 

When siblings Chika and George reunite after a long separation, they unwittingly unravel a tangled web of family secrets and lies that threaten to destroy their lives.

As they dig deeper, they encounter a complex maze of betrayal, denial, and deceit that leads them to question everything they thought they knew about their family.

With their lives at stake, Chika and George must navigate the treacherous landscape of their family's past, confronting emotions, pain, and loyalty along the way.

As they fight to uncover the truth, they are met with resistance, silence, and even death. But they refuse to back down, driven by a fierce determination to expose the secrets that have haunted their family for so long.

Through their journey, Chika and George discover the true meaning of gratitude, redemption, and the unbreakable bond between siblings.

Will they be able to uncover the truth and bring justice to their family, or will the secrets they uncover destroy them forever?

title: Eclipse Of My Soul: A journey through melody and verse
description:
Step into the kaleidoscope of emotions, where every lyric is a brushstroke painting the canvas of your soul. "Eclipse Of My Soul" invites you to wander through the corridors of time, where each song is a chapter in the story of your heart.

Within these pages lie the echoes of laughter and tears, the whispers of dreams and doubts, all woven into melodies that resonate with the rhythm of life itself. From the gentle strumming of acoustic ballads to the thunderous roar of anthemic rock, this collection spans genres and generations, united by the universal language of music.

Whether you're yearning for solace in solitude or seeking companionship in chaos, these songs will be your faithful companions. They will lift you up in moments of triumph, cradle you in times of sorrow, and remind you that you are never alone on this journey called life.

So, turn the page and let the symphony of "Eclipse Of My Soul" serenade you. Each note is a star in the night sky, guiding you through the darkness and illuminating the path to your own inner truth.

Dive into the melodies, lose yourself in the lyrics, and discover the symphony within. Your soul's eclipse awaits.  The author invites you to discover her very own songbook containing songs readers might find relatable.



♡Hope all of you love the songs and book in general♡

"Whoever is trying to bring you down is already below you."

"Never mind what haters say, ignore them till they fade away."

"Kill Em With Kindness."

"Snakes and stones never broke my bones."

"Hurt people I love the most, I'll hurt you more."

"You should see me in a crown."

title: the mysterious library of wonder
description:
In the heart of the Whispering Woods, where ancient trees whispered secrets to the wind, stood an enchanted library. Its walls were crafted from books of forgotten knowledge, and its roof shimmered with a soft, ethereal glow.

As the sun dipped below the horizon, casting a warm orange light upon the forest floor, a young adventurer named Lily stumbled upon the hidden library. With a curious heart and a thirst for knowledge, she pushed open the creaky door and stepped into a world beyond her wildest dreams.

"Welcome, young one," whispered the library, its voice echoing through the shelves. "I have been waiting for you. Are you ready to uncover the secrets within my walls?"

Lily's eyes widened with wonder as she gazed upon the endless rows of books, each one radiating an otherworldly energy. She took a deep breath, and with a sense of excitement and trepidation, she replied, "I'm ready."

title: How To Get Reads, Votes, and Comments - A Guide
description:
How do I get more reads, votes, and comments?

If you find yourself asking that question, then I have some answers for you.  

What can you do to reach out to readers and potential readers?  How can you encourage readers to comment and vote?  What are all the different ways you can promote your stories?

This #1 ranking guide is written by a Wattpad ambassador and especially geared for new Wattpad authors.  Lots of tips, advice, and personal opinions await you - including everything thing I've done to promote my own Watty's finalist and winning stories - but only if you turn the page.

Reader testimonial by @AyushiPandey-- 'I read your guide for Wattpad success when I first started writing my story last year in August, and now it has been an entire year when I stumbled upon it again. I just have to say, I loved reading it again, it has the best tips one can find (take it from me, I have read many, many guides here). Thank you so much for taking out your time to compile such an amazing book!'  

Reader testimonial by @suspishfishy-- 'I have to thank you again! As soon as I wrote a book that focused on what I wanted to write, instantly people started to read my books and give me feedback!'

**THIS IS NOT A PLACE TO ADVERTISE YOUR STORY.  This is where you'll find detailed instructions for the proper places to advertise and find readers.  If you ask people to read your story here, your comment will be removed.**

Thanks to @EnjxiiBlxck for the cover.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
You can buy the published version of my Watty winning story The Boy in the Woods on Amazon, Barnes and Noble, iBooks, Smashwords, and many online ebook sources around the world.  Just search for the title and my name, Katherine A. Ganzel.  Check out the paperback version here!  https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B07GNSLGKP

I'm a married mom of 2 girls, both in their 20's. They're the coolest people I know and I love them both very much.  

I like all kinds of music, but mostly listen to electronic dance music.  

I knit, crochet, and even make my own yarn on a spinning wheel.  

I have two dogs who are my at-home children now.  I also have a cat, who barely acknowledges our existence, except when she brings us still-alive rodents.  

I love to read young adult and new adult, and I'm a sucker for romance.  They're also my favorite genres to write.  I have a thing for fountain pens and spiral bound notebooks.  Actually, it's more of an addiction.

title: Wattpad 101: Your guide to the world of Wattpad
description:
So you just started an account... Or maybe you've been here a while and you just aren't getting a feel for things. Well Dorian is here to help you out! Here is an ongoing guide and the tricks of the trade. How to get followers, how to critique work, how to be popular, and how to write. Feel free to throw out comments for suggestions to things you'd like to hear more about. Good Luck and Happy Writing!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
At age 5, I invented peas and mashed potatoes. Prior to this event, people ate their peas willynilly. They were all over the place. It was mass hysteria. So I said to my mom, I said, "Why don't you just stick that shit in mashed potatoes?" to which she replied, "Stop swearing! And take your hands out of your pants!" I chose to do neither.

After that, I went to college, where I experimented with my sexuality. Sometimes as a man, sometimes as a woman, sometimes as Tyrannosaurus Rex. Sexsasaurus Rex, that's what they called me... until the day I went mysteriously missing.

Where I went from there? Nobody knows. Perhaps I wondered from town to town, fixing the wrongs of the world. Perhaps I discovered porn on the internet and spent years locked in my room, writing erotic fan fiction.

Either way, one day I was found, naked, hanging from a tree, in the Northern Canadian Jungle. I lept from that tree, and crawled sixty miles back to civilization, battling dire cobras, dire bears, and dire wolves all along the way. When I finally made it into a local Holiday Inn, I'll never forget the first words that they said to me. "Why are you naked?...Eh?"

From there, I returned to civilization, and after a brief stint in jail for regicide, I got an account on Wattpad. And thus I decided to start writing books, and you know the rest.

authorBio:
❝If you can WALK the WALK , you can TALK the POC.❞

@TalkThePOC is an all-inclusive movement that inspires the existence of people of colour in literature. People of colour (POC) are greatly underrepresented, and this account aims to help change that through the promotion of equality and the acknowledgement of the existence of various and beautiful ethnicities, nationalities, and cultures. This movement encourages POC characters, whether they be on the side, or in the center. Add the tag #talkthepoc to your stories if they include POC characters, and help spread the word.

Get your story added to a reading list by tagging it with #talkthepoc and messaging me the link, and specifying which reading list you'd like me to add it to!

title: Love in the Light of Faith: A Journey Through Islamic Love Stories
description:
Many of what we call "love stories" today are nothing more than stories of lust and desire, physical attraction disguised as love.

Is love about dying for the one you love or living every breath with him/her?
Swapping love notes... exchange , living happily ever after...

Normally, we associate these ideas of love with couples who meet, date, and fall head over heels for each other. Very rarely do we relate these images to married couples.

Moreover, we almost never connect this perception to Muslim couples, who marry according to purely Islamic customs. Although this link is quite rare, there actually exists an example in Islaam's own history, which not only depicts this kind of love but goes far beyond it.


For ease of reading, I have not inserted "Peace be upon him" each time the name of the prophet SAW  is mentioned in some stories, but please take it that the salutation apply to him peace and Blessings of Allah be upon him..

The stories have been compiled from various sites/books/lectures/Articles....
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Wisdom is the goal of every believer; wherever he finds it, he is most of deserving of it.

Good health and good sense are two of life's greatest blessings..

Be happy, at peace, and joyful, and don't be sad.

"And if you would count the graces of Allah, never could you be able to count them" (Quran 14:34)

"Then which of the blessings of your lord will you both (Jinns and Mankind) deny.??) (Quran 55:13)

O Allah, I seek refuge with You from cowardice amd miserliness ..

Ameen..

authorBio:
Not your regular wattpad fiction writer.

For someone to be the hero of a story, he need not be a prince Charming, Greek god,rich business man, the good guy hidden underneath the evil guy or a popular celebrity.

For someone to be the heroine of the story, they need not be another birth of mother theresa or an update of Angelina Joulie, with flawless skin and oozing with hotness in one eye and peace in other.

title: The UnSlut Project
description:
I was the 6th-grade "slut." And I kept a diary.  So I decided to create The UnSlut Project in the hopes that my own diary entries could provide some perspective to girls who currently feel trapped and ashamed. I am publishing these entries one at a time, without changing a single word except for the names of the people involved. My limited commentary, which is confined to brackets in each entry, is meant to provide the relief of my current perspective, fifteen years later.  The UnSlut Project: Working to undo the dangerous slut shaming in our schools, communities, media, and culture by sharing knowledge and experiences.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"Night, Forgotten" is now available as a paperback and e-book everywhere books are sold! If you read the first draft during #NaNoWriMo in 2017 or the second draft currently live on my Wattpad profile, then your comments inspired the changes that appear in the published book. I can't wait to share it with you!

I'm a writer, film music historian, and lyric soprano born and raised outside Boston. After graduating from Harvard University and earning a Ph.D. from the University of California, Santa Barbara, I moved to San Francisco's East Bay where I live among the redwoods with my husband, our two young children, and our dog.

Using the pen name Emily Lindin, in 2013 I founded The UnSlut Project, an online community where survivors of sexual abuse find solidarity through personal story sharing. I posted my annotated middle school diary on Wattpad and found immense support from readers, who began sharing their own experiences and building momentum in the #MeToo movement. I'm the author of "UnSlut: A Diary and a Memoir" (2015) and the director of "UnSlut: A Documentary Film" (2016); both are critically acclaimed and currently available online, in bookstores, and at local libraries. I've advocated for survivors of sexual abuse on platforms such as ABC with Katie Couric, CNN, The Doctors, Al Jazeera America, NPR, at Amber Rose's SlutWalk in Los Angeles, and at countless high schools and universities around North America.

Instagram: @meghanjoycetozer
Twitter: @emilylindin 🥸

title: my cold fiance
description:
Title: My Cold Fiance
 
Description:
In the story "My Cold Fiance," the narrative unfolds through the perspectives of Aiah and Mikha, an engaged couple with contrasting personalities. Aiah, accompanied by her friends Maloi, Sheena, and Stacey, finds herself in the cafeteria where she notices Mikha, her serious and handsome fiancé, with his friends Joanna, Colet, and Gwen. Aiah's interactions with her friends and Mikha reveal a dynamic of playful banter and coldness between them.
 
As the group decides to head to the mall, Aiah's impulsive nature leads her to pick out a bag, only to realize that her wallet is missing. Mikha's cold demeanor is tested as Aiah tries to persuade him to pay for the bag she chose. Their differing attitudes and misunderstandings create tension between them, with Aiah feeling unappreciated and Mikha struggling to connect emotionally.
 
The story captures the complexities of relationships, communication barriers, and the challenges of understanding one another's perspectives. As Aiah and Mikha navigate their differences, will they find a way to bridge the gap and strengthen their bond, or will their contrasting personalities drive them apart? Explore the journey of "My Cold Fiance" to uncover the twists and turns of love, misunderstandings, and personal growth.

title: Your Guide to Writing the Perfect Story
description:
As the title states, this is your tutorial, created by me, to writing a story to the very best of your abilities.  By carefully reading through the following pages, you can enhance your skills and clear your path to becoming the great author that you wish to be, uncovering your potential each step of the way. For tips and guides on how to create perfect punctuation, grammar, and developing characters, plot, getting through writers block and much, much more, search no further for everything that you need to help you on your journey is right here. Thanks for your eyes, mind, and interest and, please, do read on.

***

#4 - 11/02/15
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello everyone!

I was so happy when I discovered Wattpad! I am an aspiring writer and this is where I am putting all of my ideas into words.

I have a lot of ideas up my sleeve, both fan fictions and original stories, and am so excited to share it with people who are actually here to read and not just here for attention (although the site isn't perfect on that front). Many of my stories are currently in the making so if you were so wonderful to visit my page you may not be seeing those for a little while. I’m working on developing the plot of my original stories before writing them, which can be a very time consuming process as I am hoping to make them each both as complex and suspenseful as possible.

Currently I am juggling extra-curricular activities, studying, school, writing, my social life (I do have one, you know),  and trying my best to participate in as many Wattpad clubs and activities as possible so I won't be able to go on all the time. I joined Wattpad because I want to.  Me writing is a choice. I will not be pressured to update; I'll do that when I want to.

Please leave constructive criticism and comments under my posts. Every review/comment I receive means so much to me and I try to take each one into consideration. I am hoping to improve my writing in every way that I can so I can actually publish a book one day.

On a similar note, I am searching for an editor and critics. If you offer services like that, please contact me because I would love to take advantage of that opportunity. (Please include your payment and what, exactly, you're offering.)

Thank-you for visiting my page! I hope that you’ll stay tuned for more of my work.

P.S. There is a fine line between hate and constructive criticism. All hate will be deleted so don't bother trying.

title: 8 Hours
description:
Eight Hours is a raw and inspiring memoir that takes you on a day-by-day journey through one life-altering event. In 2020, a simple misstep on a customer's porch changed everything, leaving me with a broken neck and an uncertain future.

Through the pages of this real-life account, I share the physical pain, emotional turmoil, and moments of hope that defined my recovery. From the ICU to the slow and grueling steps of physical therapy, each chapter reveals the struggles and triumphs of rebuilding a life after trauma.

This is a story of resilience, vulnerability, and the human spirit's ability to endure even in the face of unimaginable challenges. If you've ever faced adversity or are looking for a testament to perseverance, Eight Hours will resonate deeply with you.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Freelance writer, enjoying the art of writing about actual events of my life.

title: "𝔉𝔦𝔫𝔡𝔦𝔫𝔤 𝔱𝔥𝔢 𝔱𝔯𝔲𝔱𝔥" creepypasta research, Slenderman & paranormal
description:
𝒯𝒽𝑒𝓇𝑒'𝓈 𝓂𝒶𝓃𝓎 𝓉𝒽𝒾𝓃𝑔𝓈 𝒾𝓃 𝓉𝒽𝑒 𝓌𝑜𝓇𝓁𝒹 𝓉𝒽𝒶𝓉 𝒶𝓇𝑒 𝓈𝑒𝑒𝓃 𝒶𝓈 𝓈𝓉𝓇𝒶𝓃𝑔𝑒, 𝓊𝓃𝓃𝒶𝓉𝓊𝓇𝒶𝓁. 𝒫𝑒𝑜𝓅𝓁𝑒 𝒿𝓊𝒹𝑔𝑒 𝓉𝒽𝒶𝓉 𝓌𝒽𝒾𝒸𝒽 𝓉𝒽𝑒𝓎 𝒸𝒶𝓃𝓃𝑜𝓉 𝒸𝑜𝓃𝓇𝑜𝓁. 𝒯𝒽𝑒𝓇𝑒 𝒶𝓇𝑒 𝓉𝒽𝒾𝓃𝑔𝓈 𝓌𝑒 𝒶𝓇𝑒 𝓃𝑜𝓉 𝓅𝓇𝑒𝓅𝒶𝓇𝑒𝒹 𝒻𝑜𝓇, 𝓌𝒽𝒾𝒸𝒽 𝓌𝑒 𝒻𝑒𝒶𝓇. 𝒲𝑒 𝓉𝒽𝒾𝓃𝓀 𝓉𝒽𝑒𝓎 𝒶𝓇𝑒 𝓂𝑒𝓇𝑒 𝓈𝓉𝑜𝓇𝒾𝑒𝓈, 𝓁𝑒𝑔𝑒𝓃𝒹𝓈, 𝓉𝒽𝑒𝑜𝓇𝒾𝑒𝓈, 𝓃𝑜𝓉𝒽𝒾𝓃𝑔 𝓇𝑒𝒶𝓁. 𝒩𝑜 𝓂𝒶𝓉𝓉𝑒𝓇 𝓉𝒽𝑒 𝓌𝒾𝓉𝓃𝑒𝓈𝓈𝑒𝓈, 𝓃𝑜 𝓂𝒶𝓉𝓉𝑒𝓇 𝓉𝒽𝑒 𝑒𝓎𝑒𝓈 𝓉𝒽𝒶𝓉 𝒽𝒶𝓋𝑒 𝓈𝑒𝑒𝓃 𝓉𝒽𝒾𝓃𝑔𝓈 𝑜𝓊𝓉 𝑜𝒻 𝓉𝒽𝑒 𝑜𝓇𝒹𝒾𝓃𝒶𝓇𝓎, 𝓌𝑒 𝓈𝓉𝒾𝓁𝓁 𝒸𝒽𝑜𝓈𝑒 𝓉𝑜 𝓃𝑜𝓉 𝒷𝑒𝓁𝒾𝑒𝓋𝑒. 𝒥𝑜𝓀𝑒𝓈, 𝒽𝑜𝒶𝓍𝑒𝓈, 𝒻𝒶𝓀𝑒 𝒾𝓈 𝓌𝒽𝒶𝓉 𝓌𝑒 𝒸𝒶𝓁𝓁 𝒾𝓉.

𝒹𝑒𝓃𝒾𝒶𝓁

𝐼 𝒸𝑜𝓊𝓁𝒹𝓃'𝓉 𝒸𝒶𝓁𝓁 𝓂𝓎𝓈𝑒𝓁𝒻 𝒶 𝒻𝒾𝓇𝓂 𝒷𝑒𝓁𝒾𝑒𝓋𝑒𝓇, 𝒾 𝓌𝑜𝓊𝓁𝒹𝓃'𝓉 𝓈𝒶𝓎 𝒾𝓉'𝓈 𝒶𝓁𝓁 𝓇𝑒𝒶𝓁. 𝒯𝒽𝑒𝓇𝑒 𝒶𝓇𝑒 𝓉𝒽𝒾𝓃𝑔𝓈 𝓌𝒽𝒾𝒸𝒽 𝓌𝑒 𝒸𝒶𝓃𝓃𝑜𝓉 𝑒𝓍𝓅𝓁𝒶𝒾𝓃. 𝐸𝓋𝑒𝓃 𝒾𝒻 𝓌𝑒 𝓀𝓃𝑜𝓌, 𝓌𝑒 𝓇𝓊𝓃 𝒻𝓇𝑜𝓂 𝒾𝓉.

𝒻𝑒𝒶𝓇

𝐼𝓉'𝓈 𝒶 𝓈𝓉𝓇𝒶𝓃𝑔𝑒 𝓌𝑜𝓇𝓁𝒹 𝓌𝑒 𝓁𝒾𝓋𝑒 𝒾𝓃, 𝒶𝓃𝒹 𝒾 𝒶𝓂 𝒸𝓊𝓇𝒾𝑜𝓊𝓈

𝒲𝑒 𝓉𝒽𝒾𝓃𝓀 𝓉𝒽𝑒𝓎 𝒶𝓇𝑒 𝓂𝑒𝓇𝑒 𝓈𝓉𝑜𝓇𝒾𝑒𝓈, 𝓁𝑒𝑔𝑒𝓃𝒹𝓈, 𝓉𝒽𝑒𝑜𝓇𝒾𝑒𝓈, 𝓃𝑜𝓉𝒽𝒾𝓃𝑔 𝓇𝑒𝒶𝓁. 𝒩𝑜 𝓂𝒶𝓉𝓉𝑒𝓇 𝓉𝒽𝑒 𝓌𝒾𝓉𝓃𝑒𝓈𝓈𝑒𝓈, 𝓃𝑜 𝓂𝒶𝓉𝓉𝑒𝓇 𝓉𝒽𝑒 𝑒𝓎𝑒𝓈 𝓉𝒽𝒶𝓉 𝒽𝒶𝓋𝑒 𝓈𝑒𝑒𝓃 𝓉𝒽𝒾𝓃𝑔𝓈 𝑜𝓊𝓉 𝑜𝒻 𝓉𝒽𝑒 𝑜𝓇𝒹𝒾𝓃𝒶𝓇𝓎, 𝓌𝑒 𝓈𝓉𝒾𝓁𝓁 𝒸𝒽𝑜𝓈𝑒 𝓉𝑜 𝓃𝑜𝓉 𝒷𝑒𝓁𝒾𝑒𝓋𝑒. 𝒥𝑜𝓀𝑒𝓈, 𝒽𝑜𝒶𝓍𝑒𝓈, 𝒻𝒶𝓀𝑒 𝒾𝓈 𝓌𝒽𝒶𝓉 𝓌𝑒 𝒸𝒶𝓁𝓁 𝒾𝓉.

𝒹𝑒𝓃𝒾𝒶𝓁

𝐼 𝒸𝑜𝓊𝓁𝒹𝓃'𝓉 𝒸𝒶𝓁𝓁 𝓂𝓎𝓈𝑒𝓁𝒻 𝒶 𝒻𝒾𝓇𝓂 𝒷𝑒𝓁𝒾𝑒𝓋𝑒𝓇, 𝒾 𝓌𝑜𝓊𝓁𝒹𝓃'𝓉 𝓈𝒶𝓎 𝒾𝓉'𝓈 𝒶𝓁𝓁 𝓇𝑒𝒶𝓁. 𝒯𝒽𝑒𝓇𝑒 𝒶𝓇𝑒 𝓉𝒽𝒾𝓃𝑔𝓈 𝓌𝒽𝒾𝒸𝒽 𝓌𝑒 𝒸𝒶𝓃𝓃𝑜𝓉 𝑒𝓍𝓅𝓁𝒶𝒾𝓃. 𝐸𝓋𝑒𝓃 𝒾𝒻 𝓌𝑒 𝓀𝓃𝑜𝓌, 𝓌𝑒 𝓇𝓊𝓃 𝒻𝓇𝑜𝓂 𝒾𝓉.

𝒻𝑒𝒶𝓇

𝐼𝓉'𝓈 𝒶 𝓈𝓉𝓇𝒶𝓃𝑔𝑒 𝓌𝑜𝓇𝓁𝒹 𝓌𝑒 𝓁𝒾𝓋𝑒 𝒾𝓃, 𝒶𝓃𝒹 𝒾 𝒶𝓂 𝒸𝓊𝓇𝒾𝑜𝓊𝓈 𝓉𝑜 𝒹𝒾𝓈𝒸𝑜𝓋𝑒𝓇 𝓉𝒽𝑒 𝓊𝓃𝓀𝓃𝑜𝓌𝓃. 𝐼 𝓉𝒽𝒾𝓇𝓈𝓉 𝒻𝑜𝓇 𝒾𝓉. 𝒜𝓃𝒹 𝒾 𝓌𝒾𝓁𝓁 𝓉𝓇𝓎 𝓉𝑜 𝒻𝒾𝓃𝒹 𝑜𝓊𝓉 𝓉𝒽𝑒 𝓉𝓇𝓊𝓉𝒽.

title: My Last Spanking
description:
Growing up in the nineteen fifties, spankings, or smacked bottoms as we tended to call them, were part of everyday life. 
As we got older they became less frequent, but the threat was always there. This story deals with some experienced when younger, but finishes with the last I ever got, from my university landlady, at the age of eighteen.
Although this is listed as fiction, it is not entirely untrue.

title: A Moons View of the Earth (There's More Than One Side of the Moon)
description:
A moon is covered in craters.

A moon will never have light on all sides.

A moon is often overshadowed.

A moon is not a planet.

A moon will always orbit a planet.

A moon isn't worth anything.

A moon isn't even worth naming.

A moon didn't get to choose which planet it orbits.

A moon will continue to orbit the same path until the sun explodes or it breaks apart.

I will run myself into the ground, and there's nothing I can do about it.

---------------

Non regular updates. Sorry.

title: Love Is Blind (Completed)
description:
The worst thing in a girl's life is supposed to be a bad break up. At least, that's what Grace Tanner thought before her world came crashing down on her. When an tragic accident not only takes her eyesight, but everyone she loves most, how will she ever be able to move on? With tragedy comes change, and big changes are in store for Grace and the life she once knew.


*This version is NOT a fan fiction.
*Not edited. 
*TW - Contains brief mentions of suicide, depression, sexual assault. 

If you have read the original version of Love is Blind, this is basically the same except is more edited and the names are different. If you notice any mistakes please let me know!

If you like it, please vote and comment to let me know. Thank you! x

Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A perpetually confused writer from Northern Illinois(US), I've been doing so for years, but have only recently thought about actual publishing. With multiple works in progress currently and a stubborn streak to only work one at a time(not that that is actually working either), they're slow in coming but well worth it, I think.

I like to mix fact with fiction, as well as reality with fantasy, to me that just seems to make it and the characters more relatable. I also like to be detailed and descriptive so pictures are just as clear for the readers as they are for me. If it doesn't play out like a smooth movie in your head, then I wouldn't consider it very good, you know?

Blood Moon Series:
➣ Shy Walking Shadows = Werewolf/Vampire / Dark Fantasy; Published on Amazon - 3 Parts

title: Forbidden Crush ✔
description:
A story of an eighteen-year-old girl who had a huge crush on her college senior.

Naiza Rehman is a typical 18-year-old girl who loves to talk and interact with people. She is a very friendly person and talks to almost everyone in her college apart from her crush.

Shaym Muhammed is a 20-year-old boy who only talks to boys. He despises mingling with girls and can't stand the thought of being friends with them. He ignores every girl who tries to flirt with him.

Will he ever notice Naiza? Will she express her feeling towards him or Will he disregards it like always?

Read "Forbidden Crush" and watch Naiza's journey!

title: Krishnatmika Rukmini
description:
She sat there on the floor, tears flowing from her beautiful Lotus shaped eyes, hands trembling, desperate to word her thoughts. she kept the paper on the queen sized bed. She took the peacock feather and gently dipped it in the ink and slowly raised it with the ink dripping  from the end and started writing.


Everyone's familiar with divine vrindavan leela of Krishna and devotional love of radha. World, to commemorate their eternal love, takes the name of radha before krishna. 
But a very few understands the essence of Rukmini's love towards Krishna. Rukmini is the primary wife of Sri Krishna and chief Queen of Dwaraka. She was the beloved, most favourite wife of Krishna, and hence called Krishnatmika, the one residing in the heart of Krishna.

In this book, I have tried my best to describe their divine love story. Hope you will enjoy reading this as much as I have enjoyed writing this.

(Even though the story is not entirely fictional and is taken from the Mahabharata, it contains fictional scenes purely from my imagination. So I just want to say that it is not my intention to hurt anybody's feelings or religious sentiments)


Cover image credit goes to its respective owner

title: How To: Get More Reads On Wattpad
description:
Highest Rank: #1 in Non-Fiction [14.08.16]

I'm sure many of us have typed in 'How to get more reads' or 'How to get more votes' into Wattpad's search bar at one point or another and been bombarded with books. However when you read them.. Well they all seem to be the same. There may be a reason for that, those books preach the important points however I am here to maybe give you some tips you've never heard before. I can make no promises to give original ideas, I haven't read every 'How to get more reads..' book on Wattpad. But this is a informative guide on how to finally boost that read count and hopefully become the next big writer on Wattpad!

authorBio:

title: Write Better: Tips and tricks
description:
The guide for aspiring  fiction writers who want to improve, sharpen, review, and/or learn. 

Warning! This book encourages editing and contains many tips that  often require revision. Practice makes perfect, and it's good to workout your mental muscles. The more you do now, the better your writing will be later (because you'll correct yourself *before* you get it on paper). 

If you think your writing is perfect or you're lazy or unwilling to try new shoes on your baby, just turn away now. You'll find this guide about as useful as hoarding frozen peas.

title: THE BODY
description:
A beautiful young woman was missing. I knew I had a murder. I even had a suspect. But would I ever find the body? Would I ever be able to arrest the suspect without the body? Don't believe all that crap you see on TV shows. Follow me on this true crime story and see what happens in a real murder case.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Go follow my blog.  www.thealvarezchronicles.com

Studies show that people who follow my blog have a better sex life. True story.

I just like to write.  I am a former homicide detective with a lot of stories to tell. If you stick around you will read real stories about what it is really like to be a detective. How cases are really solved and the toll they take on everyone around them.  I think those stories will surprise you. But you will also read stories about many other things.  Childhood memories, on being a father, on life in general. Stick around and you might just learn more than you thought you could.

If you get a chance take a look at my story "The Body", about a murder case I worked. Or check out my "Convict Chronicles" which contains many short stories about people I have met during my career in law enforcement. Or if you want to laugh check out "Blonde Moments". That's an ongoing series about crazy things that my daughter says. You won't believe most of it. And finally if you just want to see what life here on Wattpad is like check out "Chasing Wattpad". Thanks for dropping by and I hope you have a good experience here.

I have no interest in publishing professionally (not that anybody would read me). Though to be honest I don't know if I tell myself that just to take the pressure off writing, or because it is really true. Who knows? It's  a mystery. Whatever the case, that works for me right now.

Here are some of my favorite quotes:

"Find time to write. But not so much that you do not have the time to experience something worth writing about." - ME

"Life is tough. It's even tougher when you're stupid." - John Wayne

"Sometimes it's the people no one imagines anything of who do the things that no one can imagine." - from the movie Imitation Game

"The most beautiful things in life cannot be seen or even touched, they must be felt with the heart." - Helen Keller

title: Story Of Bad Boy Mack [#18 Plus]
description:
For mature audience only - 18+
I looked into her eyes, for any hesitation, but they were begging me to continue. I slid my hands further and opened her thighs. 
She immediately covered herself with her hands. 
"Do you want me to stop?", I asked her, looping my fingers through  her panties, at her waist. 
"I am married!" She replied looking into my eyes.
"I know!" I slowly pulled her panties up, raising her legs and carefully slid them of her feet. They were drenched. She covered herself with her hands.
..
I looked at myself in the opposite mirror. The image screamed at me.
"You broke another rule - banging your best friend's wife."
-
This is the story of Mack - how he went from good to bad and if he ever would  return back to good.

title: Three Days To Live.
description:
"Are you the only family of Hallie?" The doctor asked him. 

"Y-yes." He sighed pushing his sweaty hair behind with his tired bloody fingers. 

"Who are you, may I ask? Her brother?" The doctor asked lowly, his white hair and thick moustache making  Bradley sweat. 

"No. I'm her father." He simply replied. 

"You seem young. Where is the mother?" The old doctor asked slightly disgusted by Bradley. 

"Dead." He sniffed. His head started to spin. The doctor was asking too many questions.

"I'm sorry to hear that." The doctor cleared his throat mentally slapping himself for asking such a grim question. This made it harder for him to tell this 22 year old boy. 

"Your daughter has stomach cancer. Last stage." He said softly. His stomach doing back flips looking at Bradley's face fall.

"How long does she have doctor?"  Bradley shook his head locking his hands above it. 

"She is dying Bradley. She has about three days to live."


Just three days to live. 
            



©Copyrights Reserved.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Reincarnated Twins of an Otome Game
description:
Tanaka Yuji was your average 18 year old boy. He loves to drink coffee/tea and read books (the total opposite of boys, idk if some boys do this but if you do let's be friends lmao). He excels in all subjects and physical area too, thanks too a certain someone. He's a genius hacker and prefers peace and quiet. He's like a young master of some noble house heck he could even pass for some sort of duke or prince. He's one of those boys in school that gets the girls heart to throb. 

Wellllll until he's paired with his younger sister Urasaki Amane. 

Urasaki Amane a 17 year old girl and is the total opposite of her brother. She's loud and cheerful, she loves the arcade and loves to play games. One time she forced Yuji to play this otome game it was hilarious. She excels in all athletic areas and thanks to her brother Yuji she excels academically too. She's like a tomboy who likes to be pet on the head and enjoys clinging to people... she's like a do- anyway Yuji and Amane are on their way home after club activities before dying. 


Yuji and Amane two siblings who love each other and wish there were siblings. Born the same month and day only in different years, only one year apart.


Two siblings die in a crash by the infamous Truck. Only to be reincarnated in the otome game: Save me, Love me.

(Novice writer, just wrote this for fun. Uhh I'll continue if people want me too but for now I'll just post whenever I guess. Enjoy🙃)

title: The Art of Breathing Underwater
description:
𝐖𝐀𝐓𝐓𝐘 𝐖𝐈𝐍𝐍𝐄𝐑 𝐘𝐀 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟏  For bipolar fifteen-year-old Aaron, growing up in '90s Dublin, being gay is a choice. It is a choice between risking alienation from his conservative Catholic family and close-minded friends or drowning under the weight of his secrets. So discovering he is falling in love with his witty, bi-racial best friend, Robbie, an aspiring actor, plunges Aaron into a sea of confusion. Swimming against the tide of expectations, the young men set a course through sex, drugs and Bowie concerts, an outlet from a world that doesn't understand them.  

But weighted under the pressure of maintaining a double life, Aaron sinks into a deep depression. When a shocking incident puts his life in perspective, Aaron must decide whether staying silent and invisible is worth losing the only love he has ever known for.

authorBio:
Hello friends!!!

Well...first of all thanks for taking the trouble and time to view my profile. :D

I wouldn't like to reveal my real name but in case I become a famous writer then I will. ;)

A Btech student who -

Loves ANIMALS, FAMILY, FRIENDS, MYSELF.

Hates NOTHING.

POLICY OF LIFE - love what you do and do what you love. Enjoy life to the fullest. Never imitate anybody.

HOBBIES - sing, swim, play guitar, draw, read books, listing to music...

I really don't enjoy rather like COMEDY !   :(

I'm literally a book worm. I enjoy reading all genres of books

Recently, I heard about Mahabharat and researched on it. To my surprise I found it interesting. So I wrote a few books on the topic.

title: LIFE IN VERSES
description:
Ang bawat kabanatang nito ay naglalarawan ng isang masalimuot at malungkot na pagninilay sa buhay ng isang tao na dumaan sa matinding sakit at kabiguan. Ang bawat hakbang at desisyon na ginawa ay nagdulot ng mga sugat at pagkatalo, na nagbabalik sa kanya ng mga alaala ng mga pangarap na hindi natupad at mga pagkakataong pinalagpas. Sa kabila ng lahat ng sakit na nararamdaman, ang pangunahing tema ng kabanatang ito ay ang pagtanggap sa kabiguan at ang hindi maiiwasang epekto nito sa buhay ng isang tao.

Pinapakita ng kabanatang ito ang malalim na kalungkutan na dulot ng mga hindi natupad na pangarap, mga relasyon na nagbigo, at ang pakiramdam ng pagiging naligaw sa landas. Sa sukdulang paghihirap, ang pangunahing tauhan ay nakakaranas ng kawalan ng lunas sa kanyang mga sugat at tanong na hindi matutugunan. Ang mga kabiguan ay nagiging bahagi ng kanyang pagkatao, at siya'y nagsisimulang tanggapin na ang mga sakit ng nakaraan ay hindi na mababago, at walang garantiya ng tagumpay.

Ang kabanatang ito ay puno ng malupit na pagmumuni at ang hindi matitinag na pakiramdam ng pagkatalo. Gayunpaman, sa kabila ng lahat ng ito, ang pagninilay ay nagsisilbing paalala na sa mga pagkatalo at sakit, may kalakip na aral na nagsasabi na hindi lahat ng bagay sa buhay ay kontrolado, at minsan, ang pagtanggap sa kabiguan ay ang tanging hakbang upang magpatuloy sa buhay.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Maligayang pagdating sa aking mundo ng mga salita! Ako ang tagapagsalaysay ng mga kwentong humuhugot sa tunay na buhay-mga tagumpay, kabiguan, luha, at ngiti. Naniniwala ako na bawat paglalakbay, gaano man kahirap, ay may dalang aral at liwanag. 

Sumama sa akin sa pagsilip sa mga istoryang hinabi mula sa reyalidad-mga simpleng pangarap, malalalim na sugat, at walang sawang pagbangon. Sana'y makita mo ang iyong sarili sa bawat pahina at maramdaman ang init ng pag-asa. 

**Genre:** 
✨ Drama 
✨ Slice of Life 
✨ Inspirational

title: What Could've Been
description:
Realistically, most relationships from young love end up going the wrong way. It is worse when both of you are separated strictly and in distance. Nobody else makes you feel the way this person does, so you try your hardest. Even through the worst moments, you have to ask yourself if it is even worth it? We all want teen romance and fun, short, dumb relationships. However, when I tell you how it could've been for me, you'll understand true teen romance.

"This baby is yours. This is what happens when you take advantage of someone. Now please don't hurt me!"

authorBio:
Welcome to Non-Fiction!


Non-Fiction is a broad genre of writing that encompasses all books that aren't rooted in a fictional narrative. Non-Fiction writing can be based in history and biography, it can be instructional, it can offer commentary and humor, and it can ponder philosophical questions. If a book is not rooted in a made-up story, then it is nonfiction.

title: All Alone{Not Complete}
description:
A girl needs her mom to show her how to carry herself,how to be independent,teach her about being a woman,and most importantly how to love by expressing a mother's care. A girl will also need her father to teach her even things boys are supposed to learn growing up. So that she won't need one anywhere but the bedroom. But most importantly show her how a man is supposed to treat a lady. But 18 year old Bryelle didn't have that. Her mother died 8 years ago and as for her father...he was never around. Bryelle never understood why she's had it so hard all of her life. She wants to become successful and one day love her children as much as her mother did while she was alive. Will Bryelle try her best to achieve her goals even with everything else that's bringing her down? Find out how she survives in "ALL ALONE".....

title: The Do's and Don'ts of Writing a Story
description:
For all you amateur writers on Wattpad that want to write a smashing book. Here are the top tips.

There are four different sections in here:
PLOT - anything incredibly relevant to a book. The backbone. Everything that, usually, you always need.
LANGUAGE - here covers common grammatical errors, punctuation, vocabulary etc. 
HOW TO -  this is broad range of things, idea, facts that may be relevant to your story e.g. guns, representation, romanticism etc.
AU/WRITING PROMPT - these two sections cover ideas, settings, dialogues that may kickstart your writing process.

This is a collection of advice I have found online and my own advice. 

Feel free to comment anything you want to see or find out!

title: My One And Only
description:
~She was there just for dream of becoming a lawyer and return back to her city, But as one thing led to other, she end up sitting on the stage as a bride, with the person she hated the most..

He never fell for any girl, but this one girl changed him forever and became his 'One And Only'

.
.
.
-----------------------------------------

  I took the knife and pointed towards him "Tum ...? Tum...Tum mera peecha kar rahe ho na .... "I stuttered. 

He was looking at me,actually staring or may be shocked on my action.

"Ye toh mujhe tumse kehna chaiye..." he said stepping towards me

I started shouting.

"Chor CHOR ..... Auntyyyyyy....." He quickly came near me ... And put his hand on my mouth pushing me hard on the fridge door ... 

"Shor machana band kro tum.....Ye mera ghar hai samjhi ...." He said slowly but I can see anger in his eyes ... "Haadi malik ... Naam yaad hai na mera ... " 

----------------------------------------



What will happen when these two different souls meet, fearless but loving Arisha, and headstrong but charming Haadi.

Come join in and let's begin this super awesome journey of Haadi and Arisha.

authorBio:
My name is Caitlin. I live in the USA, in the South now. I like to travel, experience new things, and all things food. 😅 *I'm Inactive right now but feel free to read the stories I have posted here.*

I love reading and writing. I have a ton of ambitions and an equal amount of self-doubt. I can be bossy, but I like to think I'm quite empathetic. After living a life without much opportunity in my younger years, I love to see and help people succeed. My greatest regrets include my greatest accomplishments. I'm happy where I am, but not quite satisfied yet.

I also have a cat named Steve 🐈⬛.

title: Gandivdhari Arjun-The Warrior Prince
description:
Arjun was one of the five Pandava brothers of the Mahabharat epic. He was born to Kunti and King Pandu with the energy of Indra, the leader of the gods. At a very young age he got acclaim for the sincerity and skill in archery. He was known for his steadfastness and single mindedness in pursuing his goals. He was instrumental in winning Draupadi in a contest for himself and his brothers as their joint wife. He also married Subadhra the sister of Krishna and Balaram and kept his friendship with them forever. Lord Krishna became his mentor and guide for the rest of his life.

He was known by different names or rather titles such as Phaalgun, Keerti, Paartha, Dhanajaya and so on.

Arjun serves as an example of a great human being, a dutiful householder, a loyal brother, a great warrior, a devout husband and a sincere devotee of God.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Finding My Own Words
description:
A story based on real life events, Andrew faces the struggles of navigating school life while living with dyslexia. Each test, each lesson, and each day feel like an uphill battle as Andrew tries to find a way to learn and thrive in a world that doesn't always understand his needs. With the support of his friends, including Julian, a fellow student who understands his challenges, and Ms. SunnyBrooke, his caring tutor, Andrew embarks on a journey of self-discovery. Along the way, he learns that overcoming obstacles is not about perfection but about finding his unique path, his voice, and his confidence. Through his journey, Andrew ultimately discovers what it means to find his own words.

title: You My Son
description:
Justin's eyes widened, sweat dripped down from His forehead as he tried to move out of the seat he was tied down to. 

The unknown man dressed in all black with a gold chain on walks up to him. Leaning down towards the boy's level. He chuckled 


"So you the nigga running my name through these streets?" 


~~~~~~~~~~


Meet Justin. A regular school kid, with all A's, trying to make his mother happy. He's not gang-affiliated and never had a track record. Not even a bad report about him could be found. But we all know how high school is. Justin finds himself being bullied by a group of gang members at the school. The bullying got so out of hand. he began to self-harm himself.

Whispers begin to make their way around the streets of a powerful drug lord, only a handful of people have seen him.
Justin was once told he looked like the man, that he was a younger slitting image of the drug lord.  So he begans to use the drug lord as a protection shield. By telling them that was his father.

Once the lie starts to gain traction, it travels from block to block, gang to gang, to law enforcement, etc., going back to the king's front doorstep.

title: Shattered and Reborn: The Darkest Rainbow
description:
"The Darkest Rainbow" is a poignant and inspiring story of resilience, self-discovery, and the pursuit of inner strength. It chronicles the life of a young protagonist navigating the complexities of family, love, and personal growth amidst betrayal and hardship.
The story begins with a tender relationship that soon unravels when Mark, the protagonist's boyfriend, betrays her with someone close to her heart-her cousin. This revelation shatters her world, forcing her to confront her pain and search for closure. As she grapples with heartbreak, the protagonist finds solace and catharsis in writing, turning her emotional turmoil into a powerful creative outlet.
Set against the backdrop of a global pandemic, the protagonist faces additional challenges, including adapting to modular learning, maintaining familial bonds, and discovering a renewed sense of purpose. Through her faith and the support of her community, she learns to rebuild her life and transform her anguish into a source of strength.
The epilogue reflects on the protagonist's journey from heartbreak to healing. Her growth is evident as she embraces forgiveness, letting go of resentment and finding gratitude in the lessons learned. The story celebrates her creative achievements, highlighting how her writing has touched others and cemented her belief in the transformative power of storytelling.
"The Darkest Rainbow" is a testament to the resilience of the human spirit, illustrating how even the darkest storms can lead to the most vibrant rainbows.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Book of Shadows
description:
So you want to learn magic? 
This is a manual of magic in which I have compiled all the basic information I've learned about magic so far. In this little grimoire you will find theory of magic, types of spells, lists of herbs, oils, and stones, pantheons of gods, how to build an altar, how to charge water, how to make spell bags and sigils, and all the basics of magic! 
Check out the referenced sites for more info.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am a twenty-two year old writer of fantasy novels.
I have a Quotev page at www.quotev.com/CarpeNoctem

Shadowbook: Shadowbook is based on the Jungian concept of the Shadow archetype, the dark side of every human being. Through writing Shadowbook, I've personified my own Shadow side. In Shadowbook, Nyx represents me (though my life is much better than hers), and her relationship with Astor represents my discovery of my Shadow (this relationship is really very real between Astor and me).

Those Who Fly: This is a story analyzing spirituality. It is a book about people who are half angel and half human. It is narrated by two characters, one male, one female, and they alternate chapters. Ember Tyson is  just discovering her new world and her particularly unusual magic. Seth Ravenshade is a demon fighter and necromancer who realizes that Ember's powers could save the world. Those Who Fly is my most popular work on Quotev, with over 2,500 likes.

Midnight Magic: Midnight Magic is a series I started when I was ten. It was a BIG thing in my life before Shadowbook and the others came along, and it had too many good concepts for me to abandon it. So I'm rewriting it, again. It's about a wizard girl and a horse who have to save their magical realm from an evil force. Cliche? Maybe, but it's an interesting and complex tale once I finally get past book 1.

title: RINDU
description:
Kisah mereka bukan kisah kahwin paksa. Bukan benci lalu cinta. Kisah mereka kisah rare. Yang mana, Rindu tak boleh bezakan siapa suami dan siapa adik ipar. Kembar seiras yang sangat seiras. Sekali tengok, sama. Dua kali tengok, pun tetap sama. Dan seringkali dia tertukar suami.

"Awak peluk siapa tu Rindu? Yakin tu suami awak?" - Qhan

"Korang berdua ni sama sangat! Mana boleh nak bezakan. Gaya sama. Cara senyum sama. Suara sama. Dari rambut sampai kaki, semuanya sama. Normallah kalau tertukar." - Rindu

Rindu protes. Setiap kali nak peluk encik suami, dia kena perhatikan dulu. Ataupun.. dia kena tanya siapa Qhan, siapa Qhen? Tak pun.. dia kena perhatikan baju colour apa suami pakai tadi. Pasal mereka berdua suka lepak bersama.

"Hati, Rindu. Nilai melalui hati. Walaupun fizikal sama, hati dan cara kami pandang awak berbeza. Kalau benar cinta, awak takkan tertukar." - Qhan

Sekali dua, boleh dimaafkan. Tapi bila berkali-kali, hatinya terluka jua. Dan bila Qhan merajuk, Rindu mati kutu.

Lelaki ego yang tak pernah tunjuk apa yang dia rasa, agak-agak macam mana nak pujuk? Confirm tak ada cara! Melainkan dia ubah penampilan encik suami. Rambut Qhan dia simpan panjang, kemudian buat gaya disconnected undercut + long quift. Setiap kali kembar bersama, dia akan pastikan Qhan pakai baju berlainan dengan Qhen. 

"Qhen.. you kena pakai baju yang ada corak. Qhan, my baby.. awak kena pakai baju plain sahaja. No corak. No bunga." -Rindu

Peraturan dicipta. Qhen termasuk sekali dalam rancangan mengarut Rindu.

"Come on, sister. Takkan baju bunga-bunga kut. Not my taste! Mana aci." - Qhen

"You dah ambil style rambut. So bab baju, biar Qhan pula yang memilih. Dont argue. You pakai baju bunga pun, handsome teruk. Jangan risau.." - Rindu

Dalam rela atau terpaksa, mereka terpaksa ikut. Qhan yang banyak melawan pun diam bila Rindu bukak mulut. Inikan dia.. hanya adik ipar. Lagilah kena dengar cakap. Terpaksa biarkan penampilan di atur oleh Rindu.

title: Servitude: The Hydrangea Chapters
description:
The lifeless animated construct known only as Marlina, awakened in a world at odds from deep lingering scars of conquest, seeks a home where she can belong. With only knowing her name and that her purpose of being is to serve another, she journeys across kingdoms and countries and learning more about the world with some help of a group of outcasts. In hopes of finding a place to call home, she also wishes to seek answers for the origin of her creation and if she is the only one of her kind.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Greetings and welcome! If you're reading this, I hope you're enjoying my first story. This story has been years in the making, playing with my ideas throughout the roleplay communities. From years of practice and testing characters, I wanted to put all my ideas into a series. For my years of work to come to fruition for reader's enjoyment is my dream, hoping Servitude will touch the hearts of many.

Ever since childhood, I had a rapid-fire imagination, creating stories with toys and random objects I'd find. This passion project started through IMVU, the 3D chat website, while the role-play communities were booming. Marlina is the first character I created, and ideas around her were seen as unique, which encouraged me to expand upon them.

Over the past several years of playing various characters and experimenting with my ideas, I never felt confident in my writing to think of making something to be enjoyed by the public. So this is me putting out my years of work, and I'm happy to give my characters a chance to be seen.

I'd love to take Servitude higher by making a full series of novels with the blessings of readers who'd love to see more. I'm open to feedback, being a first-time writer, and willing to improve to make Servitude the best it can be!

title: FRIEND REQUEST ACCEPTED
description:
"Sa ilalim ng mga bituin, sa pagitan ng mga chat at mensahe, nagsimula ang isang kwento ng mga pusong magkaibang mundo."

Sa isang tahimik na gabi, nag-klik ang isang friend request na magbabago sa buhay ni Arjay. Isang simpleng add friend kay John Van, isang lalaking hindi inaasahan na magiging bahagi ng kanyang buhay. Si John Van, isang straight na lalaki mula sa Taytay, at si Arjay, isang bisexual na massage therapist mula sa El Nido, ay nagtagpo sa isang pagkakataon na puno ng mga tanong at misteryo.

Sa kabila ng magkaibang mundo nila-isang mundong puno ng forbidden love at mga fake dating-pumunta sila sa isang landas na puno ng kilig, tuksuhan, at mga hindi inaasahang damdamin. Ang kanilang kwento ay hindi lang isang karaniwang pag-ibig; ito ay isang pagsubok ng tadhana, pagkatao, at ang tapang ng puso na magpatawad at magpursige.

Habang unti-unting nagiging malapit sa isa't isa, natutuklasan nila ang mga lihim ng isa't isa-mga takot, mga pangarap, at ang hirap ng pagkatalo sa isang relasyon na hindi pa handa ang mundo. Sa bawat chat, sa bawat mensahe, at sa bawat titig ng mata, nagsisimula ang isang kwento na magpapalakas sa kanilang loob at magbibigay-liwanag sa kanilang madilim na mga sandali.

Ito ang kwento ng pagmamahal na ipinagbabawal, ng mga puso na natututo ng bagong pag-ibig sa hindi inaasahang paraan. A love story that started from a simple chat, but bloomed into something deeper than they ever expected.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Maligayang pagdating sa aking mundo ng mga salita! Ako ang tagapagsalaysay ng mga kwentong humuhugot sa tunay na buhay-mga tagumpay, kabiguan, luha, at ngiti. Naniniwala ako na bawat paglalakbay, gaano man kahirap, ay may dalang aral at liwanag. 

Sumama sa akin sa pagsilip sa mga istoryang hinabi mula sa reyalidad-mga simpleng pangarap, malalalim na sugat, at walang sawang pagbangon. Sana'y makita mo ang iyong sarili sa bawat pahina at maramdaman ang init ng pag-asa. 

**Genre:** 
✨ Drama 
✨ Slice of Life 
✨ Inspirational

title: No Matter What
description:
My life wasn't anywhere near picture perfect, but it was manageable enough on most days. Manageable, that is, until I threw everything I knew away for Dylan, a boy I met online. Dylan collected my heart with his cold hands, and I didn't think twice about it. I wish I didn't lose myself in his charming ways, I wish I didn't fall for everything he made me believe he was, I wish I didn't carelessly believe him when promised me "no matter what."
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Alexandria.

Inspired by countless immortal novels.
Stories never end. Every time you turn that page, you're breathing life into the words.

I live in a fantasy world. My passion for reading has driven me to write. I create what I want, who I want, and how I want. My words can not be censored, my mind can not be tamed.

"The mind in the magic is you."
     Michael Jackson

title: Let's learn german
description:
Hello everyone!

I am so excited to be writing this. OK, where do I start?

I had been on Wattpad for some time now. However, this is my first time publishing anything.

I had learned German some years back. But I couldn't complete it. I got busy with life, then I wasn't motivated enough. However this time I am fully motivated and determined to Learn German this time.

However, I have to make it a point here that whenever learning a language, listening, and conversing in the same goes a long way. So, watch more and more content in German. There are lots of online language learning apps that you can also refer to.

So, Let's Learn German together. This book is going to be notes for reference. We are going to start from very basic.

So, let's get started!

title: Anything, everything.
description:
My online journal - about anything, or maybe everything. I want to start writing about anything. I just want to start. So here it is. 

Just my random thought - be it in the middle of the night when i can not sleep because of iced mocha i had earlier that day, or just me fighting with my own mind of what i should say but instead i just keep it to myself and then i decided to write it here.

Sometimes it will be short story - the one I played in my mind. 

It can also be about me reflecting about what happened to me - because the great moments won't necessarily be the things you do. They'll also be the things that happen to you. 

That's correct! I am quoting HIMYM. I AM A FAN! I also loveeee FRIENDS! So I guess there will be more quotes from HIMYM and Friends as I am trying to write about things, and maybe some from Gossip Girl and other tv series that I have watched. 

*****
Also included my participation in any contest. ☺️

*****
More than 500 words each  chapter and hopefully I can do it twice a week - Wednesday and Sunday. 

*****
Each chapter is not related to each other - unless stated in the chapters title.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I write to escape my own thoughts. Because sometimes it makes me feel bad about myself and I need to stop feel that kind of negativity. One day I run away to Wattpad and realized this is where I can start writing what's on my mind or just to escape from what's on it.

I find myself in another world as I read, and also I am able to create my own world as I am writing.

I'm all about Horror, Gore, Insanity, Madness, PSYCHOS, Monsters, Demons, Villains, Violence, Twisted minds, Warped viewpoints & Tragic endings.

I'm a bookworm, & a Horror Junkie. I like Sci-fi & Fantasy too though. If you're looking for a good read, I highly recommend everything in my lists below. They're labeled correctly, & it's all epic.

NO READ REQUESTS. I'm sorry, but I'm drowning in them.

I write Horror, mixed with other genras. Happy endings are overrated, & I enjoy creating characters just to kill them off. Remember, horror is fake; cheap entertainment. Just because it could be real doesn't mean it is.

Feel free to look at my works & give me some feedback. What you liked, didn't like, all inputs welcomed. I'm not a "professional" so advice is always appreciated. I'm not offended by criticism.

title: Doctor Who: The Complete History Of The BBC VHS Range
description:
In the 21st century, Whovians across the world are privileged enough to watch the adventures of their favourite travelling Time Lord on a host of streaming platforms, Iplayer, websites, and on other forms of HD content. Not that long ago, Doctor Who fans had to work a great deal harder to enjoy their favourite program. Back during the 60s and 70s, there was no chance of watching any of your favourite programs whenever you wished. Television worked in an entirely different medium. Back then, episodes usually only screened the once. If you missed it, you missed it. Repeat episode screenings were rare, and although fans could read the novelisations of stories, the chance of rewatching episodes whenever you liked on any form of platform was unthinkable.

That all changed with the advent of the revolutionary home media format. The very first story to come out on VHS by the BBC was Revenge Of The Cybermen in 1983. Since then, the home media format of Doctor Who has been one of the most important forms of merchandise to have existed for fans. Video allowed fans to experience stories for the first time and allowed them to watch them essentially whenever they wanted. The range would continue until 2003, and generated one of the longest VHS ranges of any program or series ever. This book takes a fascinating look at the entire history of the VHS range, and one of the most interesting forms of Who media to date.

Over the twenty years the range spanned, the range provided exciting video specials, record-breaking sales, and a lifeline for fans to continue the flame of their favourite series in more ways than one. The successful sales of the videos allowed the show to be kept in the minds of the general public throughout the entire Wilderness years, the gap between the end of the Classic Series from 1989 to the start of the Revived era in 2005. This is the entire history of the BBC Doctor Who VHS range. A CaptainThunderWho Century 22 Production.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"Passion, quality, and knowledge..."

Hello, I'm CaptainThunderWho of Century 22 Productions. As a 21 year old fanboy I have presented many of my ideas of my favourite programs, and in some cases even fact files. All presented in a style that could work as an actual episode or book.

These include a wide range from;

-Doctor Who 
(My favourite television series of all time; both Classic and New Who)

-Thunderbirds
-Captain Scarlet and the Mysterons
-UFO
-Stingray
-Joe 90
- All the other works of the F.A.B. Gerry Anderson
-The Prisoner
-The Twilight Zone
-DC
-Wizards Vs Aliens
-Sherlock
-Wolfblood
-The Simpsons
- Other fandoms I'm also into such as Marvel, James Bond, Alien, Disney and many other classic shows such as Fawlty Towers, Yes Minister/Yes Prime Minister

Century 22 will gladly follow you if you follow us as each week, Century 22 logs have updated you with information about a certain program every Friday, with a favourite list of mine being issued every Saturday.

I'm more than happy to help out another writer and feel free to ask me any questions about writing or our favourite fandoms or for just a fun chat. Remember, we in our fandoms are here to keep the flame alive of the things we love. With every new work we put out, we are helping to keep our fandoms strong and loved for generations to come. Your fandoms need you.

Be sure and follow my good friends and fellow writers @HowlingMadMayhem, @egodfrey72, @xenatracyisgo, @kieron0103, @Imaginarium7, @Dalek07, @CallumStook2001 and all my other lovely friends. These wonderful people have helped and greatly supported my work. In that case...

Allons-y!

title: { Lost Luster } Poem Collection
description:
Lost Luster
======
Tick-tock,
Tock-tick.

How long has it been?
I'm trapped in a figurative lock,
not a shuffle,
not a ruffle,
no sound, not a lick
All except a clock's tick.

Tock-tick,
Tick-tock.

{ Continued in the chapter: Lost Luster }

======

'Lost Luster' is a collection of poems I've written throughout the years. I don't make poems on the regular, but I like writing them here and there. When I do write one, I'll leave it here I guess.

Some songs may also be paired with a song. If that's the case, it'll have [ ♪♪ ] in the chapter title.

title: A Life Wasted
description:
WATTY 2016 WINNER of the HQ Love Award! With national focus on Islamic terrorism, few noticed when "Domestic Terrorist" Clayton Waagner was added to the FBI's Ten Most Wanted List on September 21, 2001. How did a software developer become the 467th person added to the FBI's Ten Most Wanted List? Why did the FBI make Waagner a priority ten days after the worst terrorist attack in American history? How did he become the only person ever listed on the nation's top three Most Wanted List: FBI, U.S. Marshals, and ATF?
Clay Waagner led an interesting life. He pranked a Soviet ship and caused a Cold War incident inside the Arctic Circle. He is a licensed pilot, an artist, a husband of 40 years and the father of nine. He worked for the Christian Broadcasting Network and skippered a commercial fishing boat out of Kodiak, Alaska. He has escaped from custody five times. Criminal Science major's and convicts know his name, but few in the public do.
This is his story. 

"Autobiography is only to be trusted when it reveals something disgraceful.  A man who gives a good account of himself is probably lying."
 George Orwell

      By Orwell's standard this is an honest memoir.
            Clay Waagner 2016
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: "A Life Wasted" is now complete and available on Amazon myBook.to/ALifeWasted

title: My Israel
description:
I was moved to write this story in an effort to educate people about God, His laws and how it caused me to separate myself from a religion I practiced for nearly 40 years.  I also hope to inspire others to gain an interest and perhaps, as I have obtained, a passion for studying Biblical Hebrew. I will also uncover a centuries old conspiracy to conceal the actual name of God!
	Another purpose is to dispel some myths that people that leave The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints leave for only two reasons; they have lost faith, or they have been offended by someone.  This is not the case with me, and I believe there is a growing number of people who have left for similar reasons.  
	I want to be clear, my intent is not to destroy the church.  I do not have any animosity towards the church nor the leaders or members.  I acknowledge many members and leaders of the church are truly dedicated to living the gospel the best they know how.  I also have great empathy for current members of the church as just a few years ago, I was a devout member of the church myself!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I'm not really a writer, but I was moved to tell my story about my faith crisis.  I had started the story months ago, but never finished.  I found WattPad and it motivated me to finish and publish.  I'm not intending on writing more, but you never know.  I hope you enjoy my story and that it might touch someone's life.

title: Till I Find You Again
description:
Aiden Kingston and Rhea Singh Williams have been best friends for 10 years. Both of them have each other through thick and thin. They even promised each other that they will experience the thrills of life together but an unfortunate event drifts them apart from each other. 

After almost 6 years, Rhea returns to New York after graduation for good and for keeping her promise of experiencing the thrills of life with her best friend and her everything together. On her arrival at her home, she stumbles across the information that Aiden has lost his memory of 10 years. 

Though she was heart broken by this information, she didn't let this deter herself from giving up. Instead, it solidifies her determination to make Aiden remember her.

Will she be successful in making Aiden remember her or will she fail and lost her bestfriend in the process?

#15 in Interesting

authorBio:
I very rarely log into this account. This means I will not see messages or comments. Feel free to message this account as a way to scream into the void, but understand more than likely I won't end up seeing you message. I don't mean to be rude, I just very rarely access this account so I miss a lot.

My piece "Genderfluid" has had a lot of changes. I deleted 26 out of the original 40 chapters, leaving only 14. Remaining chapters may reference something from a previous chapter that no longer exists. Due to this, "Genderfluid" may not read the way it once did. I apologize for any confusion this may cause. I also apologize that I took away more than half of a book I was told helped many people.  These changes were for privacy reasons and my own peace of mind.

Thank you for understanding.

-mikah

title: Diary Of An Archaeologist - Wattys 2019 Non-fiction Winner
description:
As a little girl I loved Indiana Jones, not Harrison Ford, no, Indy. I dreamed about one day exploring ancient temples just like him. 

Now, as an adult, many say I am a real life Indiana Jones. I'm an archaeologist with a masters degree in Cultural Heritage who works in museums and goes to excavations. I've seen the temples, held the skulls, encountered the creeps who only want the treasure, and yes, IT BELONGS IN A MUSEUM. 

But I'm not Indy, I'm no hero, no finder of priceless treasures; I'm just one person in a team of amazing experts who's job it is to try and uncover the truth about our past.

And these are my stories.

🎖2019 Watty Award winner Non-fiction
🎖#1 in autobiography 11-09-2019

බොහෝ මිනිසුන් ආශව සමඟ ප්රේමයෙන් බැඳුනද එදත් අදත් හෙටත් මම ප්රේමයෙන් බැඳුනේ,බැඳෙනුයේ ඔබ සමගය.ඔබගේ අවිහිංසක පිරිමි හිතට මා තරම් ප්රේම කරන අයෙකු නොවූවද,මට වැඩියෙන් ප්රේම කරන අයෙකු සිටින වග මම දනිමි.නුඹේ සැබෑ දිවිය තුල සිටින නුඹගේ ආදරබර ආශව හැරුණුකොට නුඹේ ලෝකයට සමාන්තර ලෝකයක සිටින මම නුඹට වැඩියෙම බැඳුනු තැනැත්තා විය හැකිය.ඕනෑම කටුක දේශගුණයක පිපෙන,සුවඳ හමන ගැටපිච්ච මලක් ලෙසට ආශව නුඹව නිර්වචනය කල දා සිටම මමද ගැටපිච්ච සුවඳට ලොබ බඳින්නට වූයෙමි.ආශව ජීවමානව විදින නුඹගේ සුවඳ මම පිපෙන ගැටපිච්ච මලකින් සොයා විඳීමට වෙහෙස වූයෙමි.ආශව කරන ලෙසටම නුඹ වෙනුවෙන් නිසදැස් ගොතන්නට වෙහෙස වූයෙමි.නේත්රගේ සැබෑ අයිතිවාසිකම ඇත්තේ ආශවට වග දැන දැනම සමාන්තර ලොවක සිටින මම නුඹට බෙහෙවින් ප්රේම කරන්නට පටන් ගතිමි.

ප්රේමය මුවාවෙන් කාන්තාවන්ගේ සිරුරු මෙන්ම හදවත්ද තලා පෙලන දහසකුත් යක්ෂ පිරිමින් අතර නුඹ වැන්නෙකු මා හට ප්රේම කිරීමට ඇත්නම් යැයි මම නිතිපතා සිහින දකින්නෙමි.නුඹ වැන්නෙකුගේ අවිහිංසක වදන්,සැනසුම්බර සිපුම්,ආදරබර සැනසීම් වලින් මගේ දිවිය පුරවාගැනීමට ඇත්නම් යන ස්වප්නය තුල මම සතුටින් ජීවත් වන්නෙමි.මගේ වන් ගැහැණු හිතකට නුඹ වැනි පිරිමියෙකුගේ සැනසිලිදායක වදනක් හෝ ලැබීමට ඇත්නම් යන අවිහිංසක ආශාවෙන් මම බෙහෙවින් පෙලෙන්නෙමි.ගල් හිත් ඇති පිරිමින් දහසක් මැද මලක් වැනු සුපින්බර හදවතක් ඇති නුඹව මම දේවදූතයෙකු මෙන් දකින්නෙමි.

ඉතින් ආදරණීයය,
මා හට කෙදිනකවත් ආශව වීමට අවැසි නැත.නුඹව ආශවගෙන් උදුරා ගැනීමට කිසිදු දුර්ජන හැඟීමක් මගෙ හදවත කොතනක හෝ ගෑවීවත් නැත.නුමුත්,මදක් දරඳඩු දඟකාර ගැහැණු හිතකට උරුමකම් කියන මම මගේ ලොව තුල සිටින නේත්රව සොයමින් වෙහෙසෙමි.මගේ ලොව තුල කොහේ හෝ සිටින අවිහිංසක නේත්රව සොයෑගැනීමට හැකි වුවහොත් එය මගේ දිවිය තුල සිදුවන අතිමහත් වාසනාවන්ත අවස්ථාව වන බවද නොඅනුමානය.

එලෙස සොයාගැනීමට නොහැකි වී වෙන පිරිමි සිතක් සමඟ මා ප්රේමයෙන් බැඳුනද,සමාන්තර ලොව සිටින ආදරණීය නේත්ර,මම ඔබට දිවි ඇති තුරා ප්රේම කරමි.


                                          ~කැමීලියා~

title: Art Tips For All Ages
description:
Note that I am a HOBBYIST, not a professional. There are a few things that I cannot draw. However, these are just some quick tips I think will be necessary. You do not have to use this though. Exaggerating the anatomy is not a wrong. There will both be tips for cartoons and realistic anatomy to fit both styles. However, I am not good at drawing realistic faces, so if you need help with anime or realistic faces, I don't know how I can help you. But this is just what I think is necessary. There will be drawing tips, realistic anatomy mistakes, things to tickle your creativity, reminders, oodles and oodles of confidence, and weird jokes. And when I only share with you the "basics" in some chapters, I'm not leaving out information to be mean to or anything. This book is for all ages and is supposed to be beginner-friendly and simple, so I'll try to be soft with you. Don't mind the spelling errors or repeated tips, just ignore them!
Tous Droits Réservés
