title: Strangest Mysteries of the World and Beyond !
description:
Strangest mysteries of the world and beyond. You will be enthralled, amazed, confounded, stupefied and definitely stunned.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi! *Waves pretty enthusiastically* How are you?Good?..Excellent.

Still here? Oh,alright! I'll try to tell you something about myself.
Hmmm. I have an idea. I will just let these amazing people *points below* describe an equally amazing girl *Points at self*.


@Andrew_Mosier She loves to ride tornadoes. Animals talk to her and tell her the secrets of the world. With her heart on her sleeve and her head held high. She is a breath of fresh air in the world of sometimes stagnant decay.
(Well. My pet dragon and unicorn;they do speak with me occasionally.But,I wonder how does Andrew know about that. Andrew,you sneaky man. For the very last line- Awww. So sweet. I am definitely your sunshine. Love you.)


@TimMcFarlane Wonderful conversationalist. Be careful she'll talk your ear off and you'll end up becoming some sort of 'Social butterfly'. Grumpy people,be warned. You'll find yourself smiling soon enough.
(Says Mr. Grumpy. I know you love talking to me Tim. Dare I say,you are a terrific listener. Haha.)


@azweiris One of the most wonderful and sweetest person I've ever come across. She's really easy to get along with. She loves romance and is a beauty with a brain. She is passionate about bureaucracy. You will be surprised to see how intellectual she is. She's moody though.
(Zura. That was beautiful. God, I love you. I am not that moody. Okay! Maybe sometimes. But,hey. I am a beauty *Zura said so* and have a brain,that definitely is a big plus.)


@Arielaii Need help in Economics? Well,have no fear.She is here! She is,by far,one of the most helpful and brilliant person I have the pleasure to know. Plus,this academic is a romantic at heart. Romance and poetry bring light to her heart and rhyme to her words. A gifted person that I am honored to call as my friend.
(Ariel,you are awesome. I graciously and I must add,very humbly accept all the undeserved praise)


There. Now, you know me rather well.
Take care.

title: Edit like an Editor: A Wattpad Featured Guide ✔
description:
*A WATTPAD FEATURED GUIDE*
*Highest Ranking #5 in Non-Fiction's HOT List*
*Ranked #1 in #how-to, #1 in #editor, #1 in #publishing, and #1 in #grammar*

• Do you find yourself with too many typos?
• Do grammar and spelling tools not always find your slip-ups?
• Is English grammar just not your thing?
• Are you a victim of writer's block?
• Do your characters' personalities fall flat?
• Is your dialogue boring?
• Do you need help staying consistent with your points-of-view?
• Are you struggling with choosing the best genre for your work?
• Have you finished your first draft and don't know where to go from there?
• Are you in the bulk of your revising stage and could use some guidance?

jgfairytales has compiled this guidebook together through her experience as an editorial freelancer and Wattpad editor and critic. She knows what the Wattpad writer struggles with. She wants to help you learn how to avoid those slip-ups again, and she does so with easy-to-understand writing.

Learn how to edit your work like an editor through these chapters full of detailed explanations, examples, guides, tips, and practice questions from yours truly.

After reading this guidebook, you will walk away with an understanding of (American) English grammar and the confidence to comfortably edit your own work.

The end goal for every writer is, of course, publication. jgfairytales even has a few tips for you to reach that goal and how to stay on track.

jgfairytales has grown as an editor and critic from college courses, textbooks, guidebooks, editing and critiquing others' work, and editing her work. All references used will be cited, so you may also refer to them if you wish to.

Copyright: All Rights Reserved by Jennifer Gioia © 2016-2018
However, where credit is given, the copyright is (CC) Attribution-ShareAlike.
Tous Droits Réservés

  But here's a few things you need to know first. 
  
  1. I will be doing a review on it in this book. And I will be blunt. If you're looking for honeyed words you're not going to find it here. If I like it I'll tell you and if I don't I'll tell you too.
  2. I don't do vote for vote and follow for follow. If I vote for your book it's because I love it so much I probably added it to my library and am banging my head at my laptop waiting for updates. If I follow you it means the only thing stopping me from rushing up to you and screaming "I LOVE YOU AND YOUR STORIES SO MUCH ABSKDHSJFGHKLSW" is social etiquette and the fact that I have no idea who you really are.
  3. Obviously my reviews are based on my preferences and obviously there will be people disagreeing with my opinions. And obviously a book I hate might be another person's fave - one man's meat is another man's poison and all that. And obviously the converse might be true. Obviously these things are obvious. But still I have to state these obvious things because some oblivious people don't get it. 
  
  So come along then. Lemme read your books.

~amazing book cover by fictophilic~

title: Turn Pain Into Power
description:
What's the worst that's happened to you so far?  How did it hurt you?   Do you wish that the pain would just go away?  Do you wish, maybe, that it never happened at all?  

What if wishing your pain away was the wrong answer?  What if instead, you could turn this event into your greatest strength?  What if you could do that for all the bad experiences in your life?  Would it be a waste of your time to find out how to do it?   

If you answered 'no' then read this book.  Here you will find the the tools and process to turn your worst experiences into your greatest strengths.  To turn pain into POWER.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Why Didn't He Let Me Die? || COMPLETED STORY
description:
Arisela's life has been a never-ending rollercoaster. She is a beautiful, smart, talented girl; she had dreams that she wanted to fulfill, just like all of us do.  But all those were thrown down the drain. From having a rough past and present life too, made it almost impossible for her to build the life she wanted. The life she yearned for. Behind all these facades, she was bullied and abused. People hated her; how perfect she was to the eyes of others. Mockery, lies, and shame were thrown at her. 

All she wanted was to have friends to protect her, a complete family to love, and a normal life. What happens when she cross paths with the most selfish and conceited bully who makes her life a living hell every day and hates her for no particular reason (or is there?) but... became the person who saved her life?

title: The Tourette Diaries
description:
"This is Lyla Green. She is 16 years old, tall, and has long brown hair. She is pretty shy but very caring and creative."
This is how a person would describe me normally. The usual. General facts, appearance, and personality traits.
"This is Lyla Green. She is...weird. She does strange stuff with her voice and body, it's like she's crazy."
This is how a person would have described me when I was 14 years old. When I discovered I had Tourette and had tics. This is what they saw at first glance, and they never bothered to look closer. If they had looked closer, if they knew me, they would have noticed that I am the same person described above. Just with tics. Do I change that much?
No. I am just a bit different. A movement there, a sound there. Something out of the ordinary. Something you don't see everyday. Something new.
That's what scares people.



Based on real events.

*COMPLETED*

authorBio:

https://www.wattpad.com/story/143044341-ramblings-of-me-aka-the-unnecessarily-long
Long story short, I don't want them up anymore.

Thank you all so much for all the support over the years, votes, reads, comments, kind messages, and everything in between. I don't think I'll ever be able to express how incredible it made me feel just knowing that other people would read, let alone like, what I wrote. Especially the older stuff, and even the newer stuff to be honest. I am just so incredibly grateful I had the audience I did, the friends I had, the people I knew. This community allowed me to be the real me, without judgment or punishment. I will always be grateful for that.
-Ash

title: Link Click
description:
Cheng Xiaoshi is the owner of the Time Photo Studio. His job is to enter the photos that his customers give him and fix their regrets. When he enters the photo world, he takes on the identity of the person who took the photo. He gets their memories, emotions, and even their tone of voice. But this does not mean that he forgets his real identity. He just tries to do what they want instead of them. Of course, while doing this, he is careful not to change the past. Because changing the past can cause a big problem. That's why he always listens to the directions of his partner Lu Guang. He also has the ability to follow what is happening in the photo world. Together, they run the Time Photo Studio.

title: Looking Down the Barrel of a Brand New Day - COMPLETED
description:
#1Nonfiction: Will Ceci be seduced by ax crimes, buried girls & mushy poems? Will she fall head-over-ass into a forbidden love affair? Or will she continue down an entirely prudent and reasonable path?

Everything is real.
Everything is true.

The Authors:  
Ceci is a peach, who directs documentaries, runs a video production house in Detroit, and records and tours internationally as a drummer. Jack is a Colorado trial lawyer who has appeared on Stephen Colbert, CBS 60 Minutes, ABC, NBC, FOX, Court TV, and media around the world. A Wattpad-Mysty interview of Ceci and Jack appears at the end of Part One.

#1Nonfiction, #1True Crime, #1Non-fiction Spotlight, #1Criminal Law, #1True Story, and #1Memoir. 1st Place in Non-fiction, Rose Awards. A Wattpad Spotlight Featured Book, 2018-24. Gems of Wattpad, 2020-2024.
     
Part One and Two are complete. Part Three is forthcoming. 

We receive a lot of requests, and if you read and vote for us, we will try our best to read and vote for you. We love comments!! 
       
Names, gender, dates, and locations have been changed to protect the innocent, the guilty, and to avoid as many lawsuits as possible.  All photographs are owned by the authors or used with permission.

Cover Photo by Rauchenberger, available royalty free on Pixabay.
  
Copyright 2016, 2024.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Who are you? Honestly, we are much more interested in you and why you clicked our book than writing another immodest blurb about ourselves. Who does that? Dicks. Dicks brag about themselves.  Not that we won't ultimately sellout by including a bio below. We will. But before we do (actually, it will be me. Ceci refuses), we want to go on record to state that this is supposed to be a two-way street. And we would like to know who you are, and what you think about our book. We lived it. We love it.  But we are biased. And it's a lonely game adoring your own work, like smiling into a mirror, drunk, then hungover, then self-loathing, and soon you can't stand the sight  of yourself and the damned book.

So leave a comment or three. Follow. Or at least a frickin vote ⭐. Please.

Ceci is a peach, a mother, a professional drummer, and she runs her own video production company in Detroit. She also has a good head on her shoulders, is mature, practical, reasonably happy, and has these killer dimples. Really, dimples like you have never seen and will never forget. And they are killer in the sense that if you look directly at them, you will die. I, Jack, am a father, a former professional singer, and a trial lawyer in Colorado. The "singer" part is really pushing the limits of credibility. The brutal truth is that after ten years of performing and recording in a band, I became minimally competent as a singer, but I was pretty okay, even above average, at prancing around the stage like an idiot. No lie. Now I'm a lawyer in Colorado. My competence in trial is a well guarded secret because it is much easier to cut your adversary's throat if he thinks you are a lazy moron. 

One more crucial fact: In the third grade, Ceci was the fastest runner, faster than all the boys, faster than anyone!

So, tell us about yourself. We would love to hear about who you are and what you think.

title: "Parallel Paths" : "The Beginning of Us"
description:
In a world where freedom is a distant dream, two souls find solace and connection amidst the steel bars and concrete walls of separate prisons. "Parallel Paths" follows the intertwined journeys of Giovanni and Queen Najah, two incarcerated individuals navigating the challenges of their environments while yearning for a deeper connection that transcends their circumstances.
As they grapple with their pasts and confront the realities of prison life, Giovanni, a former artist with a passion for painting, discovers purpose in expressing his emotions through vibrant artwork. Each stroke of his brush becomes a testament to his resilience and hope for a future beyond the confines of his cell. Meanwhile, Queen Najah, an aspiring writer, pours her heart into storytelling, crafting letters that echo her dreams and aspirations, weaving tales of love, loss, and redemption
Separated by miles yet united by their longing for connection, Giovanni and Queen Najah paths cross through a pen-pal program that ignites a spark of hope in their otherwise bleak existence. Their letters evolve from simple exchanges into profound conversations, revealing their vulnerabilities, fears, and desires. With each correspondence, they share fragments of their lives, drawing strength from one another as they navigate the complexities of their respective journeys.
As their bond deepens, they inspire each other to confront their demons, embrace their creativity, and envision a future filled with possibility. The story delves into themes of love, resilience, and the transformative power of connection, illustrating how two individuals can find light in the darkest of places.
"Parallel Paths" is a poignant exploration of the human spirit's ability to endure and thrive, even when faced with the harshest realities. It is a testament to the belief that love can flourish in the most unlikely circumstances, reminding us that true connection knows no boundaries-neither of distance nor circumstance.
Tous Droits Réservés

I consider myself very articulate and talented in using all of my God Given Skills n Gifts with having passions in many things I'm definitely not limited to much jack of many trades. title: How to Write Science Fiction
description:
"Science fiction writers foresee the inevitable, and although problems and catastrophes may be inevitable, solutions are not." - Isaac Asimov

This piece is intended as a bit of a Help guide, a point of reference and hopefully something people will enjoy, as ultimately all of you will have different experiences reading and writing science fiction, and writing in general. If nothing else, I hope it inspires you to try your hand at writing Science Fiction if you haven't already.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome to the official Wattpad profile for the Science Fiction Community and the place to be for exciting new Sci-Fi stories, information about famous Science Fiction authors, badass contests and challenges and the chance to be featured in one of our anthologies or reading lists.


Come in and discover the wonders of Science Fiction with us!

Please remember-while diving into wormholes, surfing on solar flares, or ordering a drink at the Outer Rim Bar: stay friendly and positive! We're proud to be a multicultural community uniting various species from across the multiverse(s).


General tags: #ScienceFiction #Sci-fi #sf



In our Guidebook you will find:

🚀Our Reading List Guidelines

🚀How to Submit to our Reading List

🚀How to Become an Ambassador

🚀A subscriber link to the Creator's Newsletter

Looking to enter a writing challenge or contest? Check out the available Ambassador Contests and Challenges here!




This profile is run and maintained by a team of Ambassadors who are not Wattpad staff. Ambassadors are regular Wattpaders who volunteer their time to the community. 


Please don't advertise on our profile. Only stories submitted via our submission form will be considered.

title: Story Edit Like A Pro
description:
After reading this guidebook, you'll have a method for ensuring that your story is well-told, well-paced, and highly effective.  You'll be guided through the process of reviewing your story, scene-by-scene, until it works.

We won't focus on copy-editing or proofreading. This is all about your story because your story matters!

What you'll learn in this book:

- Why you need to perform a story edit
- How to make the most out of you characters
- How to use the key elements of fiction to make your story flow
- How to elevate the emotional impact of settings
- How to engage your readers with the story arc
Tous Droits Réservés

I have a passion for story editing, so I founded Fictionary and developed an app to help writers turn a first draft into a story readers love.

description:

Learn from the Quran;

Discipline through Prayer - 'Salah' 
Sacrifice.
Perseverance - 'Sabr' 
Everything is Temporary - 'Dunya' 
Gratitude. 
Impact on Others - 'Akhlaq' 
Beware of the False Illusion of Perfection.

One of the virtues of reciting the Quran is that the reciters gain ten rewards for each letter they read. Prophet Muhammed said: "Whoever recites a letter from the Book of Allah, he will receive one good deed as ten good deeds like it.

Ayat al-Kursi is regarded as the greatest verse of Quran according to the hadith. The verse is regarded as one of the most powerful in the Quran because when it is recited, the greatness of God is believed to be confirmed.

authorBio: "My reviewer: @torturelover. I am never alone, for Allah is always with me, guiding my path. Those whom He guides cannot be misled, and among the deeds most beloved to Him is bringing happiness to a fellow Muslim. We must remember that the way we live our lives shapes our journey, and ultimately, we will depart this world as we have lived. I have chosen to leave BTS behind, standing firm in my beliefs and my commitment against LGBTQ ideologies. As Allah has said, Whoever turns away from My remembrance will indeed experience a life filled with sorrow, and on the Day of Resurrection, We will gather him blind. May we always find solace in His presence."

title: My dad ,My hero
description:
I was only five years old, but the memories of my dad were etched in my heart like they were yesterday. Every day, he'd come home from work with a big smile on his face and a surprise in his hands. Sometimes it was a new toy, shiny and bright, 

Other times, it was a bag of my favorite chips, crunchy and salty, that i'd devour in seconds. But no matter what the surprise was, it was always accompanied by a warm hug and a kiss on the forehead .That make you feel love

Whenever I felt scared, sad, or overwhelmed, he dad would wrap his arms around me in a tight hug. He'd hold ne close, whispering words of comfort in my ear, and making me feel safe and protected. Those hugs were the best feeling in the world, and I felt like nothing could ever hurt you as long as your dad is holding you.

My dad had a way of making me feel like I were the center of the universe. He'd listen to my stories, no matter how silly they were, and offer words of encouragement that made me feel like I could conquer anything.

As I grew older, I began to realize just how much my dad had sacrificed for me. He worked tirelessly to provide for my family, always putting others before himself. But despite the hardships, he never lost his sense of wonder, his infectious smile, or his love for me.

But one day, everything changed. I lost my dad, and my world was shattered into a million pieces.I felt lost, alone, and scared. The pain of his loss was overwhelming, and it felt like a part of you had been ripped away.

Even though the pain of losing him still lingers,I know that my dad will always be with me in spirit. I remember the way he made you laugh, the way he held my hand when i were scared, and the way he hugged me to give me comfort.

I know that my dad may be gone, but he'll never be forgotten. He was the best dad in the world, and I feel so lucky to have had him in your life. His love, his lessons, and his memory will stay with you forever, guiding and inspiring you every step of the way.

title: Not a Fad: A Trans History Lesson
description:
Although trans* visibility has only increased in recent years, it is not a new experience. Transgressing gender boundaries is not a fad.

Trans* history is as diverse and far-reaching as human civilization. 

In this book I will explore gender nonconformity in early Western civilization.  My focus will be on stories from Late Antiquity through the early Middle Ages in Europe. 

Before reading, please be aware that there have been a lot of negative attitudes directed towards gender variant people throughout history. Negativity does not negate our existence! We exist today, we existed in yesteryear, and our history should no longer be ignored.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Hearts of Gold: The Inspiring Tales of the Sahaba RA
description:
Stories have always been a great and powerful way to Learn, Understand & Motivate our Imaan (Faith). So why not learn and experience some of the Best Stories of Islam to inspire and understand the importance of our lives...

One of the ideas that made me compile this book was that Muslim parents while going to bed at night, instead of telling myth and fables to their children, may narrate to them such real and true stories of the golden age of Islam that will create in them an Islamic spirit of love and esteem for sahabah, and thereby improve their Imaan. It is my hope that this book will bring to us and the coming generations great benefits.

These stories are taken from various websites, lectures and books and are well researched..

These stories are not intended as biographies, but rather to provide a glimpse of the main incidents of each companion's life.

title: Wattpad's Undiscovered (Closed For Submissions)
description:
Closed For Submissions.

Tired of searching for that completed story?  Did you know there are thousands of  undiscovered stories on Wattpad that may not show up in your search?  

I am starting this book to highlight those stories and writers.  I may not have read these but they've been submitted to me to put together for readers.

All works featured in this book belongs to the author of the book and at no time belongs to me.  I am not responsible for the content of the featured stories.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi!  I'm Grace Madden, and I'm a storyteller.  Before you read my works, please be informed that I am slowly moving my stories to Vella.

In my opinion, there are two types of authors.  Writers and storytellers.  Writers are polished, flawless, technical and professional.  A storyteller has flaws, ignores the rules and perfection isn't the main priority.  The most important thing to a storyteller is to share their emotions while exposing their flaws.  We are amateurs that are growing and trying to learn how to become a writer and have a hell of a story to share.

I want your raw emotions then I want you to laugh and share joyful moments with my characters. You may cry while you grieve with and laugh as you share joyful moments. All of my stories have mature themes although I do not like the terms smut or erotica in referencing my work.  These are love scenes, a form of art and they are meant for mature readers. I want you to feel the love they share as they discover their most intense feelings.

About me: 
I was a teen in the '90s, I'm a wife and a mother of two. A grown daughter and a teen son.  I have experienced the joys of adoption and the thrills of giving life.   I write from my rural home nestled in the middle of 43 acres of beautiful scenery.  Thank you for visiting my profile and I hope you find something here to enjoy.

I do not do critiques, read for reads or votes for votes. 

To purchase my published work on Amazon my author name is Grace E. Madden

Most of my work is now available on Kindle Vella.  Follow my author's page to view all my works. You may even find free promotions to download my ebooks on your device!
https://www.amazon.com/author/gracemadden

title: Positive Thinking :Way To Success
description:
(Hello if you got time please read my new short story- https://www.wattpad.com/story/175347394-between-destinations  :) )  
You have probably had someone tell you to think positive when you were in a trying 
situation. That is because the power of positive thinking is something that is a widely 
held belief. 
Most people easily accept that when you give off positive energy, you can infect others 
with that positive energy and that they will return that energy to you. It is basically the 
idea that what you put out there will come back to you.
Positive influences are all around us. They exist because people love to feel good. 
People prefer the positive to the negative. You can likely relate to this. You would 
probably rather be around someone who is upbeat and full of energy than someone 
who is depressed and moping around.
People see that thinking positive and having a positive attitude can play a large role in 
their life. Positive thinking can be very powerful and by putting it to work in your life; 
you can reap the positive benefits.

authorBio:
I love books. All kinds of books. Paper books. E-books. Old books. New books. Literary fiction. Science fiction. Mystery. Fantasy. Poetry. Throw a book at me and I'll catch it in mouth and eat it.

I also write books. I have published three nonfiction books on the craft of writing. Now I'm heading into make-believe territory, working on a science-fiction trilogy that's got everything in it--from aliens and spaceships to a geek with a yo-yo and a robotic dog. It's also a bit of a military thriller with a dash of superhero thrown in. It's genre stew. That's what it is.

You can find my creative writing blog and books on writing fiction, poetry, and creative nonfiction at writingforward.com.

title: Dreamland Library
description:
Have you ever read a book that you absolutely loved and just wanted to share with the world? Well, here is the place for you!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"Every great dream begins with a dreamer. Always remember, you have within you the strength, the patience, and the passion to reach for the stars to change the world."

-- Harriet Tubman

Close your eyes.  Take a deep breath.  Relax.  Feel yourself start to drift off. Lose yourself in a wonderful, blissful space with doors all around.  Open the one before you.  And, finally, take your first step into our little place of dreams.

Hello, potential Dreamer, and welcome to DreamlandCommunity.  While here, we hope to provide you with a friendly place to share and grow your stories, as well as create connections that will make Wattpad as enjoyable an experience as possible for you.

All are welcome.  No matter the type of dream -- new or old, bold or reserved, serious or for fun -- we aim to give it a place to spread its wings and soar.  How do we do this?  We have many portals for you to step through, which can be found by exploring the books on our profile.

Now that we have established what we do, we recommend looking at Dreamland Community, the book, to see just who we are!

If you're interested in becoming a Dreamer, be sure to check out the different portals.  Those in our club get access to an optional discord server :)

Finally, we have a secondary account for various community-focused events that are not clubs.  You can find that account here: @DreamlandOutreach

I believe that is all.  We hope you join us, and remember: never stop dreaming!

Discord Link: https://discord.gg/dreamlandcommunity

title: 10 Traps To Avoid As A New Author ✔️
description:
Discover some of the writing tips from Wattpad Star and formerly featured author of 'Trapped'.

I  have completed my share of beta reads and critiques for new authors on and off Wattpad and many of the points I have noted are often repeats - something that I used to find in my own writing as well, but have stopped (or tried to stop) over the years. 

It's hard starting out, but it's even harder when no one points out your mistakes. I hope you will find this guide useful to detect some of those problem areas and pick up tips on how to avoid common mistakes. Writing is an art and takes practice. There is no corner cutting - you can only improve if you keep at it.

Interested? Well, then let's explore some of the common traps I've seen...
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Thoughts and experiences of life and mental health
description:
Life is a journey, an odyssey of challenges, excitement, and rewards that unfold along the path. The quest for self-discovery is the very essence of life, as we navigate the vastness of the world. 

The journey is not without challenges, yet it is through these experiences that we find our way. 

Author Vernon JB Pohl has traversed this path with a passion for reading, writing, and contemplating life from diverse perspectives. In his book "Thoughts and experiences of life and mental health," he invites the reader to join him on this journey of self-discovery. 

The human experience is a tapestry of unique outlooks woven together by the individuals who share it, each one distinct and inimitable, defying comparison to another's viewpoint.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Living in a small town on the border of South Africa, my journey began with a failed suicide attempt and severe mental health complications that drove me to the brink of insanity. Every day, I am haunted by my mental health instability, but I persist, knowing that the journey will get easier with time, though never truly fade away.

In the past, I sought solace in alcohol and substances to quell the incessant war within my mind, which only led to my downfall. My sanity left a trail of destruction, alienating family and friends and causing me to forfeit everything I held dear.

It was then that I realized a drastic transformation was necessary. I began to rebuild my life from the ground up and founded a business dedicated to spreading mental health awareness, offering hope to those who may be struggling with similar challenges.

In retrospect, my journey has taught me that life is a perpetual cycle of highs and lows. It is our response to these challenges that define who we are and who we become. Through my work, I hope to inspire others to persevere through their struggles, knowing that hope and transformation are always possible.

title: ♪TRUST♪
description:
Two friends that are trying to trust each other and befriends with each other. IHTIRAH and MALISSA. but, MALISSA takes advantage of her and decided to betray her bestfriend, IHTIRAH. Will IHTIRAH find out about her betrayal and all of the sweet lies MALISSA told her? 

IHTIRAH is not alone. She has her cousins and her real friends. They are helping her as much as they can.. One day, they found out about MALISSA'S betrayal and tells IHTIRAH..  Will she believe it? Will she take their words seriously? Due to her TRUST to MALISSA, will she take it or leave it?

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

"Tell me something that I haven't know about you, Malissa." Ihtirah said with her cold,  quivering voice. She is trying to make herself stay calm as much as possible before knowing the truth.

"What one thing you haven't know?" Malissa questioned her, tilting her head to one side.

Ihtirah laughs bitterly, "I TRUSTED YOU. I TRUSTED YOU BUT YOU BETRAYED ME!" 

She continues, "ONE THING I HAVEN'T KNOW IS YOUR BETRAYAL!"

At that, Malissa is speechless and dumbfounded. Even if she try to come up with a good lie, it will be no use.. Ihtirah knows.. There's no escaping.. 

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

"THE SADDEST THING ABOUT BETRAYAL IS THAT IT NEVER COMES FROM YOUR ENEMIES; IT COMES FROM THOSE YOU TRUST THE MOST."

Torn between his feelings for Luna and Amethyst's allure, Kalix makes a choice that leaves him with a heart full of regret and a broken friendship with Zarina, his loyal friend.  As the school year ends, Kalix realizes the depth of his mistakes and embarks on a journey of redemption, hoping to mend the broken pieces of his life and win back the love and friendship he so carelessly lost.

title: The Life of Queen Victoria
description:
{COMPLETE BIOGRAPHY} Queen Victoria ruled the British Empire for nearly 64 years, after ascending the throne just weeks after turning 18. She was the second-longest-reigning English royal in history, topped only by her great-great-granddaughter Queen Elizabeth. While being Queen, she stumbled upon some unexpected acquaintances. Featuring her nine children Vicky, Albert "Bertie," Alice, Alfred, Helena, Louise, Arthur, Leopold, and Beatrice. Victoria was short in stature-she was barely 5 feet tall-she was a giant in shaping the modern monarchy, leaving her mark on what has come to be called the Victorian Era.

title: The 48 Laws of Power in Practice
description:
Discover how power works in the world, through true stories and real-world applications.  In the game of power, we all play - as either conscious or unconscious players. So we can't afford not to know the rules. 

The ** chapters have the most outrageous content. In each chapter, I will be summarizing one of the laws and how it can be applied to current events and pop culture.  Some of you have told me the stories are what you enjoy the most. They are real, raw, and anonymous so that others may learn from my mistakes. There will be cringe-worthy stories of self-sabotage, but perhaps also some unlikely triumphs. Some of the details are changed to protect the innocent, (or perhaps guilty). 

"The 48 Laws of Power" by Robert Greene illustrates truths about power, through philosophy and lessons from three thousand years of history, which still hold true today. 

There is a lot to learn from each chapter. I encourage you to go on this journey with me by reflecting on how each law might apply to you. Together, may we learn from the past and take control of the future.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A deep thinker with superficial tendencies.

An introvert who likes to throw parties.

Pondering the absurdities of life, always with a smile.

title: Memoirs of an Outlaw: Life in the Sandbox
description:
In Fallujah, during a particularly difficult time in the Iraq War, a group of Marines are deployed on a tour that will bring them closer together, while threatening to tear them apart. The Delta Company Outlaws are a group of USMC infantrymen deployed in 2004 to one of the most hostile war zones in the world. Through the memoirs of one Marine, this touching story encapsulates the drama surrounding everyday life during the Iraq War. With a bond formed through blood, sweat, and tears, a group of unfamiliar Marines will come together stronger than family.

Memoirs of an Outlaw: Life in the Sandbox is a dramatic new take on the Iraq War that focuses more on the personal aspects of war rather than exclusively on combat. With a touching approach to the camaraderie, daily life, and unfortunate losses, this enlightening memoir by Robert M. Tanner delves into the brotherhood that’s formed throughout a deployment while documenting the combat experiences and daily life of a Marine. Using personal experiences, this engaging story hooks readers with drama, action, and honesty while painting an illuminating picture of both the funny and tragic sides of war. 

Inspired by a bond that’s stronger than blood, Memoirs of an Outlaw began as a therapeutic way to document wartime experiences and eventually led to a full-fledged memoir. Deciding to focus on the daily life and camaraderie of war, the story captures the tension, drama, and bonding that comes with combat and living in a hostile environment far away from home. By focusing on the humanistic side of the armed forces, Memoirs of an Outlaw perfectly captures a unique moment in time during an extraordinarily challenging part of the war.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am a former infantryman in the United States Marine Corps. During my time in the military, I was assigned to the Delta Company Outlaws, Second Light Armored Reconnaissance Battalion, Second Marine Division. My travels have taken me from the Mediterranean and Kosovo to Djibouti, the United Arab Emirates, and Fallujah.

Following an honorable discharge from the Marines, I went on to complete my bachelor’s degree in business management from Rowan University, my master’s from Georgian Court University, and finally, another bachelor’s in web design and development from Full Sail University. I began my civilian career as a contract specialist for the United States Army and have worked my way through various positions to finally end up as a business systems analyst with the Department of Veterans Affairs.

I am happily married to my wife, Melissa, and we are the proud parents of two little boys, Joshua and Gavin.
My book, Memoirs of an Outlaw, is finally available on Amazon in either Kindle or Paperback format!  See link below for more details!

If you care to take a look, I've designed a website for the book as well as set up a Facebook page for it.

Website: http://www.memoirsofanoutlaw.com
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/memoirsofanoutlaw
Amazon: http://amzn.com/B00C9DO4HQ

title: A Guide to Eating Disorders
description:
This book will have tips, advice and information about Eating Disorders. We will include helplines, advice chapters, specifics on each ED and more. If you have a request for a chapter, please let us know and we'll accomodate you as best we can.

We are also including a specific set of chapters called the Directory so that you can get in touch with others that can help improve your writing.


#11 in Non-Fiction
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Our aim with this campaign is to provide safe reads that include and may inform about eating disorders as well as increasing recognition of these mental illnesses.

Some of the more widely-known ED's, like Anorexia and Bulimia, are often romanticized in stories, but we hope to create a reading list, or several, where they are treated as what they truly are: a mental illness that you have no control over. We are a pro-recovery campaign.

If you need to talk about ED's or any other problem you may have, our inbox is always open for confidential support.


T O S U P P O R T

To add your book to our campaign, add the tag projecteatingdisorders to your story (to help us find your book, please let us know about it). Feel free to add the stickers as well.

http://i.imgur.com/UfCsaOK.png
http://i.imgur.com/mPUrU3d.png

To be a part of this campaign, simply add #projecteatingdisorders to your profile.


E A T I N G D I S O R D E R S

• BED/Binge Eating Disorder
• OSFED/Otherwise Specified Feeding or Eating Disorder
• Orthorexia Nervosa
• Pica
• Anorexia Nervosa
• Bulimia Nervosa
• Rumination
• Night Eating Disorder
• Purging Disorder
• Prader-Willi Syndrome
• ARFID/Avoidant-Restrictive Food Intake Disorder
• Muscle Dysmorphia
• Diabulimia

title: How to be a Bad Bitch
description:

  #10 in Non-Fiction
   Cover by: @dysanic
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey there! Welcome to my little corner.

My name is Jenny and I have been writing and telling stories since I can remember myself. My first original completed story that was shared in a larger audience other than myself, was written when I was ten and was about mermaids (I was that kid) The first reader/listener was my younger brother.

I write about things that I am passionate about and I love giving advice and helping others out.

If you have something troubling you don't hesitate to PM me, I would love to get to know you.

I am currently working on a book about being a Bad Bitch. This is a word I would like to help change, turn it from something bad to a term that you use to describe someone who knows what they want, who loves themselves and who wants to be the best version of themselves.
If that's something you are interested in reading, check it out!

PM me if you wish, my inbox is always open and ready for you to drop a message.

Look me up on Twitter to find more about me, my obsessions and my books: https://twitter.com/hungrywriterr

Thanks for reading through!

title: Fighting For The Female Alpha (ON PAUSE)
description:
In most wolf stories, every wolf has their own personal mate they are meant to be with, but this story is nothing like that.  

Jezzabelle Johnson is the only child of the 1st alpha out of the 5 most powerful alphas in the world. 

Being the alphas daughter had a lot of complicating things coming with the title alone, but becoming alpha wasn't the hardest thing she had to accomplish. 

The most powerful alpha males besides her father were all gifted with strong and handsome sons, but little did they know they were all going to be fighting for the one and only female alpha. 

What will she do with 4 alpha males after her heart? And if you thought that it was going to stop at wolves going after her, you thiught wrong. 

Add a hybrid, a vampire , a female wolf, a female witch, and also a siren on top of that list.  

Can Jezzabelle survive all these supernatural beings all after her heart? 

(‼️ON PAUSE‼️)

title: Mind Games
description:
Embark on a fascinating journey into the intricate web of human behavior with "Mind Games." This captivating book delves into the subtle yet powerful psychology tricks that shape our day-to-day interactions, decisions, and relationships.

From the art of persuasion to the science of decision-making, each chapter unveils a unique psychological technique, offering readers a toolkit to navigate the complexities of daily life. Discover how the "Mismatch Technique" enhances your persuasive prowess or how the "Scent Association" technique transforms your work environment into a productivity haven.

Explore the intriguing dynamics of human connections through the "Body Language Mirroring" and "Mere Exposure Effect," understanding how subtle cues can influence liking and comfort. Unravel the mysteries of memory with the "Reconstructive Memory Technique" and learn to craft compelling narratives using the "Narrative Transport" approach.

Whether you're negotiating like a pro with the "Anchoring" technique or navigating fears through "Exposure Therapy," "Mind Games" empowers readers to master the subtle art of everyday psychology. Each chapter is a revelation, providing practical insights, real-life examples, and actionable tips to enrich your personal and professional life.

Immerse yourself in the intriguing world of psychology and uncover the secrets that shape our thoughts, actions, and connections. "Mind Games" is your guide to understanding, applying, and mastering the subtle strategies that make the mind tick. Are you ready to play?

🔍 Dive into "Mind Games" and unveil the hidden forces that drive our everyday choices and interactions. Discover the game-changers that can transform the way you navigate the intricacies of the human mind.

title: thoughts of an aromantic
description:
"What's wrong with you?" he asked me. 

There that sentence hung in the air between us, and I remember now how I wasn't looking at him. How instead I looked up at the clouds that seemed to run faster than my thoughts.

"Yeah, there's a word for it," I think I said.

title: Six Hearts, Three Pairs, One Fandom | A Minlout, Heathlegs, and Ruffthrok Book
description:
This is a book of discussion articles dedicated in detailing the three minor non-canon pairings in Dragons: Race to the Edge: Minlout (Snotlout/Minden), Heathlegs (Fishlegs/Heather), and Ruffthrok (Throk/Ruffnut). In this book, we'll discuss the overall summaries of these pairings, their history, their relationship dynamics, and also the general reaction of the pairings from the overall Fandom. We'll also be going into the minute details as to why these pairings should be together, and also why they weren't able to be together in the canon (other than the fact that the TV franchise isn't canon according to DreamWorks).

If you guys are interested in any or all of these pairings, please come and give my book a look and participate and take part in my blog. If you have any suggestions, corrections, additions, etc concerning any of my blogs that I might've forgotten or overlooked, please let me know.

I'll also be posting them on my Tumblr account: minlout3heathlegs3ruffthrok.tumblr.com

title: Love in Progress?
description:
When best friends cross the line between platonic and romantic, everything changes.

After a painful breakup, Seph finds comfort in the unwavering support of his best friend, Ally. As they spend more time together, Seph's feelings begin to shift, seeing Ally in a new, romantic light. But when he impulsively confesses, Seph immediately backtracks, fearing Ally might feel like a rebound and not wanting to jeopardize their friendship. 

Ally has never been one for serious relationships. She's built walls around her heart, easily dismissing potential suitors. But when Seph confesses his growing feelings, Ally finds herself at a critical juncture. For the first time, the thought of rejection feels wrong.

As they navigate this new tension in their relationship, both Seph and Ally must confront their true feelings. Can Seph prove his emotions are genuine and not just a reaction to his recent heartbreak? Will Ally lower her defenses and take a chance on love with her best friend?

"Love in Progress" is a touching exploration of friendship, timing, and the delicate balance between protecting a cherished bond and risking it all for a chance at something deeper.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: With prayer and patience, a hopeless romantic can find true love.

The boy you punched in the hallway today? He committed suicide a few minutes ago.
That girl you just called fat? She is over-dosing on diet pills.
That girl you called a slut? She's a virgin.
That girl you just called ugly? She spends hours putting makeup on, hoping people will like her.
That boy you just tripped? He's abused enough at home.
That boy you just made fun of for crying? His mother is dying.
That man you made fun of for his scars? He fought for your country.
Put this on your profile if you're against bullying.

title: Being Nigerian In A Foreign Country.
description:
These are the tales of a Nigerian girl living in England . . . 
If you are from Nigeria, or from another country in Africa, and you live in a different country i.e. (in Europe or The Americas)  then please take a seat. Maybe grab some popcorn and a drink because you're about to enter a relatable zone. I'm certain you will relate to 99% of what you're about to read.

authorBio:

I enjoy reading fiction. I've also developed a liking for writing too, hence the reason I joined the Wattpad family.

title: All You Need Is Morbid
description:
Join my husband Mason and me as we poke through ossuaries, love hotels, medical museums, old graveyards, and hot new restaurants -- and almost get sacrificed to a volcano. My brand-new memoir, exploring the world from San Francisco to Japan by way of Paris, Prague, and Pompeii, is debuting on Wattpad.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm the co-author of the As Above, So Below series with Brian Thomas. You can read the short story that became the first chapter of Lost Angels on Wattpad. It's called The Angel's Lair.

The newest book in the series, Angelus Rose, went live on Amazon on Valentine's Day 2020.

On my own, I'm the author of 199 Cemeteries to See Before You Die and Wish You Were Here: Adventures in Cemetery Travel. I have a book of cemetery essays on Wattpad called Graveyard Field Trips.

On the fiction side, I am the author of The Dangerous Type, Kill By Numbers, and No More Heroes, a space opera trilogy, published by Night Shade Books. The Star Wars fanfic that inspired those books is on Wattpad.

title: Heloise Holds the Sun ✓
description:
A re-telling of the true 12th century love story of Heloise and Abelard. Abelard is a great philosopher and theologian who has taken, like many academics of the time, a vow of celibacy. When he is hired as a tutor for the brilliant and beautiful Heloise, whose mind he finds is his only true equal, a series of tragic events will spiral. 

━━━━━━━┓ ✠ ┏━━━━━━━━

Taking place in the cloisters of Paris, the affair has grave consequences. They are forced into monastic life - Abelard becoming a monk and Heloise becoming a nun - but their relationship continues in secret. It continues mostly from afar, through a collection of the most beautiful love letters the world has known. They reunite only at the very ends of their lives and, eventually, are buried together in the Père Lachaise Cemetery of Paris. 

The trials this couple face through the relationship that spans their entire lives, and their unending commitment to love in the face of all obstacles, continue to inspire us today.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I write just to express whatever needs to be expressed, sometimes for fun and sometimes because I can't do anything else about what I feel except write it! but if something I create can make you feel something too, that's a bonus :)

title: High School Love🌹✨🌚 (Slow Update)
description:
She was a hot nerd,
He was a cool topper,
She loved all teachers except a few,
He was the favourite of all teachers.
They had almost same interests. 
They both loved same kind of food and songs. 
And most importantly, They both, had feelings for each other.

Experience, for the first time ever, how similar attracts. How, two people, almost same to each other, fall in love, after some time, confess and then seperate due the destiny, but meet again, causing each other to fall in love again. Oh, they didn't stop loving each other ever.

A new story, new concept... which is based on today's situation, yeah, the pandemic...
The pandemic played a huge role in them coming closer...

A few years later, they both were together, after ages of being away!

A twisty story, based on two people who fall in love in their school days, but seperate, and then again meet due to destiny, but this time, to be together forever.


The fact that this story is based on my life makes it even more special✨👉👈

Stay tuned! 💕

title: The Maya diaries: A Tale of Friendship and Growth
description:
When the summer before sophomore year tears her away from her best friend, Maya must navigate the challenges of distance and change. As she starts at a new school, making new friends and creating new memories, she holds on to the hope that her unbreakable bond with her best friend will withstand time and space. Will their friendship remain a constant in her life, or will it fade with the miles between them? Dive into this heartwarming and relatable tale of friendship, growth, and the power of true connection.

authorBio: HI I'M DANIELLE, I LOVE MUSIC ART AND ROMANCE NOVELS, IM A CHRISTIAN AND AN AFRICAN WRITER. I LOVE WRITING BECAUSE ITS FUN AND IT HELPS ME EXPRESS MYSELF IN A MORE DIFFERENT WAY. PLEASE READ MY BOOKS AND GIVE ME AN HONEST FEEDBACK ON IT, THANKS :) 😘🥰😁❤️

title: The Painting
description:
"It took me five seconds to fall. The impact on my chest jarring my body but not my mind. I suppose this is the point where your life is supposed to flash before your eyes as time itself freezes - and it did in a way. But I didn't relive my life physically like walking through an old memory, déjà vu in each step. It was a feeling, something that started in my chest and spread to my fingertips, one so unique to me that it encapsulated each significant event into one single second."
For as long as May can remember one mystery has haunted her world.
A dirty window before her, the grim obstructing her vision, she has lived with a loss she can't identify - that is until one rainy night. 
Gradually the spots of dirt May scratched at for so long wipe away with the touch of a finger. But when she looks in will she like what she sees - or will curiosity kill the cat?

authorBio: Christian Omar Ortiz was born in Bayamon Puerto Rico(March,1 1993). Christian is a writer known for his E-book "The Human Women Guide". He's often referred to as the "WomenGuide". His contributions to helping people and giving advices has led him to be known as a good public figure. Christian began writing in elementary school and wrote a hand written book called "The Way life should be". He graduated from Jane Addams Vocational School in New York City & also studied Women Psychology. Christian in his past encountered many problems.Being abandoned by his own father at a young age and losing his sister. His sister is now deceased. His fascination with women has led him to write his E-book "The Human Women Guide", which released on November 8, 2012. Which guides both men and women with dating and relationships. And gives them a deeper understanding of the male and female mind

title: The Girl In The Box☑️
description:
🌹 COMPLETED🌹

Ame Deal lived in hell, continuously tortured by the ones who were supposed to protect her. 

It was a case that decimated a family, shocked a city, haunted hard-nosed cops, helped overhaul a broken child-welfare system and consumed legal teams for six years. 

It made executioners of stand-in parents, turned a little girl into a prisoner, and a prisoner into a corpse. Her tormentors, in turn, became the prisoners of the state, and now the condemned.

title: The Secret - by Rhonda Byrne
description:
Fragments of a Great Secret have been found in the oral traditions, in literature, in religions and philosophies throughout the centuries. For the first time, all the pieces of The Secret come together in an incredible revelation that will be life-transforming for all who experience it. 

In this book, you will learn how to use The Secret in every aspect of your life - money, health, relationships, happiness, and in every interaction you have in the world. You'll begin to understand the hidden, untapped power that's within you, and this revelation can bring joy to every aspect of your life. 

The Secret contains wisdom from modern-day teachers - men and women who have used it to achieve health, wealth, and happiness. By applying the knowledge of The Secret, they bring to light compelling stories of eradicating disease, acquiring massive wealth, overcoming obstacles, and achieving what many would regard as impossible.

title: Nekomata's Granddaughter
description:
Yasufumi Nekomata, head coach of Nekoma High's boys' volleyball team, introduces his granddaughter to the team. Her name is Meiko, she's soft-spoken and emotionless but is fierce on the court. Meiko strives to please her grandfather with her skills as a talented spiker and her goal is to be an Olympian. Although, reaching for gold is hard when you're not on a team. She finds the girls team weak and not challenging enough for her to improve her skills.


When she meets the team, her first impression is not great. She found she was drawn to Kenma though and soon, they became friends. However, in this friendship, the team's captain came with it. She was scared of Kuroo for a while, but slowly overcame her fear and became friends with him as well.

title: writing 4 𝚠𝚛𝚒𝚝𝚎𝚛𝚜: WRITING ADVICE TO MAKE YOU A BETTER WRITER
description:
Writing is hard. Being a writer is even harder. But with "Writing 4 Writers," you CAN become a better writer. Every time I sit down to write, I reference this collection of writing advice from a variety of blogs, writers, and YouTubers: Jenna Moreci, Abbie Emmons, Alexa Donne, Merphy Napier, E. A. Deverall, Medium Daily Digest, Reedsy, One Stop For Writers, and myself.

From grammar rules to writing hacks to character development, this book reveals the ins and outs of writing - sometimes harsh, sometimes funny, but always honest. Whether you're an aspiring artist working on your first draft or an experienced master in the publishing world, this book has insight and wisdom that can support you at all stages of your writing process.

title: From Wattpad to Published Author - My Journey
description:
In November 2013, I started writing my novel, Summoner: The Novice on Wattpad. I reached 1 Million reads within 4 months and was featured on NBC news. I was offered representation by 6 agents and my trilogy was eventually sold in auctions all over the world. It will be translated into 11 languages and was published in May, 2015. 

One year later, Summoner: The Novice had over 5.5 Million reads.

If you have ever wondered how it happened, look no further. This story details my journey from an amateur Wattpad writer to an internationally published author.

 *** the SUMMONER trilogy will be published in May 2015 by Hodder Children's (Hachette) in the UK, Australia and Commonwealth, Feiwel and Friends (Macmillan) in the US and Canada, Hachette Jeunesse in France, Heyne in Germany, Planeta in Spain, Crown in Taiwan and Record in Brazil. Book 1 will be published by EKSMO in Russia, Jaguar in Poland, Ecliptic in Bulgaria and Alpress in the Czech Republic.***
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My name is Taran Matharu, NYT bestselling author of the Summoner series. I am a 28 year old, London based writer. I started writing at the age of 9 and never stopped. I began writing The Novice on Wattpad at 22 and after reaching several million reads, it was eventually published and translated into 15 languages! The series has now sold 1 MILLION copies in the English language, and counting!

If you want to support my writing, please follow!

You can buy the professionally edited, extended edition of Summoner: The Novice below, with more demons, more lessons and more action! Its sequel, The Inquisition, is also out now!

title: Burnt Starlight: Book of Poetry and Prose
description:
Stars burn through the night like an everlasting glow, impeding the obscure darkness that fights for cover. What if starlight was burned away by the passionate fire of words? What would come of burnt starlight like cookies on a sheet?  I still eat the cookies, do you?


Deep within the character of humans, we all fight for something. We all desire something. May the light of the stars and the power of these words inspire you as they inspire me.

There is no reason why the apocalypse can't be tasty!

title: How to Rise From the Dead on Wattpad - A practical guide to getting noticed
description:
You've got a great story, but no one is reading it! That's because you need to help readers find you. This guide will help you figure out how to... 
- Get more reads or views
- Get more followers
- Increase your influence
- Advertise your story without turning into a pariah
- Become an overall successful writer here on Wattpad

Warning: non-humble bragging ahead...
I'm a Wattpad Star with a story in the Paid Stories program and another story with over a million reads on it, so chances are good that I know what I'm talking about. :)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Watty winner.
Bootcamp Mentor.
Wattpad Originals author.
Kind soul.

I write stories that make people feel good. Whether it's romance, fantasy, or science fiction, you can rest easy knowing I love happy endings.

I accept feedback for all my stories, so if you have any suggestions on how to improve something, or even if you catch a typo somewhere, I'm eager to hear about it! No read requests please, and don't post unsolicited story links on my wall. I'm a nice person, but not a billboard.

A few random facts about me:

☺ I love ice cream.

☺ I love writing more than I love ice cream.

☺ I eat gluten free when I can due to food sensitivities.

☺ I have two little dogs who worship the food I eat.

☺ Sometimes I spend too much time talking about food. Because I like food.

☺ I have a plant in my yard named Sir Wilt-a-Lot.

☺ I once pushed the wheelchair of a homeless man five blocks in the middle of blazing summer so he could get to his bus stop.

☺ I did it again a week later.

☺ Kindness. Pass it on.

Wish you could support me directly? Throw a dollar into my tip jar: https://ko-fi.com/prettybookshelf

Join my email list for updates and occasional giveaways! http://zoeblessing.com/

title: 7 Advanced Tips to Improve Your Wattpad Stories
description:
There are hundreds of fantastic books about writing for hopeful authors to choose from, but most of them are boring, complicated, and bogged down by filler. This little book is brief, straight forward, and easy to understand. I hope it will serve as an easy-to-read manual to help serious writers perfect their craft. I should say right off the bat that I am NOT an expert; I forget my own tips all the time! However, I do know what generally works for me, so I thought I could pass it on to my friends at Wattpad. One last note: this book is for writers who have a basic understanding of grammar and story structure. If you’re interested in more fundamental steps you can take to write a great story, check out the companion to this book!
(CC) Attribution - Pas de Modification
authorBio:
For a ton of new writing tips, check out my new paperback and ebook, Put the Cat In the Oven Before You Describe the Kitchen! https://www.amazon.com/dp/B01CMQNVZK

"I want to offend my readers. I want them to fall in love, to lose their minds, to think and feel and dream. If they're not shellshocked and hungry by the final page, I haven't done my job."

Whether it's a modern-day fairytale or hardcore science fiction, Jake Vander Ark attacks every story with brutal realism and down-to-earth characters. No subject is taboo. Truth is paramount.

The School of the Art Institute of Chicago influenced the experimental quirks of his stories, while his pursuits in Hollywood hammered the importance of traditional storytelling. This unique fusion of structure and innovation gave life to the most beautiful girl in the world in THE ACCIDENTAL SIREN, the gritty morality tale of LIGHTHOUSE NIGHTS, the cryptic prologue of THE BRANDYWINE PROPHET, and the mind-melting climax of THE DAY I WORE PURPLE.

When Jake isn't writing, he's building rustic furniture for his small business, engaging with his readers online, and livin' it up with his dog.

title: A Teenage Girl's Guide To Life
description:
A journey. That is exactly what this book is. A journey back to life. A journey of self-love. A journey overcoming my demons and designing my own life, making it something I have always desired to be. Love, support, and motivation are the main motives of this book. I will try my best to make it as fun and as positive as possible. Hope you come along on this beautiful journey with me.

This is not a fictional book. In this book, I will be talking about A LOT of stuff about life. This previous year has changed my view on life and my mindset to a huge extent and I want to share it with the world. I love writing and therefore, this book is my diary to express my views and for people to understand and talk to me.

I will be posting a chapter every Saturday and Sunday, starting from today. I will talk about my week and in the process address a lot of things that are on my mind. 

I just want to talk to people and learn my opinion and views on life. And of course, tell people about my story and how I overcame the hardest time of my life.

••••

DISCLAIMER:

This book talks about depression, anxiety, and eating disorders. I will be using words like 'calories', 'tears', 'self-hurt, and therefore reader's discretion is advised.

If any of the above makes you uncomfortable or is triggering, I suggest you click off. 

••••

ENJOY!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Hey loves! My name is Sarah Din and I am a romance reader and writer. I am here to write characters and stories for you that will appease your fantasies;) I hope you enjoy my work. If you want to support me, that's really great and it would mean the world to me. Check out my books and let me know what you think. I promise you won't be disappointed! Follow me on Instagram (sarahsbookshelf) and Goodreads (sarahdin) and let's be friends!

title: Five Weeks in the Amazon - #true #story
description:
A Modern Quest for an Ancient Remedy....

If you enjoy a fast-paced read, Five Weeks in the Amazon is the book for you. It's an honest story filled with peaks of humor and valleys of despair. Author Sean Michael Hayes has written a book that many would put on their shelf next to Cheryl Strayed's blockbuster success, Wild. His adventure took him into the middle of the jungle alone, but Hayes unique writing style makes the reader feel as though they are right there with him. Five Weeks in the Amazon is filled with Hayes thoughtful solutions to many of the common problems we all share. Want to find out what happened to a Canadian backpacker who hiked into the Amazon jungle to live with a shaman? 
 
 You can order the paperback version of "Five Weeks in the Amazon" online, just google it! http://amzn.to/1S7edYZ 

Please vote, and follow to help support me and my writing:)
I appreciate all the comments, and can't say enough great things about everyone who supports me.
Thanks again,
Sean

#indie #writer #blog #travel #essay #travelogue #memory #girls #sex #drugs #love

authorBio:
My favorite animal is a Rhinoceros (I saw one in South Africa), although I love Eagles too. They used to nest next to my house where I grew up in Vancouver, Canada. One time I met the president of Tahiti and another time I DJ'd at a club called 'Zoe's on Yellow' in Pai, Thailand... but those stories are neither here nor there - #wattpad is where I keep my favorite work. In the words of Nietzsche, "I am not man, I am dynamite"

title: The billionaire's temptress stepdaughter
description:
"Please cover yourself Pia . . y-you're not supposed to do all these" ~ he said fiercely but his voice sounds hoarsely as if he's been trying to hold back from something.
"oh why Giovanne Andrei? I'm not doing anything wrong..I'm just making my ford take a bath..what's wrong with that?" ~ I pompously exclaimed as I go near him..and tilted my head up in front of his face and so our gaze meet.
I can see how he swallowed hard when his eyes wandered on my lips as I licked and bit it.
He's eyes stayed there for minutes I'm starting to feel the longing for his lips to devour mine. And just a blink of an eye, he grab my waist and kissed me torridly that made me tremble and found my hands clutched to his neck for support. I never did imagine how good the taste of his lips was..its addicting..it ecstatic..you'll always ask for more. 
I was about to answer his kisses when he halted. As if awaken from a deep slumber, he suddenly freed me from his warm embrace. I felt reluctant of his withdrawal.
"You should change now.." ~he said hoarsely without looking at me.
"No. I still want to savour the moment with you" ~ I hugged him from the back. 
He stay still for a while but managed to let go of my embrace.
" pls. Pia go to your room and change your clothes now..your soaking wet"
"okay..you win" ~ I said and plastered a seductive smile, my eyes looking intently to his sweet red lips..I took my steps and as I crossed his way, I give him one swift kiss and nibbled his soft lips. Before he could react..I went away and ran my way to our house.
How happy and victorious I am feeling right now. How could the billionaire's stepdaughter be so naughty with his step dad? Pia..Pia..Pia..you're really such a temptress maldita.. 
I smiled at that :)

title: How to become successful on Wattpad: A beginners guide.
description:
Wondering how some people get so famous on Wattpad? There are certain things that can help you become just as famous. Check them out here.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello, my name is Scott and welcome to my Wattpad profile page!

I first created my Wattpad account in late high school and have been using it since then. I’ve always had the mylifeisaverage username, and, well, the first username isn’t always the one you’re most proud of. However, I’ve had it long enough that I’m not about to change anytime soon.

Because I’ve been on for a few years, just fyi, my old stuff is pretty terrible. New work is definitely more representative of my writing style and I am pretty proud of how far I’ve come as a writer.

Some facts about me: I’m a third year student at Washington State University. Sociology major. I consume media, mostly romance, anime, and young adult fiction that I know I’m gonna hate and read anyway. I’ve traveled quite a bit, the most recent place I went to was Tokyo in November 2013. I used to raise sheep. I’m bisexual. Oh, and I guess I’d like to write books someday.

If you would like me to read your story, please tell me what you liked about my original fiction, a sentence or two summary of your story, and why I’d want to read it. I don’t want to waste my time with people who aren't interested in me as a person. I’m interested in science fiction and fantasy btw. Any requests not following this format will be deleted.

Feel free to offer critique on any of my work, although I’m more likely to listen if you have good credentials. Please don’t hesitate to let me know of any and all grammatical errors.

Please comment or PM if you have any questions. If I’m available, I’ll do my best.

No promos, ever. Don't bother asking.

Milestones:
What's Hot #67
Science Fiction #2
Non Fiction #2

title: Worlds Asunder: A Guide to Building Worlds
description:
Have you always wondered why you're sucked into worlds you have encountered in popular media? Think of realms like the Wizarding World, Westeros, Middle Earth, or the Riordanverse. Are you curious about what makes them inviting and how they're able to get you to be lost inside their universe?

Look no further than this guide. Filled with practical and applied tips on how to bring about worlds that breathe, as well as how to make them come alive in your actual draft, let this manual to building worlds be your companion during the whole excursion. Whether you are a beginner or somewhere in the advanced realm, you are welcome here, as the topics span from the basics to higher level ones.

From the mastermind behind the high fantasy series, 𝘛𝘩𝘦 𝘊𝘩𝘳𝘰𝘯𝘪𝘤𝘭𝘦𝘴 𝘰𝘧 𝘍𝘢𝘯𝘵𝘢𝘴𝘪𝘭𝘪𝘢, and the award-winning novella, 𝘒𝘰𝘭𝘪𝘣𝘳𝘪𝘦, this self-help manual may just help you in creating engaging worlds that's entirely out of your imagination. Test your limits. Let creativity flow.

It's time to build worlds.

˜"°•.˜"°•˜"°•.˜"°•˜"°•.˜"°•

© 2023 (First Edition)

NOTICE: This is a developing guide. Updates are sporadic, so add this book to your private library to be notified whenever a new article is updated.

[All graphics are made by @sardonictabby]

title: The Art of Pain | A True Story by Daphne Fae
description:
This true story began in 2014 on the last day of Daphne's diploma course in Singapore Polytechnic. Thinking that the best time of her life was about to begin at 21 years old, a twist of events plunged her into years of pain and despair. Follow Daphne's journey as she deals with her chronic illness, broken friendships, family issues, and mental struggles through her twenties.

Disclaimer: This story is written based on the author's present recollections of past events. Some names have been changed to protect their identity, some dialogues have been recreated, and some events have been compressed in non-chronological order.

title: grave (මිනීවළ)(bl , Non Fiction )
description:

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind by Yuval Noah Harari
description:
"Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind" by Yuval Noah Harari is a fascinating exploration of the history of our species, Homo sapiens, from the emergence of our species in Africa to the present day. The book covers a wide range of topics, including the Cognitive Revolution, the Agricultural Revolution, the development of empires and civilizations, the role of religion and ideology, the impact of technology and globalization, and the future of humanity.

Harari argues that the key to the success of Homo sapiens lies in our ability to create and believe in imagined realities, such as gods, nations, and money, which have enabled us to cooperate in large groups and build complex societies. He explores how these imagined realities have shaped human history and continue to influence our world today.

"Sapiens" is written in a clear and engaging style, making complex ideas and concepts accessible to a wide audience. Harari's insights into the nature of humanity and the forces that have shaped our world are thought-provoking and enlightening, inviting readers to consider their place in the broader sweep of history.
Attribution Creative Commons (CC)

authorBio:
"Being transgender is not just a medical transition, it's discovering who you are, living your life authentically, loving yourself, and spreading that love towards other people and accepting one another no matter their difference." -Jazz Jennings

A B O U T
#YouCanPeeNextToMe is an account founded by @leesbian, @BAUdemiwitch and @amorphagi after the recent erasure of trans bathroom law in the US to make a safe place for all transgender people and promote trans literature, a highly underappreciated area of writing. We are trying to spread a message of hope and love during such an awful point for transgender individuals.

The three of us also want to help answer any questions you may have about gender identity. Message or comment any questions you have.

Add the hashtag #YouCanPeeNextToMe to your story tags if you have transgender characters, and we will add the story to our reading list as soon as possible.

Lee | @leesbian | lesbian | genderfluid | any pronouns

title: The Life of an Introvert
description:
If you're one of the quiet kids, and you like it that way, then you're not alone.

So, what even is an introvert, you ask?  Most of you probably heard this word at least once before. My guess is that if you have heard the word introvert, you may have heard it used to describe someone in a negative way. You might know an introvert as someone who is quieter or not as outgoing, but there is a little more to it than that. 

People often mistake introversion as shyness, social anxiety, or a mental illness, but introversion is actually none of these things. It is simply a personality trait. 

You can be an introvert and still be a happy, confident person. A lot of well-known people were introverts, like Einstein, Abe Lincoln, Eleanor Roosevelt, Rosa Parks, and even Lady Gaga (Yes, I said Lady Gaga). 

This book focuses on what my experiences as an introvert have been so far, and the positives of being an introvert. It also gets into some psychology and mental health. Coming from a shy person, I also hope to talk about how to deal with shyness and build self confidence, even though being shy and introverted aren't exactly the same thing. So come join the party!

*Ahem* Sorry. I meant to say, come join the small, quiet gathering.
Tous Droits Réservés

My real name isn't actually Cam Mills. But I was 13 when I made this account, and my parents were convinced that people who knew my real name online could steal my passport.

I write because it's a major stress reliever, and also because I've always loved to tell stories

title: Forbidden Love
description:
My name is Tommy Frank. Five years of serving time in a place where time itself loses all meaning. I never expected anything beyond the monotonous routine. Each day blurred into the next-cold concrete, the dull echo of footsteps, and the heavy silence that filled the air. I had long since accepted that this was my life, that nothing would ever change. But then, something shifted. In the midst of my captivity, I found myself faced with a feeling I never thought I'd experience again-something I couldn't ignore, something I couldn't name. And suddenly, everything felt different. This time, it wasn't just about serving my sentence anymore. There was something else... something unexpected. Something that made me question everything.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Kia ora, love! ❤️
Welcome to my world, where words flow from the heart and ideas bloom from the soul. I'm Dina Mazlan, a writer who's deeply inspired by the quiet moments that stir creativity. I find beauty in the randomness of life, in the poetry of everyday existence-each thought, each feeling, each fleeting moment is a canvas for my imagination.

Poetry has always been my companion, my way of expressing the unspoken truths, the hidden emotions, and the whispers of the heart. Whether I'm inspired by a song, a passing thought, or a deep conversation, I write to make sense of the world around me. My poetry is often a reflection of my own emotional journey-a dance between vulnerability and strength, between love and loss, between connection and solitude.

I am someone who is deeply in touch with my feelings, constantly seeking to understand the deeper connections that weave through life. I believe in the power of spirituality to guide us, to help us heal, and to open doors to a more profound understanding of ourselves and others. It's in this space of exploration that I connect with like-minded souls-those who are on their own paths of discovery, growth, and self-awareness.

In a world that can sometimes feel disconnected, I find solace in sharing my thoughts with others who understand the value of true connection. This page is a space where I can share my poetry, my musings, and my personal experiences. It's where words become more than just ink on paper; they become a bridge between hearts, a conversation without boundaries, a way to feel understood.

So, welcome to my page. I'm glad you're here. Let's connect on a deeper level, explore the layers of life, and celebrate the moments that make us feel alive. 🌿✨

title: A to Z of Scoliosis: Causes & Treatments
description:
This book of facts has everything you need to know about scoliosis, whether you have the condition, or just want to learn more about it. Most people in the world have scoliosis--up to 470 to 5200 per 100,000 individuals across the globe. It is the most common spinal deformity. 
In this book, you will learn about the types of scoliosis, its causes, risk factors, diagnostic tests, and treatments...including the prognosis of the overall condition. I hope you enjoy reading!

Bio:

My favorite bands are Shinedown, Starset, Nothing More, Falling In Reverse, Halestorm, In This Moment, and The Pretty Reckless (yes, I know it's a lot, lol 😂). Mostly I love rock music, but I listen to any type of genre like jazz or even reggae.
Feel free to read my books. I hope my autobiography inspires you and that it'll have you looking at life in a different light. I also have published my autobiography on many other platforms, such as www.barnesandnoble.com, Apple Books, Google Overdrive, and more. Price is $15.50 per copy. 😊
