title: The Great Controversy
description:
The Great Controversy between Christ and Satan, as a historical drama covers the Reformation, Enlightenment and Awakening, culminating in modernity. All humanity is embattled in the conflict between good and evil, regarding God's identity, character and sovereignty. Originating in heaven with Lucifer, who in self-exalting pride became Satan, this Arch-Adversary deceived the angels, introducing the spirit of rebellion. This fall from grace provoked the disorder of creation and the perversion of man's nature. To many, the roots of evil are a source of great perplexity. They question how it can exist under the One who is infinite in wisdom, power, and love. However, the greatest delusion comes with the Antichrist. Packed with riveting and ennobling biographies, this text equips all to combat the counterfeit and stand fast for truth.
Tous Droits Réservés

authorBio:
❃ Wattpad Picks Featured ❃ Multiple Award Winner ❃ Published Author ❃

The daughter of a reverend of modest means, E A Carter grew up in the Canadian countryside with only a bicycle, her cat, and her imagination to keep her occupied.

Inspired by the fantastical, magical worlds of Tolkien, C.S. Lewis, and Hans Christian Andersen, she began writing her own fantasy-based stories set in past times at the age of 13.

Today, her books are a unique blend of romance, fantasy, and historical fiction. Many of her characters are real persons of history - princesses, priests, warriors, kings, and queens, all carefully researched and brought back to life in immersive plotlines that span empires.

So far, her readers seem to love her unique retellings of the past. Her books have won numerous awards, including from Writer's Digest.

title: How the Mystery Ends
description:
27-year-old Angela Nicole is the divorced mother of a 2-year-old girl named Emma Nicole. Angela works as an LAPD detective; her ex-husband works in the same facility but as a SWAT team.  

 

   One day she was tasked with investigating the death of a young girl. After arriving at the scene of the girl's death, she saw firefighters putting out a fire near the girl's apartment where the girl was found dead. When she asked the fire department what had happened, she found out that the fire was set up to destroy the evidence. 

 

 And fire did destroy most of the evidence 

  

On that case, she met a 30-year-old man named Thiago Anderson. He's an NYPD detective who's been sent to investigate the case because such a case hasn't happened in many years. Thiago is a very smart detective one of the best in the whole U.S. while on the other side Angela is not so good at the job because of the whole situation with her ex-husband who is good friends with her boss. This case has become a great mystery.

title: Frank's Guide To Love
description:
What does it mean to love deeply and authentically? How can we nurture meaningful connections without losing ourselves?

In Frank's Guide to Love, discover a poetic and transformative exploration of love in all its forms-romantic, self, and universal. Using the life cycle of a flower as a powerful metaphor, this guide reveals the profound lessons hidden in every stage of love's journey: from the delicate beginnings of the seed to the radiant bloom and the inevitable withering that teaches resilience and renewal.

Through poetic insights, actionable exercises, and reflective prompts, this book empowers readers to:

Cultivate self-love as the foundation for all relationships.

Navigate the challenges of conflict, imperfection, and change with grace.

Build meaningful connections rooted in trust, respect, and mutual growth.

Embrace the fleeting beauty of love while finding strength in its cycles.


Whether you're seeking to deepen your current relationships, heal from heartbreak, or rediscover the beauty of love itself, Frank's Guide to Love offers wisdom and practical tools to nurture your heart and the hearts of those around you.

Love is not perfect, but it is profound. Are you ready to embark on a journey of growth, connection, and self-discovery?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Frank Makha Ojiam is a Kenyan author, filmmaker, and creative visionary with a passion for storytelling that bridges personal experiences, folklore, and universal themes. Known for works like Ephemeral Hearts and the upcoming Legacy of Stone, his writing explores the complexities of love, resilience, and cultural identity.

With a background in Drama, Theatre, Film, and Music Studies, combined with Computer Information Technology from Maseno University, Frank blends artistic creativity with technical expertise to craft immersive narratives. He is also a musician and public speaker, dedicated to uplifting Kenyan folklore and mythology through his work.

When he's not writing or producing, Frank focuses on building his music and film production company, TCM Republic, and envisions making a lasting impact on society through his creativity, charity, and commitment to empowering others.

မိခင်ဖြစ်သူက​ဆေးရုံအုပ်ဖြစ်ပီး​ဆောက်လုပ်​ရေးပိုင်ရှင်မိသားစုမှ​ပေါက်ဖွားလာတဲ့ တစ်ဦးတည်း​သောသားမာန်ရာတိချီ ​ အလိုလိုက်အချစ်ခံရတဲ့သူ​ဌေးသား​လေးကမာနကြီးပီး အသန့်ကြိုက်တက်လွန်းသူ ​ လေးပီပီ ​ဆေးတက္ကသိုလ်သွားဘက်ဆိုင်ရာဆရာဝန်​လေးတစ်​ယောက်မိခင်ဖြစ်သူနှင့်နယ်မြို့​လေးကိုအလည်သွားခဲ့အခါ ဧရာ ​လေးနဲ့ဘယ်လို​တွေ့ဆုံမလဲ  သွားဆရာဝန်

So, you thought I had finally bothered to upload a book? Well... That's still being written.

Anyway, allow me to introduce myself:
I am Enya Small (just a pen name). I have written on this site before but that was all fanfiction and not very well written, so I deleted them. I am still in high school but am aspiring to become a published author (I swear the books will come!).

I don't mind feedback on what I have written, but feedback with no way to improve will be deleted/ignored. Also, please point out any spelling or grammar mistakes :)

~*~
Don't you just hate it when you really want to start a book but are too afraid to do it? Yeah, that's me a lot of the time.
~*~

If your willing to make a new profile picture/banner for me, PM me and we can work something out. I also don't take reading requests or do follow backs.

title: Voices Are Sick
description:
They, all seated in the crowd, they judged me. 
Having no idea of what it meant to stay there, to stay at the top of what you do, well, because competition is what I've lived for, I've thrived for competition, they despised me, because I could do things they could only fantasise about. 
I've loved to remain there, within people, at the same spot, but, when the oppurtunity steps up, I step up, I unlock myself, I sense, I hear, I see the proximity, I launch myself, when the adrenaline strikes from my head, to my veins as if, I strike.
Preachers I say are sinners, the doctors go guilty, buses I fire, politicians seem liars, in my own vision.
I see darkness falling, faith calling, justice falling, I hear those voices, to me, they guide the torch with, they teach me. 
Things will go defenseless, if you take the guard.
They are there, the voices, all you need to do, is listen to them. For they guide you, they join you, they can screw you. 
I say voices are crazy, I say voices are sick.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I've had this devil whispering to me, when I was a little kid.
Some day, I just saw a different light within these eyes. I sensed, I waited, I struck.
I still do. I'm nothing, but a viper.

title: True Stories and Confessions from an Aro/Ace teen
description:
Hello, my name's Maddy. I've identified as aromantic asexual since I was 14. I've found a lack of proper media attention towards my sexuality recently, and I've decided to share my story. My hopes are that one day people won't have to go through what I did to find out who they are. You're special no matter who you are. 

Note, some of these stories happened as far away as 10 years ago. I was fairly young when some happened, so I don't remember every detail. I'm going off my memories.

title: when you walked in | D.S. Whitlock
description:
𝘽𝙖𝙨𝙚𝙙 𝙤𝙣 𝙢𝙮 𝙨𝙤-𝙘𝙖𝙡𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙬𝙞𝙨𝙩𝙚𝙙 𝙡𝙞𝙚𝙨...

Daxon Whitlock wasn't the life of the party. He hated the idea of sweaty Homo sapiens and cheap beer over ear-splitting music. 

Until she walked in.

Dax had never seen a more beautiful pair of eyes in his life than this pair on any person's face. It was true; the first thing he noticed were her eyes. They were big and brown, her eyelashes were long and her eyebrows were perfect and arched. 

To him, she was perfect.

She may not have thought so, but he did. 

Tal Kanaan valued her own feelings more than a badger valued sticks and twigs. After multiple fumbles with her past boyfriends, she'd sworn to never lend her heart to easily to a man. 

Until she met Dax.

He wasn't good at this love thing. He never was. The last thing he wanted was to fuck up and hurt this girl's feelings. As the two trip and fall into this never-ending spiral of love-in which they both try desperately to get out of-Tal finds herself getting tangled in her feelings about Dax. 

After the mixed signals and push-to-pulls from Tal, Dax finds himself praying and hoping he won't be the one left falling.

---

Please don't judge I already have enough critics 😭
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Just a really grumpy guy who's in love w his ex girlfriend.

Too in love. It's unhealthy.

title: Castle in the sky after story
description:
This story castle in the sky has been invented before,by Hayao Miyazaki. And the movie also belongs to studio Glibly,since I am the number one fan of castle in the sky I dedicate this story/book to mr. Miyazaki. But this story is invented by me so please don't get the wrong idea,castle in the sky after story is a fairy tale mixed with a love story too. And in the original movie was all about this place called laputa and a young girl named Lusheeta is the missing princess but she has a very valuable necklace that has many powers but she has been captured by the government's secret agent but when she try's to escape she accidentally fall out of the plane! But as she falls her necklace glows and saves her that's when she runs into a young boy named Pazu and later in the movie they both fall in love and the bottom   breaks into pieces and they both fly home together but Pazu and sheeta are both orphans. So I decided to continue  the story for Mr. Miyazaki please enjoy my book/story.

title: Things You Can Expect from Wattpad
description:
Unlike other guidebooks I've written, this won't be a guidebook so it won't be about tips. This will instead be about what you could encounter during your stay on Wattpad, especially if you're new. Now this won't talk about EVERYTHING I've encountered, but mostly the stuff that's happened to me or what I can remember. And no, this isn't a rant book, so click off if that's what you were expecting it to be.
Although it does have a few storytimes here and there.....
Word count is 12K words.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A big kid who's a young adult still in the process of growing up. I legitimately don't feel any different than I did in high school.
I really gotta put some more emotion in my comments....
Currently trying to edit my published stories because I've hit a block. Very few of my stories have been edited at the moment. Thanks to anyone who reads my stories, adds my stories to your reading lists, votes on my stories, comments, or does all of these! I do mean that. Thanks! Been on here for 8 years. I (currently) follow anyone who follows me and unfollow whoever unfollows me, but it could take a while. I won't always follow back right away since I might not be online when originally followed. I would say I'm in limbo between being a kid and adult. Man, time really flies....and in my experience on here, one thing you should know is that this site can get really strange sometimes.
I like to make stories, but I don't make as many as I used to.
I'm also on FF.net, but I'm much more active on here. I just upload some stories of mine on there with the occasional exclusive.
I also don't like being asked to read stories or update my own so don't ask me for that. Every post about that on my message board or PM will be deleted. I have an updating schedule.

Just for fun accounts:
@KiraFuzumi
@YukiTachibanna
@DaichiKaratsuh
That's all.
I mainly use these to write stuff that I wouldn't write here and other stuff. You don't have to follow them, since like I said, they're just for fun. I'm not sure if they should have their own writing style.
I believe in God.

title: How to Write Stories People Will Love
description:
If you're a writer struggling to improve your craft, this book can help. It breaks down the basics of a good story and good writing. It'll also provide a few tips on how to stay motivated. There's no magical formula for instantly likable stories, but you can lay a strong foundation for a future full of writing that fulfills you. Success starts in your head.
    
A blend of helpful tips and "chicken soup" for your writer soul.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Watty winner.
Bootcamp Mentor.
Wattpad Originals author.
Kind soul.

I write stories that make people feel good. Whether it's romance, fantasy, or science fiction, you can rest easy knowing I love happy endings.

I accept feedback for all my stories, so if you have any suggestions on how to improve something, or even if you catch a typo somewhere, I'm eager to hear about it! No read requests please, and don't post unsolicited story links on my wall. I'm a nice person, but not a billboard.

A few random facts about me:

☺ I love ice cream.

☺ I love writing more than I love ice cream.

☺ I eat gluten free when I can due to food sensitivities.

☺ I have two little dogs who worship the food I eat.

☺ Sometimes I spend too much time talking about food. Because I like food.

☺ I have a plant in my yard named Sir Wilt-a-Lot.

☺ I once pushed the wheelchair of a homeless man five blocks in the middle of blazing summer so he could get to his bus stop.

☺ I did it again a week later.

☺ Kindness. Pass it on.

Liz is a senior in high school and can't wait to get out of there.

He was the jock of the school and the most popular, handsome guy there. That was until he got blind.

title: DIFFERENT    CULTURE      DIFFERENT     FOOD
description:
Where would you like to go today? 
To the Gwangjang Market of Seol (Korea) and try the famous savory pancake Bindaetteok? Cape town mayhaps (South Africa)? I've heard that their street food is to die for. Or maybe to the Andhra style restaurants of Chennai (India)?

Or what if, you were to bring these places to your kitchen and fill your home with the sweet, spicy and savory aromas of world's most delicious (yet easy to make) dishes?

Here I present, a collection of recipes for all those food lovers who love the blend of food and culture.

So cook, feed and enjoy the taste of cuisines from around the world!

authorBio:
Welcome to Non-Fiction!


Non-Fiction is a broad genre of writing that encompasses all books that aren't rooted in a fictional narrative. Non-Fiction writing can be based in history and biography, it can be instructional, it can offer commentary and humor, and it can ponder philosophical questions. If a book is not rooted in a made-up story, then it is nonfiction.

title: A Real Love Triangle
description:
Three girls.  Many crushes.  An actual love triangle instead of simply a heteronormative love angle.  Disclaimer:  this is going to be a highly dramatized account of a real-life love triangle between my younger sister and two other girls.  I will be writing this as the events unfold.  I do not support writing things involving real people without their permission, and I want to make sure everyone knows that they will NOT be identified in a way that could identify them in real life, the events presented will be a major dramatization based off of events, not the actual events, and though I will accept questions about the validity of events if this story grows popular enough and people care, I WILL NOT give any personally identifying information.  Also, although this should be obvious the story will remain pg, MAYBE pg-13 in some parts, but there will be ABSOLUTELY NO smut.

authorBio:
🔆Welcome to The Nano Watt profile, 🔆 an award profile created to celebrate the brilliant stories and authors on the orange app. This award was founded to loosely replicate the annual Watty Awards but on a much smaller scale, (hence the name nano), but nevertheless aims to empower writers who may not have won or never will get the chance to win an award in the vast competition that is The Wattys.

Therefore, each year from the months of April to November @TheNanoWatt hosts its own annual award ceremony which accepts ~1000 submissions from users with the aim of crowning approximately 100 of those submissions, winners.

title: help! I created a Mary Sue! [ENGLISH]
description:
[ Guide for how to create an OC ]


Having problems creating your OC (original character)?
Are you done with cliche characters with no essence?
Sick and tired of your character being treated like a Mary Sue?

Well say no more, I got the solution for you!

Often in the writing process, problems that are associated with the characters that populate the worlds we create on the pages of books may arise, such as disinterest and unreality.

With this guide I present you with some tips on how to create or improve your characters, from small things like a simple name to the influence of the OC in the plot and in the environment that surrounds it.

So sit down, relax and enjoy your guide for a good OC!

title: BROKEN
description:
... And to my uncle, I wrote:
 
Dear Uncle,
 
I'm an adult now. You must be happy with your new life. And your wife? I hope you're treating her well. I heard you now have a girl child like the one you molested thirteen years ago. She must be as beautiful as I was. Do you touch her the way you touched me? Have you told your wife about what you did to me? I'm broken, no thanks to you. Your one act created monsters in me that I can't let go of, and the more I try to let go of them, the more they multiply. You must have been very happy to see me cry, right? The hideous beasts you created come every day to remind me that I can't keep a relationship. Thank you for all you did. You left me with a childhood as terrible as you. I hope I can forgive myself and then forgive you, too. Don't worry, this letter won't get out. I'd protect you, monster!
 
I smiled in tears as I dropped my pen and buried my head in between my legs...

title: Wayward: Fetching Tales from a Year on the Road
description:
Wayward: Fetching Tales from a Year on the Road is a hilarious and heartfelt ride around the world, wherein the author eats dog, obsesses about chewing gum, gets stranded on an island, does dirty things, reveres rock n roll and muses about everything from death to Star Trek to the President Obama to jail time.

Now available on Wattpad, Wayward has been a surprise hit at both iTunes and Amazon, reaching #1 on both retailers' travel charts.  It chronicles a year in the life of the author, who lived in 12 countries over 12 months, one month at a time.  It's kind of funny, kind of sad and kind of weird.

Forbes describes the book:

"Wayward isn’t strictly a travelogue or a guide by any means. The book reads like a diary, with chapters dedicated to everything from watching Obama’s inauguration in an Argentinian bar, to viewing a dubbed version of the newest Star Trek film in France and trying to understand the plot despite not speaking French, to remembering the ecstasy and pain of his first love just before breaking up with his then-boyfriend in Berlin, to eating dog in Vietnam, to his experience working with Patti Smith in New York. Gates’ lively, conversational writing style bring all the disparate pieces together for an engaging, enjoyable read."
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am a slightly warped writer, based in Los Angeles.  I started writing a few years ago while on a trip around the world and quickly discovered that a) a good portion of travel writing is crap and if you write travel from a genuine place, it works  b) i had this twisted voice that people gravitated towards c) i was suppressing this talent that I didn't know I even had. 

Now I write all kinds of stuff.  I've written about sushi and 9/11 and coming out and superheroes and condiments and airplanes and Def Leppard and AIDS and Star Trek and food trucks.  I try to get out of the way and not censor what is coming out of my brain, for better or for worse.

I self-released a book about the trip which has been #1 on iTunes' and Amazon's travel sections. I don't say that in an arrogant way, I say it in a Holy Shit way.   It's as much a memoir about my weird life as it is about the trip.   I've posted it on Wattpad for anyone to check out. It's called Wayward: Fetching Tales from a Year on the Road.  

I'm now working on a Young Adult book called The Spotlight, which is being revealed on Wattpad. The rapidness of this reveal will be a directly result of how lazy I am at the moment.

If you put a gun to my head and asked me what my favorite books are, before crying a lot I'd blurt out:  Shantaram, A Prayer for Owen Meany, Will Grayson Will Grayson, High Fidelity, Perks of Being a Wallflower, The Stand, The Mosquito Coast, A Heartbreaking Work of Staggering Genius, A Supposedly Fun Thing I'll Never Do Again, The Count of Monte Cristo, Perfume and Vurt.

title: RMS Olympic - More Than a Memory
description:
RMS Olympic was a British transatlantic ocean liner, the lead ship of the White Star Line's trio of Olympic-class liners. Unlike her younger sister ships, Olympic had a long career, spanning 24 years from 1911 to 1935. This included service as a troopship during the First World War, which gained her the nickname "Old Reliable". Olympic returned to civilian service after the war and served successfully as an ocean liner throughout the 1920s and into the first half of the 1930s, although increased competition, and the slump in trade during the Great Depression after 1930, made her operation increasingly unprofitable. 

Olympic was the largest ocean liner in the world for two periods during 1911-13, interrupted only by the brief tenure of the slightly larger Titanic (which had the same dimensions but higher gross tonnage owing to revised interior configurations), before she was then surpassed by SS Imperator. Olympic also retained the title of the largest British-built liner until RMS Queen Mary was launched in 1934, interrupted only by the short careers of her slightly larger sister ships.[2][3]

By contrast with Olympic, the other two ships in the class, Titanic and Britannic, did not have long service lives. On the night of 14/15 April 1912, Titanic collided with an iceberg in the North Atlantic and later sank on her maiden voyage, claiming more than 1,500 lives; Britannic struck a mine and sank in the Kea Channel (Greece) in the Mediterranean on 21 November 1916, killing 30 people.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: When I Couldn't Talk: A True Story
description:
When I was in middle school, I couldn't talk. I could talk at home, but not in school. 

When I was in high school, I could barely talk. I could talk at home, but I couldn't talk in school unless someone else talked to me first. 

I didn't know I had an anxiety disorder called Selective Mutism. So, this is my experience.

title: The Book of Astral Projection
description:
An informative book based upon astral projection. Astral projection (or astral travel) is an interpretation of an out-of-body experience (OBE) that assumes the existence of an "astral body" separate from the physical body and capable of travelling outside it. Astral projection or travel denotes the astral body leaving the physical body to travel in an astral plane, in this book I explain all of the aspects of Astral Projection.

title: Always Been with You
description:
Bakit ba apaka taray mo sakin? Kala ko ba may gusto ka sakin? Papaakbay akbay ka pa dyan, makikipag holding hands ka pa tapos tataray tarayan mo lang ako? Diba dapat mabait ka sakin kasi gusto mo ko?" Sabi niya sa akin, hala? Problem neto? Alam kong uso ngayon ang gawing confidence booster at gawing validation ang pag kakagusto ng isang bakla sa isang lalake, pero parang sumobra naman pagka conceited nitong isang toh?

"And so? Sino ka ba? Gusto lang kita, bakit ako magiging mabait sayo, gusto mo ba ako? Hindi diba, so manahimik ka dyan"

authorBio:

I haven't posted here in years, and most of what is on my profile is stuff I wrote as a kid. So it's more of an archive now

I write because it's a major stress reliever, and also because I've always loved to tell stories

Some of my favorite books: Hoot, To Kill a Mockingbird and The Book Thief

I'll leave you with a bit of parting wisdom: Drink lots of coffee. It helps you do stupid stuff faster and with more energy

Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Go follow my blog.  www.thealvarezchronicles.com

Studies show that people who follow my blog have a better sex life. True story.

I just like to write.  I am a former homicide detective with a lot of stories to tell. If you stick around you will read real stories about what it is really like to be a detective. How cases are really solved and the toll they take on everyone around them.  I think those stories will surprise you. But you will also read stories about many other things.  Childhood memories, on being a father, on life in general. Stick around and you might just learn more than you thought you could.

If you get a chance take a look at my story "The Body", about a murder case I worked. Or check out my "Convict Chronicles" which contains many short stories about people I have met during my career in law enforcement. Or if you want to laugh check out "Blonde Moments". That's an ongoing series about crazy things that my daughter says. You won't believe most of it. And finally if you just want to see what life here on Wattpad is like check out "Chasing Wattpad". Thanks for dropping by and I hope you have a good experience here.

I have no interest in publishing professionally (not that anybody would read me). Though to be honest I don't know if I tell myself that just to take the pressure off writing, or because it is really true. Who knows? It's  a mystery. Whatever the case, that works for me right now.

Here are some of my favorite quotes:

"Find time to write. But not so much that you do not have the time to experience something worth writing about." - ME

"Life is tough. It's even tougher when you're stupid." - John Wayne

"Sometimes it's the people no one imagines anything of who do the things that no one can imagine." - from the movie Imitation Game

"The most beautiful things in life cannot be seen or even touched, they must be felt with the heart." - Helen Keller

title: Books and ME.
description:
This is not a book review segment. This is a segment where I would be talking about my experiences with the books I have read. I would not be talking about whether the book is good or bad, worth reading or not.

 I would be just talking about how was my experience reading the book. You can call it 'MY EXPERIENCES WITH.'  I would try to talk about my experiences with the rare and some less unheard books. 

I would try to post a chapter every week. Let's hope for the best. Until then, Be Safe and keep on reading. Cheers.

If you are reading this story on any other platform other than Wattpad you are very likely to be at risk of a malware attack.  If you wish to read this story in its original, safe, form, please go to https://www.wattpad.comhttps://www.wattpad.com/user/Patnaik87.  Thank you.

title: Mother's Day At The Orphanage: Stories Without A Home
description:
Mother's Day At The Orphanage is collection of semi-autobiographical short stories about odd jobs, fake businesses, mistaken identities, close shaves, and near misses, written by David Leigh Abts and Michael Shattuck, edited by Leslie Blodgett, and with the Foreword by Courtney Taylor-Taylor (Frontman of The Dandy Warhols).  It is also a collaboration with guest NYC authors and Baltimore/D.C. artists - a chance for a bunch of friends who dig each other's creative work to get together and put something out, and asks the following burning questions.

Has Art Garfunkel ever taken your putt-putt club?  

Was Michael Jackson the focus of your middle school science fair project?

Have you ever tried to coax a moth out of your ear with a lamp?

[New chapters every Friday]

title: Scars on Steel
description:
A letter to the world.

#lovesimon
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I've been writing for as long as I can remember. It started when I started writing alternate endings for the Sweet Valley books I read as a kid when I didn't like how they ended.  I remember writing with pencil on spiral notebooks during class in high school for years. It was painful but it was the only way to keep writing without the teacher knowing. I wouldn't recommend it to anyone but that was how obsessed I was. Those books passed hands within our class, then our school and then around different schools until people started to randomly message me and ask for the next part. Wattpad is like the grown-up and much more convenient version of that experience. LOL!

Anyway, as for what I write, I've finally come out after all these years and I can say with pride that I write romance. There's nothing more fun for me to write about love and all its quirks and complications.

That's what you'll find in my Works and on my reading lists.

If you'd like to follow me along for updates and other random thoughts, find me on Instagram @ninyatippettwrites.

You can also check out my Skillshare class if you ever need some input on writing: skl.sh/ninya

Happy reading!

authorBio:
Tempering the rising flames of writers to reach their brightest blaze.

We are a community for both writers and readers looking to improve their craft, explore new worlds, and to form friendships. All are welcome!

Here we aim to provide a safe space for people of all backgrounds to bond over literature. Share your stories for the world to see. Check out our members' stories in our reading lists to find your next obsession. Keep an eye out for contests, clubs, and other opportunities to engage with the community.

Our Discord server is also a great place to connect with other Wattpad users, along with writers on other platforms and publishing paths: https://discord.gg/authors

We no longer affiliate with other communities, but we may be open to occasional promotions for promotions. DM us to find out more!

We do NOT accept work written by AI as a representation of our community; this includes in our reading lists and contests. Please do not submit AI-assisted work to anything in our community.

Use the hashtag #AstaniaBooks or #AstaniaCommunity on your stories to show you're a part of our community!

Curious? Take a look around our profile or Carrd, and we hope you can find a home with us in the wonderful world of Astania!

Please note: If you message us on our message board without a specific question or comment regarding the community, we will likely not respond.

Account primarily run by @laurendoubleu.

title: Elvis and Priscilla: A Love Story Beyond the Spotlight
description:
Elvis and Priscilla: A Love Story Beyond the Spotlight delves into the captivating and complex relationship between Elvis Presley and Priscilla Beaulieu Presley. From their serendipitous meeting in Germany during Elvis's military service to their glamorous yet tumultuous years together, this book offers an intimate look at their journey through love, fame, and personal struggle.

Through ten meticulously crafted chapters, the book explores the highs and lows of their marriage, detailing the challenges posed by Elvis's soaring career and the pressures of public scrutiny. It examines their life at Graceland, the strains that led to their separation, and the subsequent paths they took in their personal and professional lives.

With rich narrative detail and a deep understanding of their individual and shared experiences, Elvis and Priscilla provides a thoughtful reflection on their enduring legacy. It captures not only the romance that once captured the world's imagination but also the realities of navigating love in the limelight. This book offers readers a profound and nuanced portrait of one of Hollywood's most iconic couples.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a writer and I love to express my love for historical stuff that has happened in the past. Come along the journey and enjoy the stories I have provided. Hopefully they make you feel the same as they make me feel. Happy Reading!


Elvis Fan ⚡️
History Nerd 🌎

title: The Spark Transfer
description:
Sarai lives a life of adventure and strives to achieve moral goodness. She believes that the only way to make a difference in life is to create a message that will have a lasting impression on those around you.

The government has certainly taken note of the 'messages' that she and her friends anonymously leave for all to see. 
The government is doing something secretive, and Sarai wants to help reveal whatever the officials are hiding. Eventually, she and her friends unintentionally manage to get large amounts of people to protest against the government's careless and secretive means of running the state.

Despite the serious issues she involves herself in, Sarai is in love with simply living. Life doesn't need to be all figured out for her, and she is grateful for her ability to make the present exciting and interesting.

But then she starts to feel strange.

She hides the pain she constantly feels from those around her. She refuses to let her suffering change who she is and stop her from doing what she loves.

Only Gregor can help her through her pain.

His touch is the cure to Sarai's pain, and even though she is grateful for it, it leaves more questions than answers. Gregor and Sarai decide to figure out what happened to Sarai by themselves, but the longer they stay together, the harder it is to ignore the bond each seems to have for one another.

Does their strange connection have something to do with government secrets, or is it connected to something much more dangerous and deadly?

Hello, Reader! I write a chapter every single week, so please please please comment, vote, add to library, casually read, or whatever! I will strongly consider any suggestions/comments that you make as I write this book.
Enjoy!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I love to read and I love to write, so that's why I'm here!
Writing is one of my favorite pastimes, but I have such a hard time getting people to look at and critique my stuff.
Please don't be shy to look at what I have so far and comment! Tell me your honest opinion/suggestions, I will take them into consideration!

I will try to update as regularly as possible (once a week or more).

Thanks!

title: It by Alexa Chung
description:
The darling of the fashion world and co-host of the music TV show Fuse News shares her inspirations, musings, and her own very personal and eclectic style.

With influences that range from the sultry beauty of Jane Birkin to the rocker chic of Mick Jagger, it’s no wonder that everything worn by Alexa Chung instantly becomes the latest trend. Already a hugely popular television personality and a muse for Marc Jacobs and Karl Lagerfeld, Chung is now a co-anchor of the nightly music show Fuse News, covering today’s hottest acts and entertainment news. Chung’s first book, "It," provides her legion of fans with a long-awaited inside look at her fascinating world.

A wholly unique collection of Chung’s personal writings, drawings, and photographs, "It" covers everything from her candid thoughts on life, love, and music to her favorite ensembles and how to decide what to wear in the morning. With Chung’s characteristic wit, charm, and refreshingly down-to-earth attitude, this full-color compendium is a must-have for anyone who loves fashion, music, and just about everything Alexa Chung.

Liked this preview? Buy Alexa’s new book now:
http://bit.ly/AmazonAlexaIT
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Alexa Chung's IT: the Top Ten Bestseller from the international fashion muse and Vogue contributing editor


Now a Penguin paperback, this one-off collection of Alexa Chung's writing, doodles and photographs combines stories of early style inspirations such as her grandpa and the Spice Girls with discussion of figures of obsession like Jane Birkin and Annie Hall, reflecting on heartbreak, how to get dressed in the morning, the challenges of taking a good selfie, and more. Interspersed with pages from Alexa's notebooks and many a photo of a good night out, It is now perfectly sized for any bag - handbag or otherwise. Witty, charming and with a refreshingly down-to-earth attitude, It is a must-have for anyone who loves fashion, worries about growing up, or loves just about everything Alexa Chung.

'If you love Alexa Chung, buy it. If you are interested in fashion and style, buy it. If you're after a book full of pretty pictures and inspo, buy it' - Cosmopolitan

Alexa Chung is a model and contributing editor to British Vogue. The recipient of numerous style awards, Alexa has won the prestigious British Style Award (voted for by the public) three years in a row. She currently lives in New York City.

It by Alexa Chung is out now:
http://www.amazon.co.uk/It-Alexa-Chung/dp/0141975741/ref=sr_1_1?ie=UTF8&qid=1413567850&sr=8-1&keywords=alexa+chung

title: Fic: Why Fanfiction is Taking Over the World
description:
Fanfiction from Sherlock Holmes to Fifty Shades of Grey and Beyond . . .  What is fanfiction, and what is it not? Why does fanfiction matter? And what makes it so important to the future of literature?  Fic is a groundbreaking exploration of the history and culture of fan writing and what it means for the way we think about reading, writing, and authorship. It's a story about literature, community, and technology-about what stories are being told, who's telling them, how, and why.  With provocative discussions from both professional and fan writers, on subjects from Star Trek to The X-Files and Buffy the Vampire Slayer to Harry Potter, Twilight, and beyond, Fic sheds light on the widely misunderstood world(s) of fanfiction-not only how fanfiction is transforming the literary landscape, but how it already has.  See more and where to buy: http://www.smartpopbooks.com/book/fic

SPECIAL DISCOUNT: If you've been enjoying the free sample chapters here on Wattpad, my publisher's discounted the e-book on Amazon for a limited time to $3.99 Wattpad link here: http://bit.ly/ficonwattpad. Readers outside the US can find links for the discount here: http://www.smartpopbooks.com/399fic
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I write all kinds of stuff. Literary criticism. Fiction. Poetry. Sometimes fanfic. And a lot of tweets.

I wrote a novel called In Between Days that I posted here on Wattpad, and it is now available as an ebook.

On Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07XLN7X69

BUT, if you read and loved the story, I want to give you an ebook. Message me.  I don't want anyone to lose a story you loved. And if you are a Wattpad reader who wants to read it and can't afford the $4, message me. I will give away a limited number to new readers every month.

In Between Days is not fanfic, but it is John Hughes-inspired. It's set in his hometown, but I put in a lot of stuff (and people) that Hollywood left out. Such as coke dealers. (I *have* written Breakfast Club fanfiction, but this isn't it.)

I teach university classes on Young Adult literature. I always include a section on "literature by young adults"--Jim Carroll, Arthur Rimbaud, S. E. Hinton, and sometimes some fanfiction.

I'm also always up for talking about fanfiction, which is why I wrote a book on it.

Learn more about FIC: WHY FANFICTION IS TAKING OVER THE WORLD: http://www.smartpopbooks.com/fic

Complete Table of Contents for FIC: http://www.smartpopbooks.com/media/extra/fic-toc.pdf

On Amazon: http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/1939529190/
On B&N: http://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/fic-anne-jamison/1114938225
On Indiebound: http://www.indiebound.org/book/9781939529190

description:
Here you will find information about various terms and concepts related to the aromantic and asexual spectrums.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome to the Triple A Community profile! Short for the Aro and Ace Alliance, this profile celebrates people who fall somewhere on the aromantic or asexual spectrums.

We are always on the lookout for more stories to add to our reading lists! Check out our profile guide for information about each of our reading lists and how to submit to them. Once you're ready to submit, click on the link to our submission form included below our bio.

Interested in learning more about the aromantic and asexual spectrums? Check out our community guide for all sorts of information. We'll be updating this guide regularly, so if there is a particular topic you would like us to cover, please let us know.

We also hold regular interviews with authors who fall under the aromantic and asexual spectrums. Make sure you check out our Triple A Interviews to learn all about them and their amazing stories.

Happy reading, and stay awesome!

Profile picture and banner by @0StxrmySkxes0

authorBio:
Welcome.. Welcome.. whoever decided to look in here.
About me?? Oh! I am just a teenager... Sorry, a bookworm teenager. Describe myself?? Typical nerd... Complete with spectacles and acne scars. I like to marvel at others' stories be it a sloppy romantic one or a full fledged adventure, a classic or even non-fiction and trying a shot at writing.

title: Teenage Veracity
description:
Nope, this is not fiction-or it might be. It depends on you. This is not a typical story-I don't even know if this is worthy of being called a story. There are no characters in here that you can cheer on but yourself. You've got to be the main character in a story once, and I think that alone is enough to convince you to take this shot. 

Well, if you are emotional, dramatic, and insane like me, you can relate. My chapters aren't your chapters, but I bet we're on the same page. My words are your words, if you allow them.

I think this is bad, but it's on you to judge. Just read it. Especially if you are young or you're feeling young. You have nothing to do anyway.

title: How To Write Mind Blowing FanFiction
description:
Back

Description

Have you ever wanted to write a FanFic?

Do you have an idea for a story that you are dying to write about, but don't know how to start? 

Have you ever wanted to write a Fanfic but weren't able to finish it? 

HOW TO WRITE MIND BLOWING FANFICTION is an essential guide to help you write your Fanfic. 

This book shows you how to take your initial idea and create a story from it.

This book has loads of tips on how to structure your story, flesh out your characters and create their personalities to make them seem realistic. It teaches you how to write your story with examples and exercises. 

Whether you are a beginner or an experienced writer, this book will help you write your story faster in an organized way, so you can publish it sooner.

I have decided to post a portion of this book here to share with you guys some of the tips. I hope you will find it useful in writing your stories. 

If you can, then please do consider buying the book. I have a chronic medical condition and its a constant drain on my Income. I will be very grateful for any help I can get from you. 

I have posted the Amazon link in my profile and also in the conversations section. The ebook is also available at iBooks, Barnes and Nobles and kobo. 

Thanks for reading.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi,
I am a libra and big fan of kpop. i have been inspired to write after reading a kpop fanfic and since then i had been on an adventure, discovering this new world of writing stories. i love reading and listening to music and exo is my bias group. you have probably guessed it from my profile image that my bias is kai. i have also publish my first ebook on recently. it called How To Write Mind Blowing Fanfiction which is now available at amazon.

This book will teach you everything you need to know about writing your first story, whether it a fanfic or a short story or even a novel. in this ebook i have included all the tips and exercises that i personally found very useful to learn writing.

My un darbaa means river. i have chosen this name to signify the ever present flow of knowledge and learning i have gained through books.

title: Rebels in Love: The Saga of Bonnie & Clyde
description:
Rebels in Love is a riveting historical novel that delves deep into the passionate and tumultuous romance of Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow, two of America's most notorious outlaws. Set against the backdrop of the Great Depression, this story weaves together their intense love affair with the high-stakes world of crime, fame, and betrayal.

From their fateful meeting in 1930 to their tragic end in a violent ambush, Bonnie and Clyde's story is one of rebellion, loyalty, and the unbreakable bond that kept them together even as the law closed in. As they crisscross the country on a crime spree, robbing banks and evading law enforcement, their love grows stronger-fueled by the adrenaline of life on the run. But as their fame spreads and their allies fall away, they are forced to confront the consequences of their choices, realizing that their love may be the only thing left in a world that has turned against them.

Told with emotional depth and historical detail, Rebels in Love explores the myths surrounding Bonnie and Clyde, capturing the romance and violence that defined their lives. Through the lens of their passion, readers will experience the highs and lows of two misfits who, in the end, had nothing but each other. The novel paints a complex portrait of love-both as a force of devotion and destruction.

Perfect for fans of historical fiction, true crime, and love stories that defy the odds, Rebels in Love is a gripping tale of two lovers who lived fast, died young, and became legends.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a writer and I love to express my love for historical stuff that has happened in the past. Come along the journey and enjoy the stories I have provided. Hopefully they make you feel the same as they make me feel. Happy Reading!


Elvis Fan ⚡️
History Nerd 🌎

title: Lesbian Request Denied ✔
description:
Sometime in 2019, I came out as bisexual. I just sent everyone a text message, and that was that.
Or so I thought.
Skip forward one year, and I'm coming out again. This time, as a lesbian.

In this short account of my experiences, I talk about all the things that made me realize I was gay, and why it took me so long. Hopefully, reading about it can help other people figure out their sexuality.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm Erin, a 27-year-old translator from the Netherlands, and I've been writing since I was 7.

I'm a disabled lesbian, and most of my books feature disabled and/or queer characters. You can expect my books to be slow-burn romances.

Currently, I'm working on a Young Sheldon fanfic about Mary Cooper, who is definitely very straight and has no feelings whatsoever for her childhood best friend Jeanie Lucas. Ahem. (This story can be read even if you're unfamiliar with the show.)

My first completed novel, "Because You're Different", tells the story of June, a girl with cerebral palsy, who falls in love with her best friend Sam's older brother Nathan, but she wonders if anyone will ever love her back.
(This is a straight romance, written when comphet was still messing with my head).

title: Lydia Parkins
description:
Lydia was deaf, dumb and blind  at once but immensely supported by her wealthy father whom is a multi-billionaire. Faced with serious physical challenges and a rare hope to become a successful lawyer, the ultimate death of her father not by the cancer he was suffering from but by murder. The two wives scramble over last wealth pieces. Rose Lydia's mother and only son Johnny are finally pushed out by the claims of a false will by Kaitlyn the first wife owing to his properties. Finally in the streets again though not as wretched as before and having finally lost all her family members discover how Lydia ends up as an assassin and serial killer murdering more than #850 people. #500 targets and #350 people under a few years discover how she is caught on her heist escapade for a royal gem. How meeting Josh, the criminal inspector whom falls in love with her changes her life and becomes a turning point of redemption. Discover if she later did achieve her dream.

title: Some Poems that Come from the Heart by SummerCheng37
description:
If you are reading this on any other platform other than Wattpad (or other platforms you're on) you are very likely to be at risk of a malware attack. If you wish to read this story in it's original, safe, form, please read it only on Wattpad. Thank you.-Summer Cheng@SummerCheng37

What are poems, but everyday tidbits in life?   Here all the original poems are inspired by the weather, food, and much more. 
  I hope you enjoyed my poetry.   Thanks for reading them, Sincerely,  SummerCheng37.
   Do not duplicate, copy, paste, etc. when it comes to my poems.  I worked so hard on them all. 
  The cover design was done with photos from www.kndpng.com and edits made with the Desynger app.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am a 42-year-old married woman and mother to a 16 -year-old son.

I have an adopted 18-year-old brother.

I graduated May 9, 2024, with an Associate in Arts degree!
Next, I plan to work towards a Bachelor of Arts with a Concentration in Creative Writing.

Favorite Colors: Pink, and Purple
Favorite Season: Summer
Favorite foods: Cheese, green peas, chicken (but I will eat almost anything. Nothing spicy or sour for me.)
Favorite pets: dog, parakeet
Favorite animals: owls, butterflies, dogs, parakeets, hamsters, and hermit crabs.

Allergies: Lactose (limited to milk, and ice cream), latex, dust, seasonal allergies, cats, and dust.

Health issues: Asperger's Syndrome (Also known as high-level autism), and a moderate-severe heart murmur (due to mitro valve prolapse, limited to the right side of the heart).

Dislikes: Math, centipedes, spiders, millipedes, snakes, guacamole, and asparagus.

Spiritual status: I accepted Jesus Christ as my personal Lord and Savior at six years old. I am not perfect, but I am forgiven and saved by the one who is!

I do not support abortion because I believe it is morally, and ethically wrong.

Favorite scriptures:  John 3:16, Romans 6:23, Joshua 1:9, II Timothy 2:7, and Timothy 3:16-17. Also the entire book of Psalms, and Isaiah Chapter 53.

Favorite poets: Robert Frost, and Henry Ladsworth Longfellow.

 Favorite authors: Louisa May Alcott, Janette Oke, Kit Morgan, Carol Higgins Clark, and many others.

Favorite Songs:  Amazing Grace by John Newton, Praise You In the Storm by Casting Crowns, God's Not Dead by  The News Boys United, and All Songs by Mandisa, Natalie Grant, and Brandon Heath.

Fandoms: Rwby, Fairy Tail (Natsu, Lucy, Happy the Cat, etc.), Miraculous Ladybug, Miraculous x Fairy Tail Crossover.

Summer is my pseudonym here as I prefer not to use my real name.

I enjoy crocheting, regular scarves, potato chip scarves, washcloths, pot holders, bookmarks, small purses, baby blankets, and sunglass cases.

title: The Importance
description:
The only thing Alexia Decello wants is to get through school without gaining much attention. Her hopes are slashed when her mother and father are kidnapped without explanation. Due to her abusive parents, introverted mind, and a hole of betrayal in her heart, Alexia finds it difficult to make new friends. Everywhere she turns, someone is lying in wait to stab her in the back. Will she ever get her life back together? Can she even return to a normal sense of living? If so, what is normal now that she has discovered what she is?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Weight Loss & Fat Loss Tips
description:
This book is all about how to lose weight without starving yourself, fatloss tips, nutrition tips, healthy eating habits, how to boost your metabolism and burn calories, burn belly fat.

For more fitness and health tips check my website.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hii.. I'm Lisa and I am a fitness freak. I love reading books, travelling to different places, cooking.

I have struggled with my weight before but finally I was able to lose weight and now I'm here to help others in their weight loss journey. Feel free to text me if you are struggling with your weight.

No one is perfect!! All of us have some flaws in us & we shouldn't try to be like others..Each one of us is unique and beautiful. I would like to tell all of you to embrace yourself, love yourself and accept yourself the way you are because you are unique.

Of course you can try to lose weight if you are overweight but don't do it to impress others. Just do it for yourself.

During my weight loss journey I learnt a lot of things and I'm here to help those who want to lose weight and keep it off. 😊😊

Stay fit stay happy my dear friends!!!   For more health and fitness tips check my website.

title: What my girlfriend doesn't know
description:
My name is Robin.
This book is about me.
It tells the story of what happens
when after almost 15 pathetic years of loserdom,
the girl of my dreams finally falls for me.

That seems like it would be
a good thing, right?
Only it turns out to be
a lot more complicated than that

Because I'm not gonna lie to you --
there are naked women involved.
Four of them, to be exact.
Though not in the way you might think.

Don't get me wrong -- my girlfriend's amazing.
But the way things have been going lately,
I'm starting to believe that the only thing worse
than not getting what you want,

is getting it.

- Sonya Sones
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: 🌿🌻plants are friends

title: The Art Of Manifesting Love: A Journey To Attracting Healthy Relationships
description:
This book, "The Art of Manifesting Love: A Journey to Attracting Healthy Relationships," is a comprehensive guide to help you attract and maintain healthy relationships by harnessing the power of positive thinking and self-love. Through practical exercises, thought-provoking insights, and empowering affirmations, you will learn how to examine past experiences, let go of negative beliefs and fears, develop self-love, create a clear vision of what you want in a relationship, and engage in activities that bring joy and positivity. The book also explores the laws of attraction, the importance of forgiveness and letting go, the power of gratitude, and the role of persistence and patience in manifesting love. With this book, you will embark on a journey of self-discovery and growth, learning how to trust the process, have faith in their ability to manifest love, and ultimately create fulfilling relationships that bring happiness and joy to your life.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Double Mommy
description:
After taking a break for the summer before their senior year, Ryan and Jess rekindle their relationship, and find out that Jess is pregnant with twins. When Ryan's mother demands a paternity test, they find out that Ryan is only the father of one baby... The other father is Ryan's best friend Bryce, who Ryan discovers date raped Jess at a party over the summer. With college recruiters and an overbearing father looming over Bryce's head, he will stop at nothing to make sure that he clears his name--even if it means getting rid of Jess and her babies!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: My Path To Serenity
description:
What comes to mind when you think of the word "love"? 

Twenty six year old Allison Johnson discovers the meaning of love on her own, throughout this journey on her path to serenity. 

She grew up in a family of five In a small home in Portland, Oregon, where she's lived almost her whole life.
With her determination and desperation to leave her parents home to discover her own destiny, she moved into a beautiful home on the opposite side of town with her husband, Jasper, when she had first fell in love at eighteen.

She maintains balancing her career as a third grade teacher and her marriage pretty well, until something shook her reality as far as she knew it. She awoken one morning to news she had never seen coming. With her marriage and career hanging by a thread, her whole perspective on life is shifting for the worse as she watches it crumble apart. 

Her sister, Charlotte, is in serious need of help. Allison pushes past her limits to help her sister, but she needs the harmony that she can only find from within herself to help her first.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome to my wattpad ☁️

In here, you'll find all of my rough drafts and final projects.

I've always been passionate for writing and words.

I began writing at just four years old, but published my first book through Wattpad at just seventeen years old. This piece was coming from a period of time where I was beginning to find my purpose and heal. I wanted to express through a story what serenity has taught me. I decided to write with fictional characters and a made up plot, to integrate my healing journey and love for writing all into one.

My second book, The Life of Wyatt Owens, I began writing at twenty years old. I felt a magnitude of inspiration out of no where to write a story about an average high school student going through a whole bunch of new challenges and hardships until he met Jesus. I didn't second guess this, I went straight into writing the book. It's been an interesting project, but it's been a blast. It's nothing that I'm used to writing, but that's what makes this even more fun.


Advice to new writers:
•Relax, your writing style is unique and it's amazing! Don't critique it. No one else can write like you besides you... think about how neat that is.

•If you want people to read your work, write from the soul. The passion within you will energetically attract more lovely readers to appreciate your work.

•You want to write but you aren't feeling motivated? That's fine- you don't need motivation to write, you just need a good pen and some willpower. You got this! Pick up your pen and write away.

Thanks for reading. Take it easy.

title: A LETTERED SOUL: REFLECTIONS ON LITERATURE, CINEMA AND CULTURE .
description:
I have often wondered about the very curdled natures of our opinions so much so that the perch of imagination simply becomes a bystanding abstraction and real thoughts of genuine merit slip between the fingers. That is a human tendency, to beat around the bush. I take offense to that and feel it was time to correct this stifling infirmity of expression. For me, the sanctity of words bear witness to crystal clear thoughts and in this new branch of prose writing, I will be governed by genuine articles of literature and cinema that ensure longevity of our opinions and directly appropriate real life. So here is the new start of my written, lettered soul.

Ranked number 4 under Cinema  and number 5 in Originality as of 11th May, 2018.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
•••••••••

I am a passionate student of literature and the efficacy of words and their synaesthetic imprints have inspired me to add another feather to my cap. With this new vista, I hope to engage actively with ideas and thoughts that open up my worldview as well as share my own creations in terms of my written output. Let this journey begin with a hum, a melody and the lilt of creation.

________

I have also started a blog on WordPress, titled An Awadh Boy's Panorama that will address all my eternal loves: cinema, poetry, literature and culture. It is the beginning of a new worthwhile journey ahead. Go check it out!

title: The Idiot's Guide to Writing
description:
Has your imagination been running wild but your brain just can't get the details on paper? Are your stories lacking just a little something that you can't put your finger on? Do you look up at the professionals and go, "man, what are they doing that I'm not?" Well, have I got the solution for you. This is a series I will be writing for the betterment of the Wattpad community and for writers in general, for all of your questions about how to improve your storytelling. I'm here to break down and analyze every literary element, trope, genre, and bad writing advice for your benefit and explain why they do - or don't - work. 
Do note that I won't deliver any advice on finding inspiration or motivational speeches for the soul or stuff like that. This will be almost purely analytical.

Feel free to make suggestions about what I should talk about in the comments!
-Phyre_Phlyght
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Hello, Internet! My name is Phyre_Phlyght and I am an avid writer, gamer, artist, and devil's advocate. Talk to me about most things nerdy, and I might just have an answer for you. I largely write speculative fiction where I can freely break the laws of reality and nobody can stop me.

title: May Blossom High
description:
><{{{(•>

Grasping the railings, my hands tremble with bittersweet emotions. I'm uncertain if subjecting myself to this view will persuade my stubborn heart to obey and cease its relentless beating for him, even just for a day.

I refuse to shed more tears; I'm tired of crying and concealing my emotions-a tumultuous ride. Instead, I plant my feet firmly on the ground, determined to observe, concentrating on embracing and feeling every aspect of the pain.

She's nearly draped over him on the couch, showering him with intense kisses and hugs. I detect his discomfort as his eyes dart around, seeking an exit. Though I could have been his way out, I've consciously chosen not to always be there for Landon Brookes, recognizing the pitfalls it brings.

<><><>

Will tomboy Kendal Levy be able to move beyond her ceaseless infatuation with her best friend Landon Brookes, who belongs to the elite crowd at May Blossom High?

title: Astania Interviews

A collection of interviews with authors around Wattpad. Read on to support your favorite writers, or to find your next book to binge! Interested in seeing how you can be featured, or how to suggest another amazing author? See inside to find out!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Tempering the rising flames of writers to reach their brightest blaze.

We are a community for both writers and readers looking to improve their craft, explore new worlds, and to form friendships. All are welcome!

Here we aim to provide a safe space for people of all backgrounds to bond over literature. Share your stories for the world to see. Check out our members' stories in our reading lists to find your next obsession. Keep an eye out for contests, clubs, and other opportunities to engage with the community.

Our Discord server is also a great place to connect with other Wattpad users, along with writers on other platforms and publishing paths: https://discord.gg/authors

We no longer affiliate with other communities, but we may be open to occasional promotions for promotions. DM us to find out more!

We do NOT accept work written by AI as a representation of our community; this includes in our reading lists and contests. Please do not submit AI-assisted work to anything in our community.

Use the hashtag #AstaniaBooks or #AstaniaCommunity on your stories to show you're a part of our community!

Curious? Take a look around our profile or Carrd, and we hope you can find a home with us in the wonderful world of Astania!

Please note: If you message us on our message board without a specific question or comment regarding the community, we will likely not respond.

Account primarily run by @laurendoubleu.

title: Walang Kwentang Kwento Ko
description:
A short, corny, pre-made randomness and kaweirduhan nonsense. Hanggang sampu lang. Tinamad na ako eh.


Wala akong pake sa opinyon mo. Manahimik ka diyan!!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Oo yan ang pangalan ko.
Wag mo nang alamin kung bakit.
At oo, kasing baho ko ang pangalan ko.

Wag mong seryosohin ang naunang statement sa taas.
Bobo lang maniniwala diyan.

Ano kamo? Naniwala ka? Edi bobo ka pala. Hahahaha!

Wag mo ring seryosohin ang previous statement. Walang taong bobo, tanga lang meron at sa tingin ko ay hindi ka naman tanga. Hindi ka naman siguro tanga di ba?

Kung bored ka at sa tingin mo ay wala kang silbi sa lipunan, basahin mo ang obra ko. Naks naman, obra daw oh.

Corny no? Che!!!


P.S. Hindi ako si Gerry, at hindi ko kapatid si Kalla!!! 😉😉

title: How I (Finally) Got Published
description:
GOT QUESTIONS? I HAVE (SOME) ANSWERS. 

This is a non-fiction work that details my journey as an author, both on and off Wattpad. I hope this can help answer some of the many questions that plague aspiring authors on WP. 

Here I talk candidly about how I created my book The Boyfriend App, joined the Wattys and got signed on by a publisher in my country. I will also talk about independent publishing, how to make a good story, and various other author issues. 

Please feel free to read this collection of thoughts and leave a comment or question. I promise to try and answer your query the soonest possible. Thanks!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, guys!

For this year's Wattys, I've started a noir / true crime / comedy story. It's a mix of Shrek and Sherlock Holmes, but darker. So, yeah, it's Mature and minors are prohibited from reading it.

The title is Hardboiled Humpty. Check it out:

https://www.wattpad.com/story/370120957-hardboiled-humpty

I plan to update weekly, every Saturday. Make sure to add the story to your library so you'll be updated when the next chapter drops.

Thanks and stay Phenomenal!

title: NOT EDISON
description:
This novel is based on a true story.
The true story about the light bulb!


Let me tell you about the love of my heart.

A hero by most people's standards.

The world should have loved him as much as I do.

But they didn't.

He deserved it.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Look.... I just wanted to write ONE epic novel so...... I did.  340,000 words. Is that epic enough for you? That took me two and a half weeks to write.

Then writing got under my skin. I love it. In all honesty I write for me. It just so happens, by some fluke, that everyone loves what I write and I am flattered and feel privileged every time I get a compliment.

As it turns out I received critical acclaim for that epic novel and I am a published author.

I have written 35 novels and 2 motivational books and 2 inspirational books.

I'm addicted to the written word and addicted to putting those words together which comes out as either entertainment or a learning experience or both.

I am only human so you'll find mistakes. Try and overlook them and get the essence of what I am trying to say.

I do hope you enjoy my work too.

title: You & Me-Again (Upcoming)
description:
එකී දිනයේ එක් කාල වර්ණ මොහොතකදී ඔබට මට අප සැමට ඒ අද්භූත චන්ද්‍රයාගේ සේයාවක් දෘශ්‍යමාන වීමට පටන් ගන්නේය.

ශ්වේත වර්ණැති දිදුලන රේඛාවකින් කාල චන්ද්‍රයාගේ සීමා සලකුණු සටහන් වන්නට පටන් ගනියි.

එය පෘථිවියේ එක් පරිපූර්ණ චන්ද්‍රග්‍රහණයකට සමාන වූවත් එලෙසට මෙකී නිම්නය තුළ චන්ද්‍රයා වසා දැමීමට කිසිඳු ග්‍රහයෙකු නොපවතින්නේය.

එනම් එය කාල චන්ද්‍ර නිම්නයේ චන්ද්‍රග්‍රහණයක් නොවන්නේය.
.
.
.
.
.
නමුත් ශ්වේත මායිම් ලඳ කාල චන්ද්‍ර නිමේශය තුළදී, ඈ විසින් පෘථිවි ගර්භය තුළ එක් බලගතු ආත්මයකට මව් කුසකින් නික්ම මනුලොව ආලෝකය විඳින්නට ඉඩ ලබා දෙන්නීය.

ශ්වේත වර්ණැති පුෂ්පයන් බිලියන ගණනක් අතර ඒ ආත්මය එක් දීප්තිමත් රක්ත වර්ණැති පුෂ්පයම වන්නේය!!

authorBio:
"වෙනත් ලෝකයක නම් මට වචන ඕනෙ වෙන එකක් නැහැ. මං ඔයාගේ දොරකඩ පෙනී හිටීවි. 'මං ඔයාව බලන්න ආවා' කියලා කියාවි. ඒක, වචනවල අවසානය වේවි. මං ඔයාව බදාගනීවි, ඔයා මාව බදාගනීවි.

ඒත් මේ ලෝකේ, මේ වෙලාවේ, මං ඔයාට ළං වෙන්නෙ වචනවලින්!"

title: Animal Emotion
description:
These are my poems about animals, with some about the human animal. Some of these have been published in local journals.
Previously published poems:
   "Close-Up With a Giraffe"
 
     "The Blue Heron"

      "The Baby Bunny"

       "Tired Hearts"

       "The Word Becomes a Window"
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I write many different genres-- namely fantasy, historical fiction, and sci-fi. Be sure to like, comment, and follow; I'm open to feedback, and becoming the best writer I can be. Some of my poetry has been published in local magazines.

Check my Instagram for more art.

Twitter-- @WomanDust
Instagram-- svengoolienewmar
Bell Tree Forums-- QueenCobra

Pain does not build cages so you can admire how you look in the light between the bars.

Yesterday has tomorrow's eyes.

dreams hiding in the cracks of her voice

It is not the sudden sleep that steals us, but the slow awakening.

I want to be a thousand nothings.

Somehow, you pull a sword from every stone they throw at you.

You don't know you're holding the missing piece until it cuts you in half.

Every uphill battle leads to the stars.

We are majestically broken into being.

Heart like the apocalypse; mind like the creation myth.

Humor is the genius seriousness dreams of.

You crow at one sun...I at another...either way,  the day came, and we are still not supper.

The only place a woman is beneath a man is the grave.

title: What's The Tea With Gen Z
description:
"During my time ..."
"Your generation has it easier"
Sounds familiar? At some point of time, we were all once at a place where we wanted to voice out but were always suppressed to do so. Now, we live in a different environment and a whole new society. We want our voices to be heard, thoughts to be considered and understood. Is that too much to ask for as 'kids nowadays'? We don't want demands but instead, a mutual relationship with each other. Sometimes it is hard to take the first step into understanding one another because we all give in to our ego.
Here is a personal guidebook for you to understand our world as we reveal who we are as a generation. From how we think to what we say, what we stand for and why we do so. We have evolved in many different ways compared to those older than us. Oftentimes, our generations don't seem to understand each other. That is why we have gathered everything you need to know about us, Gen Z.

Disclaimer: 
Due to the technicalities on the platform, all the footnotes used in our book cannot be fully inserted. For further references and the complete version, please visit our profile "G.Z Manuel" on Smashwords for the original copy of the book.

e-ISBN : 978-967-18842-0-1
Tous Droits Réservés

title: #WattpadProblems
description:
Wattpad is a confusing place. Especially now that they are going around changing how it once was, only confusing the people that have been on here since the start. There are constant questions for how to do even the simplest things, but no answers are received. This ever changing site that we have come to know and love, is now changing more than a pregnant woman's moods and pushing some users off the site. 

Here's a short and simple how-to guide that can be followed by even the most oblivious wattpad member's grandmother.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Taylor (TaylorMonet): I never know what to say here, I could tell y'all about the splotchy birthmark on my left thumb, or the scar on my right wrist from my surgery last year. Maybe you want to know why I became a writer, or what ethnicity I am? Do you guys really care that my eyes are two different sizes? What is it that makes me, Taylor Monet, who I am? Maybe it's the fact that I'm above average. Not in everything, just my height. I'm below average at math. Writing is the only thing that I seem to excel at. It's my escape from my average life. A place where I can be who I want to be, go places that I've never been, and meet people that I've only met in my dreams. Isn't that what writing is all about? An escape into another world? Because let's face it, the world we live in today is crazy, and uncontrollable. I like being in control. I just want to write my own story. My life is my story. And these stories are products of my and xxNightStripesxx wild imaginations.

Sara (xxnightstripexx): I believe everyone's different, so I don't judge you for who you are. I have some really beat up black chucks that need a cleaning. I love animals, and plan to work with them later in life. I'm a country girl and proud of it! I have a proclivity for art of any kind, give me a few hours to draw and you'll have a beautiful pencil work, photography works out well, I love writing and have gotten alot better with practice, I'm learning to paint though so don't expect much from that... I'm addicted to my Ipod, just ask Taylor. If it's not in my ears, it's charging. I will defend my beliefs and my friends/family. Just watch your step with me and I'll be nice. Also I believe GUN CONTROL IS STUPID!

Feel free to chat/email us at anytime. As our name hints at out books have a little bit of romance in them, what can I say that's what Tay writes best :)

Copyright © on ALL stories!

title: Twins At War
description:
'TWINS AT WAR' ( My Twin. My World)

Twins by birth. Twins at heart. Aurelia and Aubrey Forever.

______________________________________

Two identical girls born born few seconds apart. Their difference can be more apart but they still cared and loved each other. They feel each others pain,I don't mean internally but externally. (It's a rare condition)
________________________________________

AUBREY RAJAN :

 First twin, calm and quite. Doesn't show much emotions to people on the outside but is a total sweetheart once you know her. Some, on first encounter. Takes her a an Apathetic due to her rigid posture. Can be sweet and funny sometimes. Sister's keeper.

AURELIA RAJAN :

Second twin, acts childish and very talkative. She's the one to easily break an awkward silence made by her sister. Caring and sugar like personality.Sacarsm is like an early meal to her. Sugary SWEETS should be BANNED in her life. You so don't wanna know what happens when she gets her hands on one.

___________________________________
What happens when both sisters fall for the same guy who showed and gave them attention and love for the first time from another gender.

What happens when it begins to create crises between both sister? How would they be able to settle it?.
♥︎


♥︎
_________________________________
 
"Why don't you just die!, It would make no difference in my life!" I screamed back at her, the anger and everything going on was finally eating me to the core.

At those words, she broke down. Slumping down against the wall, tears coming out furiously as she tried to wipe the. "WELL GUESS WHAT? You have your wish granted already!!!"

authorBio:
I WILL BEAT HER.
I WILL TRAIN HARDER AND EAT CLEANER.
I KNOW HER WEAKNESSES.
I KNOW HER STRENGHTS.
I'VE LOST TO HER, BUT NOT THIS TIME.
SHE IS GOING DOWN.
I HAVE THE ADVANTAGE BECAUSE I KNOW HER WELL.
SHE IS THE OLD ME.
------------------------------------------------
Weight loss is like driving. If you ever veer off the road, just make a U-turn and head back in the right direction.
-----------------------------------------------
When you look in the mirror and see no change, and still keep faith, knowing that in time you will get there if you stay focused and on track, that's the difference between those who succeed and those who fail.
--------------------------------------------
You are going to want to give up..... DON'T!
--------------------------------------------
Do it NOW, because later becomes NEVER.

description:
Story description:
Jeon Jungkook, who misses his long lost bff Sana. He doesn't realize the love he felt all these years was near him, disguised as a close friend Chou Tzuyu. 
Until one day he finally finds his true lover and as expected, he didn't want to let go but it was already too late for it.

What if he is in a situation where he has to pick between his two most precious women, Sana OR Tzuyu? 
Whom does he love, his childhood sweetheart or his friend who always took care of him?
Jealousy or Love what will win?

Pure love is the one which joins the two hearts and makes them one. It's neither my nor her Heart, It becomes 'OUR HEART' to be called.

1st story in 'TWO HEARTS' series.
OUR HEART by BOOKWORM_LUVISLIFE

title: Emily Rose: A Pregnancy Story
description:
In letters to "Emily Rose," an expectant mother chronicles the nine months leading up to her daughter's birth. The journey begins with the word "pregnant" in late autumn and continues through three more seasons, two small towns, and many unforeseeable challenges. Through it all, those little kicks and flutters give her a warm sense of direction in a world that can be, at times, cold and unpredictable. By documenting her experiences, this mother hopes to preserve the precious memories, and make peace with her mistakes and the things she cannot change. And someday she will share this story with Emily Rose, when she, too, is faced with the challenge of becoming a woman and mother.     

This story was originally published on the parenting blog, http://sisterschance.blogspot.com (see External Link). Ready for a new adventure, it became @Fairytale_Fabler's icebreaker piece at the start of her Wattpad enterprise and it has since been listed on the Stories4Mom reading list. Soon after the "Little Peach" Mother's Day update, it became a Wattpad Featured Story. And like mother and child, their true story even has a story, one that began as a good idea (and a unique opportunity for self-reflection) and developed over the years into something stronger and wiser. Thank you for such overwhelming love and support.
Tous Droits Réservés
