title: My Wiccan Guide
description:
This Is all the information I have collected since discovering Wicca. I thought it might be nice to share. I hope it helps and teaches a few things. The sharing of information has always been a passion of mine. I love to research and learn as much as I possibly can, so I hope that I can pass all of my knowledge on to others. I welcome all who want to read it, whether you're Wiccan and want to give it a look or just curious about the religion. "...knowledge is the food of the soul." -Plato. Blessed Be!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"We should educate people that 'Witch' is not evil, but ancient and positive. The first time I called myself a 'Witch' was the most magical moment of my life." - Margot Adler

Hi! :) I'm Deb. My hobbies include writing, drawing, reading, and gardening. I'm also quite horrible at describing myself, other than what my hobbies are, but I'll try. So, let's see, what else can I say? I am a "born again Heathen." ;) Haha, what I mean by that is I am now Wiccan, I have been for around seven years now. I love to talk, though I sometimes have trouble thinking of what to say. I'm often better at putting my thoughts into written words (although I do frequently suffer from horrid writer's block) than spoken words, though. So, If anyone ever wants to talk, I'm here. :) If you were to watch me for a day, you would most likely see me writing, giving advice on a certain forum ;p, playing The Sims/Dragon Age: Origins, or watching old TV shows such as Star Trek: The Original Series or Buffy the Vampire Slayer (I'm pretty much obsessed with BtVS XD). I am also a huge lover of nature, which is why I love to garden. I love to be outside and to smell the trees and the grass. I love knowing that beautiful plants will spring from the tiny seeds that I put into the ground.

I would love for some feedback on any of my works. Criticism is actually one of my favorite things, even if it completely tears my piece down, as long as it's legitimate criticism. Criticism helps me be a better writer. It shows me my mistakes and helps me figure out what I need to work on.

"Nothing in nature lives for itself. Rivers don't drink their own water. Trees don't eat their own fruit. The sun doesn't shine for itself. A flower's fragrance is not for itself. Living for each other is the rule of Nature"

Blessed Be. :) I hope you all have a wonderful day/evening! <3

title: CAN WE TRY AGAIN? (BL)
description:
Jae-il didn't bother to let anyone know about his sudden comeback to the military. He just disappeared from everyone's lives without a word and came back without telling anyone. He continued to live his peaceful life and planned to return to their lives after he finished his college degree while hiding from Min-Hyuk. 

  

His hoobae and childhood friend he left behind in Busan, Min-Hyuk is soft and gentle with him. Including his family, but he kept his distance from the Ha family when Min-Hyuk started to act clingy around him. And to be honest, he also liked him way back in high school, but he decided not to cross any line from their friendship. 

 

Min-Hyuk became worse and worse every day went by; he wanted to be with his Hyung so much that it made his mother and father nervous. They also started to look for Jae-il, but he left without a trace which made him even more anxious. It all suddenly changed when one of his classmates visited his penthouse in Seoul and started to drink for fun, one of them suddenly spilled the name he only knew. He starts to draw his attention to this specific classmate to gain some information every time they have a drink, and just like that he was invited to this specific gathering by his classmate's colleague.  
 

What would Jae-il do if the person he keeps on avoiding shows up one day in front of him crying? 

Would he be able to avoid his grip this time? 

Or rather, they would try again? 

 

Ps. Story inspired by some boy's love manhwa story.

title: LOVE LIVES HERE
description:
With the world so set on tearing itself apart, it doesn't seem like such a bad thing to want to put a little bit of it back together by giving love. 

Love lives here and you always gain by giving love. Stop by to give an anonymous shout-out to that user who has made the Wattpad experience more fun for you.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I write.

Get access to all first drafts and ongoing stories here: Reamstories.com/maramartha

N/B: The reward for kindness isn't always kindness, but be kind anyway. All seasons pass, both good and bad. Spend less time mourning, break your silly egos, forgive quickly, believe slowly, laugh loudly, and never avoid things that make you happy. See the beauty in yourself, so much so that your life begins to make sense to you.

title: JESUS (The only one who changed my life) ✔
description:
It's about my personal real life story with God. Basically, I am from a christian family. I didn't believe god before. I was making fun of everyone who prayed to god in the Church. But one day, god changed me and my life. I started my experience with God. I started seeing Visions and heared his voice. Now, I am running my life with Jesus. At the same time, The devil tried to attack me many times, he tried to destroy my heart. But every time, Jesus saved me. Jesus loves everyone unconditionally. I am experiencing his love each and every day. Jesus loves you all!

Please read it. It will be useful to everyone.

Praise the lord.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm Vinolin. People call me "Vino". An emotional girl. But a strong girl at the same time. I love Jesus a lot. I love to write the real life stories. So here, i am sharing my real life stories.

Here, I started writing my first story "Brother's love". It's based on the true story. Please read it and share your feedback in the comment section.

title: Reflections and Resilience: Poems from My Personal Journey
description:
This book offers a profound and evocative exploration of personal growth through the art of poetry. In this heartfelt collection, I invite you, my readers, into an intimate space where emotions are laid bare and experiences are transformed into lyrical reflections.

Each poem captures the essence of a life lived with courage and vulnerability, navigating the complexities of love, heartbreak, and self-discovery. From the echoes of past sorrows to the triumphs of newfound strength, these verses illustrate a journey of overcoming adversity and embracing resilience.

With vivid imagery and expressive language, the poems in this collection speak to the universal human experience, offering solace and inspiration to those navigating their own paths. "Reflections and Resilience" is not just a book of poetry; it is a testament to the power of self-examination and the enduring spirit of hope.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I Write so I can express my imaginations.

title: The Letters of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart (1769-1791) Vol.1
description:
Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart (1756-1791) was a prolific and influential composer of the Classical era. Born in Salzburg, he showed prodigious ability from his earliest childhood. Already competent on keyboard and violin, he composed from the age of five and performed before European royalty. During his final years in Vienna, he composed many of his best-known symphonies, concertos, and operas, and portions of the Requiem, which was largely unfinished at the time of his death.
Domaine public

title: Office intent
description:
About a confident woman who's not fond of relationships. Everyone she's had was either toxic or only from being alone. She has this coworker who caught her eye from day one. The way he moved, carried himself, his piercing blue eyes like the ocean, and best of all, his deep voice. He had a family, but not married. She doesn't like the fact of getting with a taken man, so she left it alone. Months go by, he was having trouble with his situation and eventually his girl broke it off with him (a break). After the woman found out him and his girl was no longer a couple, she was thinking "I misewell take advantage of it, in case they were to get back together" and surely enough she did.

My name is Cathy on here

I'm gay, female, introvert mostly, I support everyone and I just try to get through life.

As you noticed in this account, I love Tickling, Roleplay, Writing Stories, Anime and etc 🧶
 
Tickling is a share of laughter and it relieves pain or stress. No it's not a fetish. Not to me.

"Why do people see Tickling as something so weird...? Like, okay, yes it's a bit intimate like holding hands or sharing the same straw in a drink, but it's not something weird or sexual like a bad thing. title: Find That Book (Book Club)
description:
Are you having trouble remembering the name or author of a book? Look no further! Follow  the 4 simple steps that get you this much closer to finding your long lost book. While you wait for responses, please help others find the books they're looking for. 


PS: The more you share the page, the greater chance you have of finding your book.
This profile acts as a group for those of you searching for a book you've read here on Wattpad that you don't remember the name of. 


1. Leave a comment on the Conversation Board and describe the book you're looking for. Include any details you can remember (i.e. plot, genre, publishing year, setting, character description, etc.) to make you book easier to identify. 

2. Please don't spam the page. Everyone wants their book to be found, but that's hard to do when you have to scroll through 50 comments that are the same. 

3. While waiting for someone to reply to your comment, please scroll through the Discussion Board and see if anyone's book description sounds familiar. 

4. Please don't use this page as a way to promote your own stories. 


And that's it! Happy searching!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Have you ever read an amazing book but couldn't remember the name of it ?

This profile acts as a group/club for those of you searching for a book you've read here on Wattpad that you don't remember the name of.


1. Leave a comment on the Conversation Board and describe the book you're looking for. Include any details you can remember (i.e. plot, genre, publishing date, setting, etc.) to make your book easier to identify.

2. Please don't spam the page.

3. While waiting for someone to reply to your post, please read the other comments to see  if anyone's book description sounds familiar.

Happy searching!

authorBio:
She/her, demiromantic ace, technical editor and Wattpad Creator with cerebral palsy

When it comes to fiction, I primarily write fantasy stories for both adults and children, often involving animals, baking, and tons of puns. I also dabble in other genres, and have posted hundreds of bite-sized poems that are the perfect read if you only have a minute to spare.

My short stories and poems have appeared in Daily Science Fiction, Bronzeville Bee, Cicada, Short Édition, and various other publications. I'm a proud member of Rainbow Book Club, Dreamland Raid, and Dreamland Hunt. I'm also the founder of the Triple A Community.

title: I Found It At The Movies: Film Noir Reviews
description:
A short, tongue-in-cheek guide to old classic movies from the film noir era. Like Pauline Kael only cooler!

Film noir (a term adopted well after these movies were made) represented a dark departure from the upbeat films that Hollywood produced up until the early 1940s. This collection of movie reviews provides a guide to some of most notable entries into that classic canon.

This book is the first installment of a series. The second book provides a handy guide to neo-noir movies. Also, check out the trivia questions. Test your knowledge. And stay tuned for more guides to the best and the worst movies Hollywood has created.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm the New York Times bestselling author of the hardboiled mystery Identity Crisis, featuring Maryland lawyer-sleuth Stephanie Ann "Sam" McRae. I've also written and published Invisible Me, a young adult novel, The Planck Factor, a thriller, and several short stories, one of which was nominated for a Derringer Award.

The thing that inspired me to write a lawyer-sleuth novel was that I wanted to write stories about a female protagonist who solved mysteries and did so without compromising legal ethics -- much! One of the big obstacles Sam faces in solving mysteries is doing so without using the usual private eye trickery.

Right now, the Sam McRae mystery series includes four novels. If you'd like a free copy, just click this link: http://bit.ly/IDCFree

I hope to all more books to the Sam McRae series. At the moment, I'm working on a new mystery series with a female Marine veteran sleuth named Erica Jensen. The first book in that series is called DAMAGED GOODS.

I try to post updates here once a week.

I've worked as a waitress, a photography model, a substitute school bus driver, a typist, an attorney, a freelance writer, and a reference librarian, among other things.

My interests include reading, music, movies, travel, walking, baseball, and cats. And good espresso. Not necessarily in that order.

title: Letters to my EX (Friends)
description:
I randomly  got the idea for this book today after finishing a letter to a current friend of mine. An actual letter on paper, crazy right? I got so much weight off my shoulder just by telling her how I felt (all good things).

So, I decided, why not do the same with people from my past? People I've never gotten to confront and probably never will because they aren't in my life anymore.

These are letters to my ex friends who will never get them because I'm not the kind of person to actually send these. All of the people/situations are real*, so it probably won't be that interesting, but I wanted to see what would happen if I did like one letter a day. This is totally random so I'll probably be jumping around a lot as I think of people to include, so don't be confused if I go from 3rd grade to like, last week or something.

I'm not going to be dragging all of my ex friends (just some), but the goal here is to write my honest feelings, and say everything I would to them if there were no consequences.

*while everyone mentioned here is a real person, names (and locations?) will be changed to protect the identities of the people
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I'm trying my best to be honest with myself.

title: Plastic is Killing our environment
description:
(Highest rank #33 in educational, #1 in plasticwaste & #5 in environmental) 

Since 1950, we have mass produced over 8.3 billion metric tons, most of which have ended up in our oceans. There is a floating garbage island named "Great Pacific Garbage Patch." There's also a second covering about one million square miles, its larger than the state of Texas. More than 180 species of animals have been documented to ingest plastic, including, birds, fish, turtles, and marine mammals. Plastic has infected our health and endangers the length of time our planet has to live.

To see how much plastic has invected our lives, read this.
To see how You can make a difference, read this.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Second War: Unknown [JDDS SERIES #1] (COMPLETED)
description:
LOVE IS THE STRONGEST EMOTION. 

You love even if it's hard.

You love even if it hurts.

This is a story of a girl who loves someone -- no, unknown someone-- unknown person


Too unknown to her. They fell in love in young age, hurt in young age and lost each other in young age.


After ten years, she is the youngest businesswoman in Asia. She owns a lot of successful business. She can make her own family if she wants it. 


But her love for that man is still there. That man who made her crazy. That man... who's still unknown to her.


She even assume her secretary will lead her to him. Funny huh?


She's crazy in love with the man who hurt her. With the man who's unknown to her but managed to hurt her heart. 




......but if he'll come back,



will they end up happy? 


...or hurt each other again?


will they win the second war of love?


...or lose each other again?





The Second War: Uknown

JDDS1: Jaxine Demetria Dezman Santiago

title: Sparkler Snapshots
description:
Dear beloved wanderer, 

It is with great pride and pleasure that I extend a formal invitation to you for a worldwide expedition. I plan to travel the globe over the span of a single year, you see, and I am in desperate need of company. If you accept this offer, then be aware that we shall be experiencing more celebrations than most have in their lifetime. Even though each one is merely a bite-sized sample, they pack more punch than you may be able to handle. However, I know you love a challenge, so I do hope you consider this opportunity. 

I would advise you dress up in comfortable garments as you dance your heart out for Cinco de Mayo, get your hands dirty while planting trees, and let the aroma of hot cocoa waft under your nose as Christmas music plays softly in the background. I suspect that we shall also be participating in some sort of musical event in June. Anyhow, if you would like to join me, then I shall meet you at the airport tomorrow morning with your tickets. 

Best wishes,
A lone explorer

title: Powered By AAA's
description:

This story is my personal experience with the AAA's and how I've navigated through life up until now, by sharing this story I hope I can relate to other people and share some of my experiences with you guys. 

!!I do not mean to offend anyone with this story!! Again this is MY personal experience, and I know everyone experiences things a little differently, whether you can relate to it or not I'm just sharing this because I want people to know they aren't alone in this situation. 

I don't have a set updated schedule, I'll update whenever I feel like writing, I'll get distracted most likely. Happy reading!!

title: He Can't Burst my Balloon.
description:
While the cheerleaders are out making people feel bad, the players playing their game, and the jocks winning football games, Alice is here to make her own path. 

Alice is a normal girl who isn't what you consider popular. Luckily she has her friends to help her overcome life. Some people don't know them or don't care about them but they don't mind that. 

 Alice is faced with a challenge of liking guys,  drama, friendships, and problems from the past coming back. 

Especially one problem, when her old school love comes back into her life to make it more confusing and hard. 

 Will their love be strong enough and not break a promise they made back then? Or will Alice start fresh and find someone else? And will her doubts get so bad she'll hurt herself to stop them? 

Read on and see what happens when Life and Love meet. You'll love it and hate it at the same time. 

"Life isn't a fairytale...at least not in my world" ~ Allison Moon

#Wattys2017 gotta try no matter what right?

i see you've somehow stumbled upon my profile. i'm happy to see ya. stick around! i mainly go by dragon, but across my socials i'm aka zinnia. i'm she/her, btw.

wanna know what i'm up to? well:

► i'm keeping up my 2nd prose + quotes book, ❛mind,❜ and plan on continuing the prose i left in my drafts so long ago.

► updating my 3rd prose + quotes book, ❛soul,❜ sporadically, though i might create an update schedule for it because i am going thru many traumatic things and believe i will be told to try writing again, so.. here goes nothing, i guess.

► very slowly completing reading requests. i have been going downhill mentally and have been unable to do requests. i have also been having headaches daily and am just exhausted from life, and i am a full time college student. the struggle is very real and present. when i do start reading stories again, i will tag the authors here.

► slowly getting back into entering contests and still doing promos.

► trying to be happy that my 1st prose book, ❛body✔︎,❜ that i started when i was 14, got shortlisted for Black History Month 2021 and now has almost ★40,000★ reads. it's a process.

that's all i've got for now, so here's a parting quote before you hopefully decide to stay on my profile. oh, and thanks for your time!😊💛

in the words of oscar wilde, ❝be yourself; everyone else is already taken.❞

title: Basic Nutrition for the Resistance Trainer
description:
The gym is a wonderful place for individuals who desire to better their personal health and fitness. There are many styles of training that can take place in the gym, all target different specific goals. Resistance training is an excellent style of fitness that allows the trainer to increase muscle mass. However, even with huge amounts of training, nutrition is the main player in achieving fitness goals. Nutrition is not a very well known area for many resistance trainers. Topics that will be discussed in this portfolio are basic nutrition tips for the resistance trainer, workout hydration, macronutrient tracking, high protein diets, and pre-workout supplements. 

This was written by an individual with a Doctorate in Physical Therapy as well as a Bachelor in Movement Science.

authorBio:
A young girl who is in great despair and pain, however, still gentle and kind. No matter the consequence, she still fights until her last breath for those she loves and cares.

Loyalty is her weakness but at the same time her strength and charm.

She considers almost anyone she meets a friend than foe. Hate nor anger were never her vocabulary.

Pain is her challenge and trial, to achieve peace and tranquility. No one ever understands nor knew her situation or goals.

However it may seem unfair in the eyes of those who sees her struggles, she remains intact to her desire and loyalty just so everybody is safe and happy.

Her willingness to sacrifice everything even her own life remains a mystery on how she's still the same person no matter what she does.

On rare occasions, she has the sense of leadership but denies attention. She never liked the attention given to her no matter what the people says on how she deserved it. She would always say 'I only did what the others would have done...' But we all know how rare it is for a person to do such deeds yet heroic.

Her motto then became like this:

'With no sacrifice, victory will not be achieved. A war will not be won if there are no soldiers at risk.'

'For thy tree of life, you have come of age. Thus, strength of nature has given you advantage.'

Pain, sorrow, and scars are her proof and trophy towards victory in life.

title: GLIMPSES of how Canada worked: a writer's memoir.
description:
During the first 30 years of my journalistic career in the second half of the 20th century, good jobs of all kinds were available all over Canada. Those of us born in the 1930s and early '40s were in great demand because our generation was very small when the post-World War II boom began. I earned generous fees working mainly freelance at home or in the offices of clients.
"GLIMPSES..."  is the story of all the stories my work involved: the who, what, when, where, why, and how of people I met, our society's attitudes, my networks, lessons learned, mistakes made, many good times and some very bad ones. I hope to reveal how it felt to be a Canadian worker from the 1950s until about 2000, to provide perspective on why those years were the way they were, and perhaps offer clues as to how they led us to Now.
(Note that chapters become shorter as the tale grows longer.)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: GLIMPSES of how Canada worked is about journalistic work I did as a Canadian, for Canadians. Nonetheless, some of my biases may not be hidden. I was born in Warsaw in 1937, am a lifelong Roman Catholic who "enjoys being a girl" as Suzie Wong put it. I moved with my parents to Toronto in '41 when Dad was one of 40 Polish aeronautical engineers brought to work for The De Havilland Aircraft until the end of World War II. Men who then returned to Russian-occupied Poland disappeared, so we became Canadians and all my schooling took place here. By 21 I had a diploma in piano, degrees in general arts from University of Toronto and journalism from Carleton University, had left the parental home, and begun working as a reporter. Curiosity is my defining characteristic. Poking into topics of all kinds until I grasp them clearly enough to be able to explain them to others is my idea of fun. In this memoir I avoid my real name to protect the privacy of siblings in Canada, and especially cousins in Poland who continue to be slightly paranoid. Instead, I use the name WandaS in memory of an extraordinary woman, an aunt who was a key figure in the Polish Underground, paid a terrible price for it, yet thanked God for giving her life and had an unforgettable sense of humour.

title: Middle School: A Guide
description:
**NOTE: Hey, Crystal here, I wrote this piece years ago as I exited middle school. The grammar and language here is the way my 14 year old self wrote. I don't want to go back and edit anything just becuase this piece truly embodies who I was at that time , and editing it now would ruin the authenticity. This Guide is truly coming from someone who just finished middle school, and it represents my personal experience. Thank you for understanding**

Whether if your entering Middle School as a 5th,6th, or 7th grader, or simply reading for fun- this book will be your guide to the rising action of your educational career. Middle school will be the quickest and newest years of your life. One minute your at the bottom of the food chain and in a blink of your eyes all of a sudden your at the top and on your way to freshman year of high school. 

    This book will contain all the things that your teachers never explained to you, It will answer your burning questions that you just couldn't ask your teachers. The holes and gaps about the everyday life. The social life and environment of your new school. Anything and everything you need to know to not only be prepared and survive Middle School, but to make the most out of your Tween life on campus.

    And of course, any questions that might be left unanswered in here, you can ALWAYS comment and ask me, I will be more than happy to answer your question(s), don't be embarrassed to ask either, I'm not like 35 I'm entering freshman year of HS so I've been there done that with middle school. Which is why I think in a little more credited as to the truth of what I'm writing- I know how middle is from merely a month ago, as suppose to someone who know what middle school was like 15 years ago. I feel like it's more fresh and vivid in my mind.

At the end of each chapter there will always be a question column where you may leave any concerns or questions.

   Thank you for reading, and the best of luck
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Behind her Smile - Based on a True Story
description:
Sora was always a happy, confident and creative girl. She was full of energy and a little naughty. Her life was awesome, until, when she was 7, her family was told that her funny, kind and awesome dad, had a chest cancer. 2 years she watched him suffer in pain, get therapies and surgeries, and him never giving up. He wanted to live, and he would've deserved it. But on that one day, at home, the world decided to make the cruelest decision for Sora. He had passed away. The next days nothing happened. She didn't cry, She didn't feel anything at all. But then, suddenly, reality hit her. She cried, and cried, and cried, and cried. Every Night. She suffered, but she decided to not affect others with her pain, so all she did was smile. Laugh. Make other happy. Be as kind as possible. And nobody noticed, ever. But from the inside, it killed her.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Christian and an Ally | Why Being Gay is Okay ✓
description:
{Book 1 in the Journey of Faith series}

❝Being gay is okay, and I think God thinks so, too. Won't you join me?❞

Of all the hot button topics in Christianity today, homosexuality is arguably the hottest. Just Googling "gay and christian" can return upwards of 300 million results. But what does the Bible really say? How can someone be both Christian and an ally or a member of the LGBTQ+ community?

As a Christian, this is my view on the issue. I am not a Bible scholar, but I hope to shed light on why I do not believe that it is an oxymoron to be a queer Christian.

❝For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.❞ - John 3:16

Highest rank in:
NON-FICTION {#12}
#christian {#5}
#christianity {#6}
#bible {#8}
#jesus {#8}

Peaceful debates are encouraged, but hate speech and overt hostility will be deleted.

Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Katherina "Kat" Michels is the pseudonym for the author of the Journey of Faith series. The series focuses on the intersection of religion and queer sexuality, as well as Michels's journey from devout Christian to agnostic.

title: A Simple Introduction to Forensic Science
description:
Modern forensic science is renowned for creating leads and evidence for police prosecutions that may have been otherwise unattainable. The subject has been an increasingly popular choice of study for students and developments into the area have been constantly growing. Yet despite this, easy to read information about forensic science is still hard to come by.

This short non-fiction book is here to help. Keep reading for a simple introduction to the world of forensic science.

title: Love Is Blind
description:
Melanie never expected a chance encounter in the park to change her life, but when she trips over a guide dog's leash, she meets Adrian-a man whose view of the world is as profound as it is unique. Adrian, a sound engineer who happens to be blind, lives with a depth of perception that opens Melanie's eyes to beauty she's never noticed.

As their connection deepens, Melanie finds herself navigating uncharted territory. Friends and family cast doubt on their relationship, warning her of the challenges that come with loving someone who experiences life so differently. Melanie must confront her fears, question societal expectations, and decide if her heart is strong enough to withstand the judgments of others.

Together, Adrian and Melanie embark on a journey of discovery, from quiet evenings filled with jazz to walks along a seaside town where the world comes alive in unexpected ways. Along the way, they learn that love isn't about seeing-it's about understanding, trusting, and believing in one another.

Love Is Blind is a heartwarming story of resilience and connection that proves love isn't limited by what we see but enriched by how deeply we feel. Perfect for fans of tender romances and tales of emotional triumph, this novel will leave you inspired and believing in the power of love to bridge any divide.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Common Sense - Thomas Paine
description:
"Common Sense is a 47-page pamphlet written by Thomas Paine in 1775-1776 advocating independence from Great Britain to people in the Thirteen Colonies. Writing in clear and persuasive prose, Paine marshaled moral and political arguments to encourage common people in the Colonies to fight for egalitarian government." (Wikipedia contributors. "Common Sense." Wikipedia, The Free Encyclopedia. Wikipedia, The Free Encyclopedia, 3 Jun. 2021. Web.)

title: Astania Reviews
description:
This is a review shop dedicated to helping you improve your craft. Our reviewers are experienced, helpful, and ready to help you learn. They vary in the review services they provide, but one thing can be assured: you will leave here happy you chose us. If this intrigues you, open the book to find out more!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Tempering the rising flames of writers to reach their brightest blaze.

We are a community for both writers and readers looking to improve their craft, explore new worlds, and to form friendships. All are welcome!

Here we aim to provide a safe space for people of all backgrounds to bond over literature. Share your stories for the world to see. Check out our members' stories in our reading lists to find your next obsession. Keep an eye out for contests, clubs, and other opportunities to engage with the community.

Our Discord server is also a great place to connect with other Wattpad users, along with writers on other platforms and publishing paths: https://discord.gg/authors

We no longer affiliate with other communities, but we may be open to occasional promotions for promotions. DM us to find out more!

We do NOT accept work written by AI as a representation of our community; this includes in our reading lists and contests. Please do not submit AI-assisted work to anything in our community.

Use the hashtag #AstaniaBooks or #AstaniaCommunity on your stories to show you're a part of our community!

Curious? Take a look around our profile or Carrd, and we hope you can find a home with us in the wonderful world of Astania!

Please note: If you message us on our message board without a specific question or comment regarding the community, we will likely not respond.

Account primarily run by @laurendoubleu.

title: The Looked After Child
description:
Seventeen year old elisha is aging out of foster care. But can anyone really belong in a world that wasn't built for you? 

Tw. Contains themes of substance abuse and suicide.

title: Monsters in Real Life.
description:
Warning: ... This reading cannot harm you physically, but it can change your way of seeing reality. If at any time this reading makes you scared, stop reading. Currently certain parts of this reading have been omitted to preserve privacy. As this reading, "deviates from the norm". I have been swallowing this for over 11 years. I am fed up with no one wanting to help me, ... that "be*st in human form", or did it just look like him? I have been trying for over 9 years to get the answers I need. I have gotten rather strange answers... screen shots. Unfortunately, I "can't" know if it was really him, answers to something that, I guess, "Only we" could know. If you want to continue reading, to understand why I am so upset, angry and why I can't even look at his face... To prevent damages ... I can't say that This is a True*SHH*Story, even though very few people believe it. And also not can say that I think the world should know about it. And that People should stop being so blind ...

~explain what love means to you.

•if I could explain 
my definition of love,
I wouldn't ever have
to write a poem
again•
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
the thing about poetry is
that you could read the same verse
a thousand times
and still
you catch yourself
getting shocked
while discovering
a new meaning that is
walking around the edge

and I think
love
is just the same
